google_en: Zhou Fen, a girl from Mipo Village, Changle Township, Huayuan County, a registered poor household, received the admission notice from the University of Nanhua.
zh: 花垣县长乐乡米迫村贫困建档立卡户女孩周芬收到了南华大学录取通知书。

google_en: "This 5,000 yuan subsidy has solved my urgent need."
zh: “这5000元资助，解了我的燃眉之急。”

google_en: Just when she was worried about the enrollment fee, on August 9, the Youth League County Committee promptly provided her with a 5,000 yuan subsidy.
zh: 正当她为入学费用犯愁时，8月9日，团县委及时给她落实了5000元资助款。

google_en: In the past few days, relevant county departments have also provided 2.838 million yuan in education subsidies for more than 690 poor college students.
zh: 连日来，县有关部门还为690余名贫困大学生落实283.8万元就学资助。

google_en: At the same time, for those whose family financial situation is particularly difficult, we also organize social donations to help them complete their studies.
zh: 同时，对于家庭经济状况特别困难的，还通过组织社会捐资助学等形式，帮助其完成学业。

google_en: Huayuan has integrated more than 18.5 million yuan in student aid funds this year, and raised more than 2.5 million yuan from the finance department. The financial department will pay the real-name bank cards of poor students within the prescribed time limit.
zh: 花垣今年整合助学资金1850多万元，财政自筹250多万元，由财政部门按规定时限打入贫困学生实名银行卡中。

google_en: As of August 8, Huayuan has provided more than 21 million yuan in various relief funds for 13,140 poor students in the first half of this year.
zh: 截至8月8日，花垣已为13140名贫困学生落实今年上半年各种救助资金2100多万元。

google_en: She said gratefully: "I thought my father had passed away and my brother and I would not be able to go to college. Unexpectedly, the county solved our difficulties in time."
zh: 她感激地说：“我原以为爸爸去世了，我和哥哥都上不成大学了，没想到县里及时为我们解决了困难。”

google_en: All poor students in the county are provided with assistance as much as they need it, and those who need it are subsidized.
zh: 所有本县籍贫困学生实现了应助尽助、该补则补。

google_en: The reporter saw at the scene that the front of a large container truck moved to the express lane under the command of the traffic police. The container fell onto the greenway and a 2 cm deep hole was created on the roadside.
zh: 记者在现场看到，一辆大型的货柜车车头在交警指挥下移靠在快车道上，货柜箱掉落在绿化道，路边被砸出一条2厘米深的坑。

google_en: According to Xinhua News Agency, the Australian government of New South Wales announced on the 11th that it will spend 200 million Australian dollars (approximately 154 million U.S. dollars) to carry out the largest-scale renovation of the famous Sydney Opera House since its completion.
zh: 据新华社消息澳大利亚新南威尔士州政府11日宣布，将斥资2亿澳元（约合1.54亿美元）对著名的悉尼歌剧院进行建成以来最大规模的修缮。

google_en: The New South Wales government said the renovations would not change the opera house's shell-like appearance.
zh: 新南威尔士州政府表示，此次修缮不会改变歌剧院贝壳状的外形。

google_en: The Sydney Opera House is one of Sydney's landmark buildings. It was designed by Danish architect Jorn Utzon and built in 1973. It receives about 8 million visitors every year.
zh: 悉尼歌剧院是悉尼的地标性建筑之一，由丹麦建筑师约恩·乌特松设计，1973年建成，每年接待约800万参观者。

google_en: Rory Jeffs, general manager of the Sydney Symphony Orchestra, believes that the Sydney Opera House will use this renovation to make a "turnaround" and become "one of the concert halls with the best acoustics in the world."
zh: 悉尼交响乐团总经理罗里·杰夫斯认为，悉尼歌剧院将借这次改造打个“翻身仗”，成为“世界上音响效果最好的音乐厅之一”。

google_en: Non-Beijing citizens who have lived in Beijing for more than 6 months and meet one of the conditions of legal and stable employment, legal and stable residence, and continuous study in Beijing can apply for a residence permit.
zh: 在京居住6个月以上的且符合在京有合法稳定就业、合法稳定住所、连续就读条件之一的非京籍市民,可以申请领取居住证。

google_en: Recently, the implementation details of Beijing's "Interim Regulations on Residence Permit" were released, which means that the "Temporary Residence Permit" will be upgraded to a "Residence Permit".
zh: 近日,北京《居住证暂行条例》实施细则出台,这意味着“暂住证”将升级为“居住证”。

google_en: The reporter learned today from the State Administration of Taxation that as of the end of June this year, tax authorities at all levels had announced 2,470 "blacklist" cases of tax violations.
zh: 记者今天从国家税务总局了解到,截至今年6月底,各级税务机关已公布税收违法“黑名单”案件2470件。

google_en: It is understood that in July 2014, the State Administration of Taxation took the lead among functional departments of the central government and jointly issued the "Measures for Information Disclosure of Major Tax Violation Cases" in conjunction with the "Tax Credit Management Measures".
zh: 据了解,2014年7月,国家税务总局在中央政府职能部门中先行一步,与《纳税信用管理办法》联袂发布了《重大税收违法案件信息公布办法》。

google_en: The person in charge of the relevant department said that the change from "temporary residence permit" to "residence permit" means that Beijing will shift from "management" to multi-faceted services for the non-resident population.
zh: 相关部门负责人称,从“暂住证”到“居住证”的转变,意味着北京对非京籍常住人口将从“管理”转为多方位服务。

google_en: Not only will the illegal facts, legal basis, handling and punishment of these cases be announced, but the basic information of the illegal parties and the responsible persons of relevant intermediary agencies will also be included in the "blacklist" and exposed.
zh: 不但这些案件的违法事实、法律依据、处理处罚情况会被公布,而且违法当事人的基本信息以及相关中介机构责任人也会被列入“黑名单”一并曝光。

google_en: Government departments such as quality inspection, finance, and customs have also taken relevant disciplinary measures against those involved in the "blacklist".
zh: 质检、财政、海关等政府部门也对“黑名单”当事人采取了相关惩戒措施。

google_en: "Environmental problems are manifested in air, water, and soil pollution, but their roots are still in production and lifestyle."
zh: “环境问题表现在大气、水、土壤污染上，但根子还是在生产生活方式上”。

google_en: Therefore, the problems of high pollution, large amounts of energy, and large land occupation have not yet been fundamentally addressed through the transformation of production and lifestyle.
zh: 因此，高污染、大能源、多占地的问题还没有从生产生活方式转变上得到根本性应对。

google_en: For example, in 2015, the land development rate in Jiangsu Province was as high as 21%, ranking the highest among provinces and autonomous regions in the country.
zh: 例如，2015年江苏省土地开发度高达21%，位列全国省、自治区最高。

google_en: "The credit repair mechanism is an important milestone in the construction of the tax credit system and even the construction of the entire social credit system. It marks the continuous development and improvement of my country's social credit system and its increasing maturity."
zh: “信用修复机制是税收信用体系建设乃至全社会信用体系建设的一个重要的里程碑,标志着我国社会信用体系建设在不断发展完善,日趋成熟。”

google_en: On the one hand, Jiangsu Province ranks first in the country with absolute advantages in terms of the effectiveness of ecological environment creation at all levels and types; but on the other hand, the resources and environment are under great pressure.
zh: 一方面，从江苏省各级各类生态环境创建成效来看，以绝对优势位居全国首位；但另一方面，资源环境承载压力大。

google_en: To solidly promote ecological environment protection and governance, we need to fundamentally promote the transformation of production and lifestyle, and promote transformation to benefit people's livelihood through the construction of ecological civilization.
zh: 扎实推进生态环境保护和治理，需要从根本上推进生产生活方式转变，以生态文明建设促转型惠民生。

google_en: On the 11th, at the Lianyungang Port Terminal, 42 wind turbine blades produced by Guodian Group were loaded for export to South Africa.
zh: 11日，在连云港港码头，由国电集团生产的42片风电叶片装船准备出口南非。

google_en: Since last year, Guodian Group has exported a total of 163 wind power projects to South Africa from Lianyungang Port.
zh: 自去年以来，国电集团共计有163套风电项目陆续从连云港港出口南非。

google_en: The third-party company (non-Chinese company) commissioned by the Olympic Organizing Committee to produce the national flag is in Sao Paulo State, Brazil, about 75 kilometers away from Sao Paulo City.
zh: 奥组委委托制作国旗的第三方公司（非中国公司）在巴西圣保罗州，距离圣保罗市约75公里。

google_en: In order to urge the manufacturer to complete the work as soon as possible, the Chinese Consulate General in Sao Paulo organized special personnel to rush to the factory to do in-depth work.
zh: 为督促厂家尽快完工，中国驻圣保罗总领馆组织专人赶赴厂家，深入做工作。

google_en: It is reported that the flag is expected to arrive in Rio on the 11th. After receiving the flag, the Olympic Organizing Committee will send it to various Olympic venues. The entire process will be completed under the supervision of the Chinese Embassy and Consulate in Brazil.
zh: 据悉，国旗预计于11日运抵里约，奥组委收到国旗后会送到各个奥运场馆，整个过程将在中国驻巴西使领馆的监督之下完成。

google_en: After 30 hours of overtime work, the manufacturer finally completed the production of the Chinese flag and loaded it for shipment, completing the task that originally took 4-5 working days ahead of schedule.
zh: 经过30个小时加班加点，该厂家终于完成中国国旗制作并装车赴运，将原本需要4－5个工作日的任务提前完成。

google_en: The 20 projects signed collectively have a total investment of 8.063 billion yuan, involving multiple industries such as new energy, new materials, and modern service industries.
zh: 集中签约的20个项目总投资80.63亿元，涉及新能源、新材料、现代服务业等多个行业。

google_en: According to this newspaper, on the 10th, the Nantong Municipal Government held a discussion event on Hutong industrial cooperation at the Shanghai International Convention Center. More than 180 Shanghai companies were invited to participate, and 2 billion Hutong industry docking projects worth more than 1 billion yuan were signed on site.
zh: 本报讯10日，南通市政府在上海国际会议中心举办沪通产业合作恳谈活动，180多家上海企业受邀参加，20个亿元以上沪通产业对接项目现场签约。

google_en: Qingdao is the 12th pilot city in the country and the first pilot city in Shandong Province for the paid use and trading of emission rights.
zh: 青岛是全国第12个也是山东省首个排污权有偿使用和交易试点城市。

google_en: On the 11th, a number of companies came to the Qingdao Emissions Rights Trading Center to submit applications for emission rights. After the application is accepted, paid usage fees will be paid.
zh: 11日,多家企业分别来到青岛市排污权交易中心提交排污权申购,申购受理后将缴纳有偿使用费。

google_en: On the morning of the 11th, Zhao Xiuping, general manager of Qingdao Shuangtao Fine Chemical (Group) Co., Ltd., came to the Qingdao Emission Rights Trading Center to submit an application for emission rights.
zh: 11日上午,青岛双桃精细化工(集团)有限公司总经理赵秀平来到青岛市排污权交易中心提交排污权申购。

google_en: The first transaction that is about to be completed this time also heralds the official start of Qingdao’s emissions trading pilot work. It will also be the first emissions trading transaction in the province and the first city-level emissions trading transaction in the country.
zh: 此次即将完成的交易首单也预示着青岛排污权交易试点工作正式拉开序幕,这也将是全省排污权交易首单和全国城市级排污权交易首单。

google_en: After Zhao Xiuping submitted the application form, construction project environmental impact report and other materials, the Qingdao Emission Rights Reserve and Trading Service Center began a preliminary review of the application materials.
zh: 赵秀平提交了申请表、建设项目环境影响报告书等材料后,青岛市排污权储备和交易服务中心开始对申请材料进行初审。

google_en: According to the collection standards determined by Qingdao's price and finance departments, the current estimated initial emission rights usage fee is approximately 641,200 yuan, and the staff will complete the verification within 7 working days.
zh: 根据青岛市物价、财政等部门确定的征收标准,目前预估算的初始排污权使用费约为64.12万元,工作人员将在7个工作日内完成核定。

google_en: The company's factory in the old town of Qingdao ceased production at the end of last year and moved to a new factory in Pingdu for environmental protection.
zh: 该企业位于青岛老城区的厂区去年年底全面停产,环保搬迁至平度的新厂区。

google_en: On the same day, Qingdao Sifang Xincheng Zhizhuo Bus Parts Co., Ltd. also came to apply for emission rights for a project with an annual output of 4,200 high-speed rail and EMU interior parts.
zh: 当天,青岛四方新诚志卓客车配件有限公司也来为年产4200件高铁及动车组内饰配件项目申购排污权。

google_en: The first transaction that is about to be completed this time also heralds the official start of Qingdao’s emissions trading pilot work. It will also be the first emissions trading transaction in the province and the first city-level emissions trading transaction in the country.
zh: 此次即将完成的交易首单也预示着青岛排污权交易试点工作正式拉开序幕,也将是全省排污权交易首单和全国城市级排污权交易首单。

google_en: This project belongs to a mechanical processing enterprise, and the initial emission rights applied for are chemical oxygen demand (COD) 0.514 tons/year and ammonia nitrogen (NOX) 0.052 tons/year.
zh: 该项目属于机械加工企业,申请的初始排污权为化学需氧量(COD)0.514吨/年、氨氮(NOX)0.052吨/年。

google_en: Zhao Xiuping said that at present, enterprises have invested 400 million yuan in environmental protection, which is a huge amount on the surface, but it has a great impact on enterprise management concepts and social benefits, and it also opens up space for enterprise innovation management.
zh: 赵秀平说,目前企业环保已投资达4个亿,表面上数额巨大,但对企业经营管理理念、社会效益都有很大影响,对企业创新管理也开辟了空间。

google_en: Existing pollutant discharge units that have obtained environmental impact assessments before January 1, 2016 will not be levied paid usage fees for the time being.
zh: 2016年1月1日前已取得环评的现有排污单位,暂不征收有偿使用费。

google_en: The paid use and trading of air pollutant emission rights are key industrial enterprises in the city's electricity and heat production and supply.
zh: 大气污染物排污权有偿使用和交易为全市电力、热力生产供应重点工业企业。

google_en: "Obtaining paid emission rights does not mean obtaining the right to illegally discharge pollutants, and one cannot discharge pollutants at will."
zh: “有偿获得排污权并不等于获得了违法排污的权力,并不能随意地排放污染物。”

google_en: Han Hongyan, deputy director of the Qingdao Municipal Environmental Protection Bureau, said that if illegal or excessive pollution is still punished in accordance with relevant laws and regulations, it is impossible to allow illegal enterprises to avoid punishment by purchasing emission rights.
zh: 青岛市环保局副局长汉红燕介绍,如果违法排污、超标排污仍然要按照相关的法规予以处罚,不可能允许违法企业通过购买排污权的方式来规避处罚。

google_en: In other words, we must use legal means to severely crack down on environmental violations and severely punish enterprises for exceeding the standard of pollutant discharge, thereby protecting the environment and protecting public health.
zh: 也就是说,通过法律手段严厉打击环境违法行为,严惩企业的超标排污行为,从而保护环境,保障公众健康。

google_en: Now, for their own benefit, enterprises have increased their enthusiasm for pollution control, cherished their limited emission rights, and reduced pollutant emissions.
zh: 现在企业为了自身的利益,提高了治污的积极性,珍惜有限的排污权,减少了污染物排放。

google_en: Emission rights, also known as "emission rights", are the rights to discharge pollutants. They refer to the rights that emitters have according to law to discharge pollutants into the environment within the quota allocated by the government.
zh: 排污权又称“排放权”,是排放污染物的权利,指排放者在政府分配的额度内,依法享有的向环境排放污染物的权利。

google_en: Driven by economic interests, the reduction of pollutant emissions has changed from a mandatory behavior by the government to a conscious market behavior by enterprises, thereby truly achieving the goals of protecting the environment, protecting nature, and protecting public health.
zh: 有了经济利益的驱动,减少污染物的排放就从政府的强制行为变为企业自觉的市场行为,从而真正达到保护环境、保护自然、保障公众健康的目的。

google_en: Our country started piloting it in 2007, and currently 14 provinces (autonomous regions and municipalities) including Zhejiang and Jiangsu are fully implementing it.
zh: 我国从2007年开始进行试点,目前已有浙江、江苏等14个省(区、市)在全面推行。

google_en: This right is essentially the right of the polluter to possess, use and benefit from environmental capacity resources.
zh: 这种权利实质上是排污者对环境容量资源占有、使用和收益的权利。

google_en: Emissions trading was proposed by the American economist Dales in 1968 and has been applied to the management of atmospheric and river pollution sources in the United States since the 1970s.
zh: 排污权交易自1968年由美国经济学家戴尔斯提出以来,20世纪70年代开始美国将其应用于大气及河流污染源的管理。

google_en: In the next step, under the premise that the total amount of pollutant emissions does not exceed the allowable emission amount, the internal pollution sources will adjust the amount of pollutant emissions to each other through currency exchange.
zh: 下一步,在污染物排放总量不超过允许排放量的前提下,内部各污染源之间通过货币交换的方式相互调剂排污量。

google_en: On February 22 this year, the United States and Russia reached an agreement on a ceasefire for all parties to the Syrian conflict. The ceasefire agreement began to be implemented on the 27th of that month.
zh: 今年2月22日，美国与俄罗斯就叙利亚冲突各方停火达成协议，停火协议自当月27日起开始执行。

google_en: According to the Russian Ministry of Defense, in order to assist these six strategic bombers in carrying out air strikes against "Islamic State" targets in Syria, multiple Russian fighter jets took off from the Khmeimim Air Base in Syria to provide support.
zh: 据俄罗斯国防部介绍，为协助这6架战略轰炸机对叙利亚境内“伊斯兰国”目标实施空中打击，多架俄军战机从叙利亚赫迈米姆空军基地升空提供支持。

google_en: He also said that if extremist forces are not combated, these forces will expand into Russia.
zh: 他还说，如果不对极端主义势力进行打击，这些势力会扩展到俄罗斯。

google_en: According to the agreement, the ceasefire does not include military strikes against terrorist organizations designated by the United Nations Security Council such as the Islamic State and the Jabhat al-Nusra Front.
zh: 根据协议，停火不包括对“伊斯兰国”“支持阵线”等联合国安理会认定的恐怖组织的军事打击。

google_en: Russia will continue to build relevant military infrastructure at the base, and the living conditions of Russian soldiers will also be guaranteed accordingly.
zh: 俄将在该基地继续建设相关军事基础设施，俄军人的生活条件也会得到相应保障。

google_en: Although Russia and the West have not reached an agreement on jointly combating extremist forces in Syria, Russia will strengthen cooperation with Syria, Iran, Iraq and other parties in this regard.
zh: 虽然俄罗斯与西方没有在共同打击叙极端主义势力方面达成协议，但俄会在此方面加强与叙利亚、伊朗、伊拉克等方面的合作。

google_en: In September 2015, Russia began military strikes against extremist forces in Syria at the invitation of the Syrian government.
zh: 2015年9月，俄罗斯应叙利亚政府邀请开始对叙极端主义势力进行军事打击。

google_en: In the cases of rebirth of old houses and successful rural creation, He Peijun has set a good example: inheriting a century-old house while also telling the inheritance story of a piece of land.
zh: 在老宅新生和成功乡创的案例中，何培均做了很好的示范：传承一间百年古宅，同时也讲述一块土地的传承故事。

google_en: On March 15 this year, Russia's main military forces in Syria began to withdraw, but Russia promised to continue to retain the Hmeimim air base and the naval base in Tartus.
zh: 今年3月15日，俄驻叙主要军事力量开始撤离，但俄方承诺会继续保留驻赫迈米姆空军基地和驻塔尔图斯海军基地。

google_en: Today, an average of 100,000 people gather in Zhushan every year, either to bring a variety of creativity or to seek inner peace.
zh: 如今，每年平均有10万人次会聚到竹山，或是带来各种各样的创意，或是寻求内心的宁静。

google_en: The Shanghai Songjiang District traffic control department recently used electronic police to crack down on drivers using mobile phones while driving, and more than 30 cases were seized in a week.
zh: 上海市松江区交管部门近日使用电子警察整治驾驶员开车玩手机，一个星期查获30多起。

google_en: There is no fixed model for rural development, but it is difficult to rely on spontaneous changes in the countryside. The most important thing is to get the right people to go to the countryside.
zh: 乡村开发没有什么固定的模式，但靠乡村自发的改变难乎其难，最重要的一点应该是让对的人到乡村去。

google_en: In fact, the relationship between the countryside and the city should be about accompanying each other, just like a mother and her child. There is no distinction between strong and weak, and no one needs to rule the other. It should be very warm.
zh: 其实，乡村和城市的关系应该是相互陪伴，就像母亲和孩子一样，没有强弱之分，没有需要谁来统治谁，应该是很温暖的。

google_en: The Road Traffic Safety Law explicitly prohibits using mobile phones while driving and defines it as "behavior that hinders safe driving."
zh: 《道路交通安全法》明令禁止开车玩手机，并将它定义为“妨碍安全驾驶行为”。

google_en: Unfortunately, due to the large number of offenders and the difficulty in obtaining evidence, this phenomenon has not been punished as it should be, and legal regulations have almost become a decoration.
zh: 遗憾的是，因违法者众、取证难等原因，这种现象并没有受到应有惩处，法律规定几乎成了摆设。

google_en: With the popularity of smart phones, mobile phones are becoming more and more fun. Checking WeChat, posting on Weibo, even playing games and browsing Taobao have become the norm. Many people seem to be unable to do without their mobile phones, even while driving.
zh: 随着智能手机的普及，手机越来越好玩，刷微信、发微博乃至玩游戏、逛淘宝都成常态，很多人似乎须臾离不开手机，连开车的时候都停不下来。

google_en: If the traffic control departments are determined to "declare war" on the behavior of using mobile phones while driving and normalize this measure, this illegal behavior will definitely be curbed.
zh: 如果交管部门都能下定决心向开车玩手机行为“宣战”，将这一措施常态化，这种违法行为就一定能受到遏制。

google_en: It is necessary to strictly manage household registration files, and establish electronic and paper files one by one for the household registration materials of people without household registration to ensure that the file information is complete and effective.
zh: 要严密户籍档案管理，对无户口人员户口登记材料逐一建立电子和纸质档案，确保档案资料完整有效。

google_en: The public security organs should promptly report the situation of household registration of persons without household registration to relevant departments.
zh: 公安机关应当将办理无户口人员户口登记的情况，及时通报相关部门。

google_en: Policies and measures that are inconsistent with the spirit of these implementation opinions will be intensively reviewed, those that should be revised will be carefully revised, and those that should be abolished will be resolutely abolished.
zh: 对与本实施意见精神不一致的政策措施将进行一次集中清理，该修改的认真修改，该废止的坚决废止。

google_en: Last year, the village-level income of Donglin Village reached 22 million yuan, of which total agricultural income accounted for nearly half.
zh: 去年，东林村村级收入达到2200万元，其中农业总收入占比近一半。

google_en: Last year, the total was 50,000 yuan. At my age, I would definitely not be able to get this kind of money if I worked in a factory.
zh: 去年5万块钱一共，像我这个年龄，如果在工厂打工肯定拿不到这个钱。

google_en: In a collective greenhouse in Donglin Village, Taicang City, 48-year-old Wang Xuefen is leading workers to spray pesticides on pear trees.
zh: 在太仓市东林村的集体大棚里，48岁的王雪芬正带着工人给梨树喷洒农药。

google_en: The village has 150 acres of orchards and more than 10 tree species, requiring only 12 workers and 1 technical engineer.
zh: 全村150亩果园，10多个树种，只需要12位工人加1位技术工程师。

google_en: Village Secretary Su Qifang: The per capita planting area is increasing every year. It started from 50 acres and now exceeds 100 acres. The average benefit per mu is increasing every year, and there is room for growth in the income of professional farmers every year.
zh: 村书记苏齐芳：人均土地种植面积每年在提升，刚开始50亩，现在已经超过100亩；亩均效益每年在增加，职业农民的收入也每年都有增长的余地。

google_en: The shares are quantified to every villager. The biggest highlight of rural collective economic reform in southern Jiangsu is to clarify the property rights of rural collective operating assets and explore the separation of politics and economy.
zh: 股份量化到每一个村民，苏南农村集体经济改革的最大亮点就在于明晰农村集体经营性资产产权并探索政经分开。

google_en: The two institutions have two accounts and do not "cross boundaries" with each other to prevent corruption when village cadres participate in collective asset management.
zh: 两个机构两本账，互不“搭界”，防止村干部参与集体资产经营发生腐败现象。

google_en: In July 2015, 14 rural economic cooperative organizations in Anzhen Street, Xishan District, Wuxi City "separate accounts management" with the village committees where they are located. The village committees perform rural public affairs management, while the cooperative organizations are mainly engaged in business operations.
zh: 2015年7月，无锡市锡山区安镇街道14个农村经济合作组织与所在村村委会“分账管理”，村委会履行农村公共事务管理，合作组织则主要从事经营。

google_en: Zhu Baoping: Further advance the reform, engage in community share cooperation, quantify assets to members, fix them to farmers, and form clear property rights.
zh: 祝保平：进一步把改革往前推进，搞社区股份合作，把资产量化到社员，固定到农户，形成明确的产权。

google_en: Through Internet+, farmers will be given the right to know, the right to participate in decision-making, and the right to supervise democratic management. This will indeed turn it into a standardized operating mechanism for joint-stock cooperation.
zh: 通过互联网+，落实他的知情权，决策的参与权及民主管理的监督权，三个权利落实给农户，确实让它变成规范的股份合作的运行机制。

google_en: Zhu Baoping, deputy director of the Jiangsu Provincial Agricultural Committee, said that Jiangsu will continue to promote the reform of community joint-stock cooperative systems, encourage farmers to develop jointly, and establish a village-level democratic power operation mechanism.
zh: 江苏省农委副主任祝保平介绍说，江苏下一步将继续推动社区股份合作制改革，鼓励农民联合发展，建立村级的民主权力运行机制。

google_en: At present, the new collective economy in rural areas of southern Jiangsu has mainly formed four development models: asset leasing, enterprise shareholding, agricultural development, and joint development.
zh: 目前，苏南农村新集体经济主要形成了资产租赁型、企业股份型、农业开发型、联合发展型4种发展模式。

google_en: It is understood that overseas exhibitions have become an important platform to promote the construction of “One Belt, One Road” in Zhejiang Province.
zh: 据了解，海外会展成为推动浙江省“一带一路”建设的重要平台。

google_en: Peak will always be oriented to enhance consumers' sports needs, build a sports industry ecosystem, and accelerate the strategic upgrade from a single sports goods manufacturing company to a professional sports service company.
zh: 匹克将始终以提升消费者的运动需求为导向，构建体育产业生态圈，加速由单一体育用品制造企业向专业体育服务企业战略升级。

google_en: The successful holding of these overseas exhibitions has accumulated valuable experience and a good foundation for continuing to explore emerging markets along the “Belt and Road” and building a comprehensive platform for overseas exhibitions.
zh: 这些海外展会的成功举办为继续开拓“一带一路”沿线新兴市场，打造海外会展综合平台积累了宝贵经验和良好基础。

google_en: Hamill also said that 34 other people were injured and sent to hospital, including three firefighters who suffered minor injuries and have since been discharged.
zh: 哈米尔又说，另有34人受伤送医，包括3名消防人员受了轻伤，他们已经出院。

google_en: He also appealed to residents of the apartment where the fire occurred to contact the authorities as some residents were still missing.
zh: 由于有些住户仍下落不明，他也呼吁起火公寓的居民与当局联络。

google_en: It is reported that Mariana Turay, who has lived in this apartment for 30 years, said: "It seems like a bomb fell."
zh: 据悉，在这栋公寓住了30年的杜雷女士(Mariana Turay)表示：“好像有炸弹掉下来。”

google_en: American Red Cross personnel estimate that about 100 people are homeless, and 60 to 70 of them are temporarily staying in shelters in nearby community centers. Most of them are Hispanic residents.
zh: 美国红十字会人员估计，大约有100人无家可归，其中60至70人暂留附近小区中心的收容所，他们大都是西裔居民。

google_en: It is reported that it took the local fire brigade 1 hour and 45 minutes to extinguish the fire, and residents of nearby buildings were allowed to return to their homes a few hours later.
zh: 据悉，当地消防队花费了1小时45分钟才扑灭大火，附近建筑的居民在几小时后获准返回住处。

google_en: Since 2014, the revenue generated by the tourism industry has accounted for 10% of Jinzhou City’s GDP; in 2015, it reached 11.3%.
zh: 从2014年起，旅游产业创造的收入，占锦州市GDP10%；2015年更是达到了11.3%。

google_en: On August 11, the first Jinzhou Wetland Tourism and Culture Festival kicked off at the "Hequan Lake" in Jinzhou Oriental Huadicheng.
zh: 8月11日，首届锦州湿地旅游文化节在锦州东方华地城“鹤泉湖”畔启幕。

google_en: The scenic area has indoor hot springs covering an area of ​​3,000 square meters and outdoor hot springs covering an area of ​​4,600 square meters.
zh: 景区有室内温泉占地3000平方米，室外温泉占地4600平方米。

google_en: Xiamen girl Zhang Binbin: She started shooting with "beautiful hands" and her career has been "reversed" several times.
zh: 厦门姑娘张彬彬：“手型漂亮”开始射击之路职业生涯几经“逆转”

google_en: Oriental Huadicheng Wetland Hot Spring Tourist Area is located at No. 1, Linghai Section, Binhai Highway, Dayou Economic Zone, Linghai City, Jinzhou City. It is 70 kilometers away from Jinzhou City, 50 kilometers away from Linghai City, and 70 kilometers away from Panjin City.
zh: 东方华地城湿地温泉旅游区，地处锦州市凌海大有经济区滨海公路凌海段1号，距离锦州市区70公里，距离凌海市区50公里，距离盘锦市70公里。

google_en: Zhang Donghong from Dongyuan Village, Xiang'an District, Xiamen just replaced the old 29-inch TV at home with a large 65-inch TV a few days ago.
zh: 厦门翔安区东园村的张东红前几天刚把家中29寸的老电视，换成了65寸的大电视。

google_en: The daughter of an ordinary farmer is Zhang Binbin, who won the silver medal for China in the women's 50-meter rifle three-position final at the Rio Olympics on the evening of the 11th.
zh: 这位普通农民的女儿，就是11日晚为中国斩获里约奥运会女子50米步枪三姿决赛银牌的张彬彬。

google_en: In the competition that day, Zhang Binbin was once ranked in the middle and lower reaches, and seemed to be very far away from the finals.
zh: 在当日的比赛中，张彬彬一度排名中下游，似乎距离决赛十分遥远。

google_en: But his parents, relatives and friends did not give up and kept reading the live broadcast. Seeing that as other contestants completed the competition, Zhang Binbin's ranking improved all the way, and finally secured his seat in the finals. A burst of cheers erupted in his family.
zh: 但父母和亲朋好友没有放弃，不停地刷着文字直播，看到随着其他选手完赛，张彬彬名次一路提升，最终锁定决赛席位，其家中顿时爆发从一阵欢呼。

google_en: On the night of the 11th, in front of this new TV, Zhang Donghong and his wife, together with dozens of relatives and friends, witnessed the magical process of their daughter catching up all the way, from almost being eliminated in the preliminaries to almost making a huge comeback.
zh: 11日夜，就在这部新电视前，张东红夫妇和几十位亲戚好友，一起见证了女儿一路奋起直追，从几乎预赛就被淘汰到差点大逆转的神奇过程。

google_en: Zhang Binbin, who is 27 years old this year, has almost missed this hard-won silver medal several times in his 16-year shooting career.
zh: 今年已经27岁的张彬彬，在16年的射击生涯中，其实有几度都差点与这块来之不易的银牌擦身而过。

google_en: His mother Zhang Xiaolong told reporters that when they were hesitating, Zhang Binbin found several "novel readers" from the same village.
zh: 其母张小龙告诉记者，就在他们犹豫时，张彬彬找来了同村的几个“小说客”。

google_en: In the final, Zhang Binbin once again ranked low, but his last few shots became more and more stable, and he won the silver medal only 0.2 rings behind the champion.
zh: 决赛中，张彬彬又是在一度排名靠后的情况下，最后几枪越打越稳，仅以落后冠军0.2环成绩夺得银牌。

google_en: These "novel guests" were children from the same village who were recommended to participate in the training camp at the same time, including Zhang Binbin's cousin.
zh: 这些“小说客”是当年同时被推荐参加集训的同村小孩，其中还有张彬彬的表姐。

google_en: Shortly after joining the Xiamen team, Zhang Binbin took the initiative to return to school in Xiang'an due to family difficulties and other reasons.
zh: 就在进入厦门队后不久，张彬彬又一度因为家庭困难等原因，主动回到翔安的学校读书。

google_en: But after repeated efforts by his first coach Zhang Yajie, Zhang Binbin returned to the Xiamen team.
zh: 但是在其启蒙教练张亚杰反复做工作后，张彬彬又回到了厦门队。

google_en: Just like yesterday's game, this Xiamen girl used persistence to achieve reversals on her shooting road.
zh: 就如同昨天的比赛，这位厦门姑娘的用坚持实现了射击之路上的一个个逆转。

google_en: After entering the provincial team, Zhang Binbin once again returned home because he could not see hope for the national team.
zh: 而进入省队后，张彬彬又曾因为迟迟进不了国家队，一度因为看不到希望而再度回到家里。

google_en: This time, not only coach Zhang Yajie, but also leaders and coaches from the Xiamen Shooting and Archery Sports Center and the Fujian Provincial Team came to the home and finally persuaded Zhang Binbin to return to the provincial team.
zh: 这次，不仅张亚杰教练，厦门射击射箭运动中心和福建省队的领导和教练都来到家里，最终劝说张彬彬回到省队。

google_en: "Each coach has a different method of selecting players. When I saw Binbin's beautiful hands, I fell in love with him."
zh: “每个教练挑选队员的方法不一样，当时我看到彬彬的手长得很漂亮，就一下子相中了。”

google_en: In the process of training Zhang Binbin, what impressed Zhang Yajie the most was the input of this farm girl.
zh: 在训练张彬彬的过程中，张亚杰印象最深的，则是这位农家女孩的投入。

google_en: Zhang Donghong also recalled that in the training test, although her daughter's score was not the best, her number of rings was very stable. This was also an important reason why Zhang Binbin attracted the coach.
zh: 张东红也回忆，在集训测试中，女儿虽然成绩不是最好，但打出的环数很稳定，这也是张彬彬吸引教练的重要原因。

google_en: "It turns out that I can make clothes and mend clothes at home, and Binbin will pick up some leftover materials to make dolls by herself."
zh: “原来我会在家里做做衣服、缝缝补补，彬彬就会捡一些边角料自己做娃娃。”

google_en: She said that her daughter often sews handmade toys by herself, and because she is good at painting, she can always make the dolls' facial features and clothing lifelike.
zh: 她说，女儿常常会自己缝制手工玩具，加上她擅长画画，从娃娃的五官到衣饰，总能做得栩栩如生。

google_en: He recalled that more than a year after Zhang Binbin joined the Xiamen shooting team, the team conducted long-lasting gun-raising training in standing shooting, requiring the team members not to move for half an hour.
zh: 他回忆说，张彬彬进入厦门射击队一年后多，队里进行立射的持久举枪训练，要求队员半个小时不能动。

google_en: As an athlete, Zhang Binbin spends less time with his family and spends more time away from home. He can only go home during holidays and usually relies on phone calls.
zh: 作为运动员，张彬彬和家人聚少离多，只有节假日才能回家，平时多靠电话联系。

google_en: They rarely see their daughter, so their parents carefully store their daughter's childhood paintings and honors over the years at home.
zh: 平时见不到女儿，父母在家中将女儿小时候的画作以及历年的荣誉都细心收存着。

google_en: His parents said that whether in person or on the phone, Zhang Binbin seldom talked about his hard work, but more often talked about happy things with his parents.
zh: 父母说，无论是见面还是打电话，张彬彬很少说自己的辛苦，更多的是跟父母聊些开心的事。

google_en: Zhang Xiaolong told reporters that his daughter has always been a quiet and well-behaved child. She has loved painting and homemade handmade toys since she was a child.
zh: 张小龙告诉记者，女儿一直是个安静乖巧的孩子，从小就喜欢画画和自制手工玩具，

google_en: Zhang Xiaolong showed his daughter's animation paintings to reporters, "If she hadn't become a shooter, she would have continued painting."
zh: 张小龙将女儿的动漫画作展示给记者，“如果没有当射击运动员，她应该还会继续画画”。

google_en: In the living room on the second floor of Zhang Binbin's house, there is a cabinet filled with medals, medals and certificates she has received.
zh: 而在张彬彬家二楼客厅，有一个柜子内放满了她所获得的奖章、奖牌和证书。

google_en: Heavy rainfall on July 19 caused disasters in many places in Hebei Province, causing floods in some areas of the province, as well as deaths and missing persons.
zh: 7.19强降雨致使河北省多地受灾，造成省内部分地区出现洪涝灾害，并出现人员死亡和失踪。

google_en: Recently, the Hebei Province Cixiao Fund sent 16,000 yuan in condolences to six bereaved families in Xiaozuo, Taitou, and Guiquan villages in Jingxing County.
zh: 近日，河北省慈孝基金将16000元慰问金送到井陉县小作、台头、贵泉等村6户失亲家庭手中。

google_en: This is another act of condolences and care after the fund issued a message to the society to find "the children who lost their relatives and the lonely elderly in the 7.19 floods."
zh: 这是该基金向社会发出寻找“7.19洪灾中失亲少年儿童和孤独老人”启示后的又一次慰问关爱行动。

google_en: The good man "Lao Tie" unfortunately died while helping to voluntarily drain water in the community, leaving behind a 2-year-old child and a pregnant wife. The touching story of the good man "Lao Tie" moved the entire provincial capital.
zh: 好人“老铁”因帮助小区义务排水不幸牺牲，留下2岁的幼儿和身怀六甲的妻子，好人“老铁”的感人事迹感动了整个省城。

google_en: On August 4, staff from the Hebei Cixiao Fund and volunteers from the Hebei Brand Association came to the home of the good man "Lao Tie" and handed over 3,200 yuan of love money to the family of "Lao Tie".
zh: 8月4日，河北省慈孝基金工作人员和河北品牌会志愿者一起来到好人“老铁”家中，把3200元爱心款交到“老铁”的家人手里。

google_en: Zhang Donghong arranged the medals and medals neatly, and put the certificates into folders for storage. "These are the honors that Binbin has earned with more than ten years of hard work, and we all cherish them."
zh: 张东红将奖牌和奖章整齐摆放，证书则统一放进了文件夹保存，“这些都是彬彬十几年心血换来的荣誉，我们都很珍惜。”

google_en: Hebei Province Cixiao Fund, the full name of Hebei Province Voluntary Service Foundation Cixiao Fund, was initiated by the Hebei Brand Association Preparatory Committee and established in August 2015.
zh: 河北省慈孝基金，全称为河北省志愿服务基金会·慈孝基金，由河北品牌会筹委会发起，成立于2015年8月。

google_en: According to a report by Hong Kong's "Oriental Daily" on August 12, there are currently three major problems in diamond sales in the mainland, including false marking of diamond clarity that drives up selling prices, false marking of diamond weight, and no guarantee of after-sales service.
zh: 据香港《东方日报》8月12日报道，目前内地钻石销售被指存在三大问题，包括虚标钻石净度推高售价、虚标钻石重量、售后无保障等。

google_en: When Ye Li, vice president of the Brand Association, learned about the current situation of "Lao Tie's" family, she immediately decided to launch a "Charity Sale" activity among the corporate members of the Brand Association to help "Lao Tie's" family overcome the difficulties.
zh: 当品牌会副会长叶莉了解到“老铁”家人的现状后，当即决定在品牌会的企业会员里开展“爱心义卖”活动，帮助“老铁”家人共度难关。

google_en: Antwerp is one of the world's largest diamond trading centers. The diamond cutting skills of local craftsmen are world-famous. The diamonds sold have undergone strict appraisal and are very popular among mainland ladies.
zh: 而安特卫普为全球最大的钻石交易中心之一，当地工匠的钻石切割技术名满天下，所出售的钻石经过严格鉴定，深受内地女士的欢迎。

google_en: "A small cloth bag, held in the palm of your hand, a small handful, worth nearly one million yuan," an aunt surnamed Liu who participated in purchasing diamonds described her experience in Antwerp in June this year to the mainland media.
zh: “一个小布袋，握在手心，轻飘飘的一小撮，价值近百万元”，一名参与代购钻石的刘姓大妈，向内地传媒描述她今年六月在安特卫普的经历。

google_en: She said she hid the diamond in her underwear and carried it with her to the toilet and shower for several days, making her very nervous when walking or sleeping.
zh: 她指自己把钻石藏在内衣里，连续几日上厕所、洗澡都带着，走路睡觉都十分紧张。

google_en: She said that the diamond she bought in Antwerp cost about 55,000 yuan per carat, and the retail price of diamonds of the same quality in Xiamen was about 111,000 yuan.
zh: 她称在安特卫普所买的钻石，购入价为每克拉约五万五千元，同品质的钻石在厦门的零售价约十一万一千元。

google_en: According to foreign media reports, on the 10th local time, Downing Street, the British Prime Minister's Office, announced that British Prime Minister Theresa May will spend her summer vacation in Switzerland, but did not disclose the specific location of her vacation.
zh: 据外媒报道，当地时间10日，英国首相府唐宁街宣布：英国首相特蕾莎·梅将到瑞士度过暑假，但没有透露具体的休假地点。

google_en: According to mainland customs regulations, diamonds are not supplies or necessities for travelers during their itinerary, so they are classified as goods and must be declared when entering and leaving the country. Otherwise, they may be classified as smuggling, and in serious cases they may be jailed.
zh: 据内地海关规定，钻石非旅客于行程中的用品或必需品，故属于货品范畴，出入境时需申报，否则或列作走私，情况严重可被判入狱。

google_en: Some media said that after the United Kingdom voted to leave the European Union, the new British Prime Minister chose to vacation in Switzerland, a "neutral country" on the European continent, with some policy symbolism.
zh: 有媒体称，在英国公投脱欧后，英国新首相选择到欧洲大陆上的“中立国”瑞士度假，带有某种政策象征性。

google_en: She recently sold all the diamonds she bought on her behalf at a price plus 20%, making a huge profit of NT$200,000.
zh: 她日前以购入价加两成，把代购的钻石全部售出，一次过大赚二十万元。

google_en: The British "Daily Telegraph" commented that Theresa May chose to vacation in Switzerland. This is the first time a British prime minister has vacationed in Switzerland since Margaret Thatcher.
zh: 英国《每日电讯报》评论指出，特蕾莎·梅选择到瑞士度假，这是撒切尔夫人后，首次再有英国首相到瑞士度假。

google_en: The choice of the two female prime ministers is in contrast to the two male prime ministers, Blair and Cameron, who like to vacation in hotter places.
zh: 两位女首相的选择和布莱尔和卡梅伦两位男首相喜欢到较热的地方度假形成了反差。

google_en: The British "Guardian" commented that the symbolism represented by Switzerland, a neutral country, played a role in the choice of the British Prime Minister's first vacation destination.
zh: 英国《卫报》评论称，瑞士这个中立国所代表的象征性在英国首相第一次度假地的选择上发挥了作用。

google_en: The British Parliament will resume sitting on September 5. Among the issues debated include the online request for a second Brexit referendum.
zh: 英国议会将于9月5日复会，辩论的议题中包括网上要求的举办第二次脱欧公投事宜。

google_en: It is reported that the new British Prime Minister Theresa May will return to London on August 24, and a series of important tasks and activities await her.
zh: 据悉，英国新首相特蕾莎·梅将在8月24日返回伦敦，之后等待她的是一系列重要工作和活动。

google_en: The UK voted to leave the EU in a referendum on June 23, but the new British Prime Minister is unwilling to activate Article 50 of the Lisbon Treaty regarding the withdrawal of member states from the EU before the end of the year.
zh: 6月23日英国公投决定脱欧，但英国新首相不愿在年底前启动里斯本条约有关成员国脱欧的第50款内容。

google_en: Since the intangible cultural heritage of Huizhou mainly relies on oral and face-to-face teaching, many intangible cultural heritage are on the verge of being lost, so it is imperative to use digital technology to preserve and protect them.
zh: 由于徽文化非遗传承主要依赖口传面授，许多非遗濒临失传，运用数字化技术保存和保护势在必行。

google_en: There are 1,325 existing intangible cultural heritage items in Huangshan City, ranking first in the province in terms of both type and quantity.
zh: 黄山市现存非物质文化遗产项目1325个，种类和数量均居全省第一。

google_en: According to the main work arrangements of the Standing Committee of the Provincial People's Congress this year, the Standing Committee plans to hear and review special work reports, and conduct special inquiries on the implementation of the Banking Supervision and Administration Law and serving local economic development.
zh: 根据省人大常委会今年工作要点安排，常委会计划听取审议专项工作报告，并开展实施银行业监督管理法、服务地方经济发展情况专题询问。

google_en: In mid-August, the Standing Committee will organize two research teams to conduct research in some cities to prepare for special inquiries.
zh: 8月中旬，常委会将组织两个调研组赴部分市开展调研，为专题询问作准备。

google_en: Hua Jianhui pointed out that it was the first time in our province that the Standing Committee of the Provincial People's Congress heard and reviewed the special work reports of vertical management departments and conducted special inquiries. It was an active exploration to strengthen and expand the supervision work of the People's Congress.
zh: 花建慧指出，省人大常委会听取和审议垂直管理部门专项工作报告并开展专题询问，在我省尚属首次，是加强和拓展人大监督工作的积极探索。

google_en: At the exercise director's office in Kashgar, Xinjiang, following an order from the chief director, the armed police units stationed in Kashgar, Hotan, and Aksu quickly followed the guidance instructions, carried out mobile assembly, and headed for the exercise combat site.
zh: 在新疆喀什的演习导演部，随着总导演的一声令下，武警驻喀什、和田、阿克苏三地的各部队迅速按照导调指令，实施机动集结，开赴演习作战地。

google_en: Our country's Mars exploration launch goal is to orbit, land, and patrol in one step. This task is quite difficult.
zh: 我国的火星探测发射目标是想一步环绕、着陆、巡视，这个任务具有相当大的难度。

google_en: Our country's Mars exploration mission will orbit, land, and patrol at one time, which has never been done before abroad.
zh: 我国火星探测任务要一次实现环绕、着陆、巡视，这种形式在国外从没有过。

google_en: China’s Mars plan is coming
zh: 中国的火星计划来了

google_en: Because it takes 26 months for Mars exploration to reach a time window, experts are rigorously formulating engineering plans and striving to launch my country's first Mars probe within this window of 2020.
zh: 因为火星探测要26个月才能遇到一个时间窗口，所以专家们正在严密地制定工程计划，争取在2020年这个窗口发射我国第一个火星探测器。

google_en: "Only once every two or three years does Mars have the opportunity to be closest to the Earth. Launching a Mars probe at this point in time is the most energy-saving for the launch vehicle."
zh: “每隔两年或三年，才有一次火星距离地球最近的机会，在这个时间点上发射火星探测器，对运载火箭来说是最省能量的。”

google_en: "Considering the quality of the Mars probe, my country's Long March 5 carrier rocket will complete the launch mission."
zh: “考虑到火星探测器的质量，将由我国长征五号运载火箭来完成发射任务。”

google_en: According to Xu Dazhe, although my country's aircraft have entered deep space, it is still indispensable to complete the Mars exploration mission. Exploring Mars means that China has truly entered the era of deep space exploration.
zh: 据许达哲介绍，尽管我国的飞行器已经进入了深空，但是完成火星探测任务仍不可或缺，探测火星意味着中国从真正意义上迈入深空探测时代。

google_en: Mars exploration involves many technical fields. What is special is that although the Mars rover is a space probe, it has distinctive characteristics compared with ordinary space probes.
zh: 火星探测涉及的技术领域非常多，特别之处还在于，虽然火星车是一个空间探测器，但与一般空间探测器相比，它又具有鲜明的特点。

google_en: Our country's Mars exploration mission will orbit, land, and patrol at once. This form has never been seen abroad. Foreign countries once planned to orbit and land at once, but the landing failed.
zh: 我国的火星探测任务要一次实现环绕、着陆、巡视，这种形式在国外是从没有过的，国外曾拟一次实现环绕和着陆，但着陆失败了。

google_en: In other words, the Mars rover must have the ability to determine the driving route and detect obstacles and dangers.
zh: 也就是说，火星探测器要具备确定行驶路线、发现障碍危险的能力。

google_en: Therefore, humans hope to one day establish a residential base on Mars, eventually immigrating to Mars and turning it into a second home for humans.
zh: 因此，人类希望有朝一日在火星建立居住基地，最终向火星移民，把它变成人类的第二家园。

google_en: Pang Zhihao, a researcher at the Fifth Academy of the China Aerospace Science and Technology Corporation, said that the reason why humans are so interested in Mars exploration is because Mars exploration has important scientific and technological significance, and is even related to the future of mankind.
zh: 中国航天科技集团五院研究员庞之浩说，人类之所以对火星探测如此青睐，是因为探测火星具有重要的科学、技术等多方面意义，甚至关系到人类的未来。

google_en: At present, Mars has become the most studied planet by humans besides the earth. The history of humans using space probes to explore Mars almost runs through the entire history of human spaceflight.
zh: 目前火星已成为除地球以外人类研究程度最高的行星，人类利用空间探测器进行火星探测的历史几乎贯穿整个人类航天史。

google_en: A large number of signs also indicate that Mars was likely to be the same as the current Earth. It only took billions of years of evolution to become a thin atmosphere, lower temperature, and depleted water sources.
zh: 大量迹象还表明，火星以前很可能与目前的地球一样，只是经过几十亿年的演化才变成大气层稀薄、温度较低、水源枯竭等样子。

google_en: Therefore, exploration or manned landing on Mars for research can provide plans to prevent the earth from becoming a second Mars where humans cannot survive.
zh: 因此，探测或载人登陆火星进行研究，可以为防止地球变成人类难以生存的第二个火星提出预案。

google_en: As of June 2016, a total of 114 lunar explorations and 43 Mars explorations had been carried out around the world.
zh: 截至2016年6月，全球共进行了114次月球探测，43次火星探测。

google_en: However, since the 1990s, humans have conducted a total of 18 Mars explorations, while only 14 lunar explorations have been conducted.
zh: 不过，从20世纪90年代至今，人类共进行了18次火星探测，而月球探测只进行了14次。

google_en: The world's major space powers have formulated exploration plans targeting the Mars system. It can be seen that today's Mars exploration is hotter than lunar exploration.
zh: 世界航天大国都制定了以火星系统为目标的探测计划，由此可见，当今的火星探测比月球探测还热。

google_en: There are currently 5 Mars orbiters and 2 Mars rovers in operation, but only 1 lunar orbiter and 1 lunar lander are in operation.
zh: 目前有5个火星轨道器和2辆火星漫游车在工作，但只有1个月球轨道器和1个月球着陆器在工作。

google_en: On November 5, 2013, India launched its first Mars probe "Mangalyan" and became the first country in Asia to successfully detect Mars.
zh: 2013年11月5日，印度发射了第一个火星探测器“曼加里安”，成为亚洲第一个成功探测火星的国家。

google_en: "Mangalian" is used to study the surface, atmosphere and mineral characteristics of Mars, and to explore whether there is methane and signs of life on Mars.
zh: “曼加里安”用于研究火星表面、大气和矿物特征，探寻火星上是否有甲烷和生命迹象。

google_en: According to Sun Zezhou, chief designer of the Mars probe at the General Headquarters of the Fifth Academy of China Aerospace Science and Technology Corporation, the Mars exploration mission faces many technical challenges.
zh: 据中国航天科技集团公司五院总体部的火星探测器总设计师孙泽洲介绍，火星探测任务面临着许多技术挑战。

google_en: The most difficult part of this mission is that after the probe enters the Martian atmosphere, the aerodynamic shape and parachute deceleration only have one chance.
zh: 这次任务最难的地方，就是探测器进入火星大气后气动外形和降落伞减速只有一次机会

google_en: Scientists do not yet have a thorough understanding of factors such as its changes and storm characteristics.
zh: 有关它的变化和风暴时特性等因素，科学家们还没有透彻的认识。

google_en: The atmospheric pressure of Mars is very low, only 1% of the atmospheric pressure on the Earth's surface, and has a high degree of uncertainty.
zh: 火星大气气压很低，只有地球表面大气压力的1%，具有很高的不确定性。

google_en: Mars often forms dust storms similar to those on Earth in the summer, which will cause the solar energy received by the rover to drop sharply. A "sleep" mode must be designed for the rover to wait patiently for the dust storm to pass.
zh: 火星在夏季常形成类似地球沙尘天气的尘暴，这会导致火星车接收的太阳光能量急剧下降，必须为火星车设计“休眠”模式，让其耐心地等待尘暴过去。

google_en: This requires the detector's solar wing area to be larger, and it needs to be constantly adjusted to strive to align with the direction of the sun.
zh: 这就要求探测器的太阳翼面积更大，而且需不断调整，努力对准太阳方向。

google_en: At the same time, the Martian atmosphere also reduces solar illumination, which poses problems in the energy supply for Mars exploration.
zh: 同时，火星大气对太阳光照还有削减作用，这为火星探测的能源供给带来难题。

google_en: Also, the gravity on the surface of Mars is only 38% of that of the Earth, but it is much greater than the gravity on the surface of the moon, so the detector needs more power.
zh: 还有，火星表面重力只有地球的38%，但是比月球表面的重力大多了，因此探测器需要更大的功率。

google_en: Sun Zezhou said that due to the long distance between the Earth and Mars, the entire process cannot be controlled in real time by the ground, so it must be completed independently by the detector.
zh: 孙泽洲说，由于地球与火星距离遥远，整个过程无法由地面实时控制，所以必须依靠探测器自主完成。

google_en: "The core and most difficult part of this Mars exploration mission is the aerodynamic shape and parachute deceleration process after the probe enters the Martian atmosphere. There is only one chance, and success must be ensured."
zh: “这次火星探测任务最核心、最难的地方，就是探测器进入火星大气后气动外形和降落伞减速的过程，只有一次机会，必须确保成功。”

google_en: Pang Zhihao said that generally speaking, the method of detecting Mars is similar to the method of detecting the moon, which is also "circling, landing, patrolling, and returning" to ultimately achieve the goal of manned landing on Mars.
zh: 庞之浩说，总体来讲，探测火星的方式与探测月球的方式相似，也是“绕、落、巡、回”，最终实现载人登陆火星的目标。

google_en: Since there is not that much propellant to offset such a high speed, when landing on Mars, deceleration depends on the Martian atmosphere. However, the Martian atmosphere is difficult to simulate on the ground.
zh: 由于没有那么多的推进剂来抵消那么高的速度，所以登陆火星时，减速要依靠火星大气的作用，然而火星大气难以在地面模拟。

google_en: Since Mars is much farther from the earth than the moon is, detecting Mars requires overcoming a series of more complex technical difficulties.
zh: 由于火星距离地球比月球距离地球要远得多，所以探测火星需要攻克一系列更复杂的技术难关。

google_en: Kuomintang Vice Chairman Zhan Qixian said, "A Kuomintang with a history of more than 100 years has social commitment and responsibility and will not collapse like this."
zh: 国民党副主席詹启贤则表示，“一个一百多年历史的国民党，有社会的承诺跟责任，不会这样就倒闭”。

google_en: According to Taiwanese media reports, Taiwan’s “Executive President” Lin Chuan announced yesterday morning that the “Regulations on the Disposal of Improperly Acquired Property by Political Parties and Their Affiliated Organizations” will take effect today.
zh: 据台湾媒体报道，台“行政院长”林全昨天上午宣布，“政党及其附随组织不当取得财产处理条例”自今天起生效。

google_en: Lin Quan emphasized that if political parties, affiliated organizations or trustees violate the prohibition of punishment stipulated in the regulations, the committee will investigate and punish "in accordance with the law" in accordance with its authority.
zh: 林全强调，如果政党、附随组织或受托管理人等违反条例所定禁止处分的规定，委员会将依职权调查并“依法”处分、裁罚。

google_en: Lin Quan also announced that the deputy chairman of the Inappropriate Party Property Committee will be Hong Peigen, Taiwan's "Deputy Director of the Independent Commission Against Corruption".
zh: 林全也宣布不当党产委员会的副主委人选，将由台“廉政署副署长”洪培根担任。

google_en: Original title: "Corridor Doctor" Lan Yuefeng lost the first instance lawsuit against CCTV host Wang Zhian for reputation infringement
zh: 原标题：“走廊医生”兰越峰诉央视主持人王志安名誉侵权一审败诉

google_en: He said that Gu Lixiong is the best choice to serve as the chairman of the Committee on Improper Party Assets. Hong Peigen’s past experience in investigating related major cases will be used as the basis for the committee to investigate related cases of improper Party assets.
zh: 他说，由顾立雄担任不当党产委员会主委是不二人选，借用洪培根过去查察相关重大案件的经验，将作为委员会清查相关不当党产案件的基础。

google_en: Zhan Qixian also emphasized that even if the Kuomintang's party assets are not completely confiscated or confiscated after the illegal party assets regulations are enacted, the remaining assets will still be donated as promised, so that the party assets will be returned to zero, and the party will start everything from scratch.
zh: 詹启贤也强调，就算不当党产条例上路后，国民党党产没被完全充公、没收，剩下的仍会依承诺捐出去，让党产准归零，党要一切从零开始。

google_en: Legal Evening News reported that because CCTV host Wang Zhian made remarks about the "corridor doctor" incident on Sina Weibo, Lan Yuefeng sued Wang Zhian and Beijing Weimeng Chuangke Network Technology Co., Ltd. to court.
zh: 法制晚报讯因央视主持人王志安在新浪微博上发表针对“走廊医生”事件的言论，兰越峰将王志安及北京微梦创科网络技术有限公司诉至法院。

google_en: In early 2014, CCTV reporter Wang Zhian investigated and found that although Lan Yuefeng, who had been sitting in the hospital corridor for more than 600 days, was portrayed by the media as a tragic hero suppressed by the system, these reports contained a lot of false information.
zh: 2014年初，央视记者王志安调查发现，尽管在医院走廊里坐了600多天的兰越峰被媒体塑造为被体制打压的悲情英雄，但这些报道存在大量不实信息。

google_en: Yesterday afternoon, the Haidian Court pronounced its verdict on the case. It found that Wang Zhian and Weimeng Company did not constitute infringement and rejected all of Lan Yuefeng's claims.
zh: 昨天下午，海淀法院对该案进行了宣判，判决认定王志安及微梦公司不构成侵权，驳回了兰越峰的全部诉讼请求。

google_en: On March 29, 2014, the "Corridor Doctor" program produced by CCTV News Investigation was broadcast.
zh: 2014年3月29日，央视新闻调查制作的《走廊医生》节目播出。

google_en: All the so-called excessive medical information reported by Lan Yuefeng to the media is not supported by evidence.
zh: 兰越峰向媒体举报的各种所谓过度医疗的信息，均没有证据支持。

google_en: Wang Zhian also described in his real-name authentication Weibo that "the reason why Lan Yuefeng has reached this point is due to his personality and his obvious paranoid personality."
zh: 王志安也在实名认证的微博中，描述“兰越峰之所以走到这一步是性格使然、其带有明显的偏执人格等”。

google_en: During the court hearing at that time, both parties had a heated debate over whether Wang Zhian had violated Lan Yuefeng's reputation rights.
zh: 在当时的庭审中，双方就王志安是否侵犯了兰越峰的名誉权进行了激辩。

google_en: Lan Yuefeng requested Wang Zhian to delete his Weibo, apologize to him, and pay 100,000 yuan in compensation for mental damage.
zh: 兰越峰提出要求王志安删除微博、向其致歉并赔偿精神损害抚慰金10万元。

google_en: Cycling is expected to achieve a "zero breakthrough" in Olympic gold medals, while the women's football girls will challenge the two-time world champion German team, looking forward to an upset into the semi-finals.
zh: 自行车有望实现奥运金牌“零突破”，而女足姑娘将挑战两次世界冠军得主德国队，期待爆冷冲进四强。

google_en: Highlights on the 12th: The Chinese team is very busy at the start of the track and field competition, and the women’s football team is looking forward to a breakthrough
zh: 12日看点：田径开赛中国队很忙女足冲四自行车盼突破

google_en: Zhan Qixian believes that as long as there are still party assets today, no one will give you social donations. If all party assets are confiscated and taken away, the Kuomintang can just ask for social support and sponsorship. "Today, if there is really none, there will be a chance to ask for it."
zh: 詹启贤认为，今天只要还有党产，没有人会给你社会捐款，若党产统统被充公收走，国民党刚好可请求社会支持与赞助，“今天真的没有了才有机会去要”。

google_en: Wang Zhen has been in outstanding form in the past two seasons. He won a silver medal at the World Athletics Championships in Beijing last year, and was promoted to the individual event championship at the World Team Walking Championships in May this year.
zh: 王镇近两个赛季状态突出，去年北京田径世锦赛收获银牌，今年5月团体竞走世锦赛上又升级个人项目冠军。

google_en: Zhang Huizhen is considered a late bloomer. She once regretted not getting a ticket for the last London Olympics, but now she proudly stands on the highest podium of the Rio Olympics.
zh: 张慧珍被认为是一名大器晚成的选手，她曾遗憾未获上届伦敦奥运会的入场券，如今却骄傲地站在了里约奥运的最高领奖台上。

google_en: According to foreign media reports, 27-year-old South Korean female archery player Jang Hye-jin won the gold medal in the women's individual archery competition and won the Olympic gold medal after the team competition, becoming a double champion.
zh: 据外媒报道，27岁的韩国射箭女选手张慧珍在女子射箭个人赛中获得金牌，继团体赛后再获奥运会金牌，成为双冠王。

google_en: Zhang Huizhen won the gold medal in the women's individual archery finals at the Samba Avenue Arena in Rio de Janeiro, defeating Germany's Lisa Onru with a total score of 6-2.
zh: 张惠珍在在巴西里约桑巴大道体育馆举行的女子射箭个人赛决赛中以总比分6-2击败德国的丽萨·翁鲁，获得了金牌。

google_en: She only shot archery for the first time in the fourth grade of primary school. It was not until she was 27 years old that she won her first individual gold medal at the World Cup in 2014. She is a player who became famous late.
zh: 她在小学四年级时才第一次射箭，直到27岁的2014年才在世界杯赛上首次获得个人赛金牌，是一位成名较晚的选手。

google_en: Zhang Huizhen recalled, “Before I entered middle school, I was not good enough to participate in national competitions.
zh: 张惠珍回忆道，“上中学以前没有什么水平，以至于无法参加全国的比赛。

google_en: Zhang Huizhen talked about her gold medal winning speech after the award ceremony of the women's individual archery competition, "I shot arrows one after another as much as possible until the end. Maybe it brought good results and I was satisfied.
zh: 张惠珍在女子射箭个人赛颁奖仪式结束后谈了自己的夺金感言，“直至最后都是尽可能地一发一发地射箭，可能是这带来了好结果，心满意足。

google_en: Zhang Huizhen only finished fourth in the London Olympics trials four years ago. She regretted losing her Olympic ticket and could only sit back and watch her colleague and friend Qi Fu win two gold medals.
zh: 张惠珍在四年前的伦敦奥运会选手选拔赛上仅获第四名，憾失奥运入场券，只能坐视同事兼好友奇甫倍夺两枚金牌。

google_en: The 28-year-old South Korean archery "first sister" and London Olympics individual archery gold medalist Qi Bobei won the bronze medal.
zh: 28岁的韩国射箭“一姐”、伦敦奥运会射箭个人赛金牌获得者奇甫倍获得了铜牌。

google_en: Qifubei lost to Zhang Huizhen in the semifinals and started a bronze medal competition with Mexico's Alejandra Valencia.
zh: 奇甫倍在半决赛中输给张惠珍，与墨西哥选手亚力杭德拉·瓦伦西亚展开铜牌争夺。

google_en: Qi Fubei burst into tears after securing the bronze medal. One can imagine the burden he silently endured during this period.
zh: 奇甫倍在确保铜牌后泪洒赛场，其间默默承受的冲金负担可想而知。

google_en: The first is that the coaching staff has accumulated rich experience through continuous research, and the second is scientific training methods, which need to be accumulated over a long period of time.
zh: 首先是教练组在不断研究中积累了丰富经验，其次是科学的训练方式，这些都是需要长期积累的。

google_en: The archery team uses methods such as military training and walking through cemeteries at night to help members focus and maintain a sense of normalcy.
zh: 射箭队以军训、夜间穿越墓地等方法帮助队员集中注意力并保持平常心。

google_en: Although it has not been confirmed yet, many sources have said that Apple’s 2016 autumn conference will be held in September, and the iPhone 7 is really coming.
zh: 尽管还没有被证实，但诸多消息源都表示，苹果2016年秋季发布会将在9月举行，iPhone7真要来了。

google_en: Although Apple has not responded, news about the functions and configurations of the new iPhone have been released one after another, and there are even pictures of the iPhone 7 "real model" online.
zh: 虽然苹果公司并未回应，但有关新iPhone的功能、配置已经陆续有消息放出，甚至网上连iPhone7“真机模型”图片都有了。

google_en: The new generation of iPhone can be described as "much-anticipated". It is hot, in short supply, and there is money but no goods... If you want to buy genuine products as soon as possible, you must choose a good channel, such as Suning.
zh: 新一代iPhone可谓“万众瞩目”，火热、紧俏、有钱无货……如果你想第一时间购买到正品，一定要选择一个好渠道，比如说，苏宁。

google_en: iPhone7, like other iPhones, was accompanied by countless secrets before it was born.
zh: iPhone7像其他iPhone一样，出生之前就伴随着无数秘闻。

google_en: This adds to people's disappointment with the new phone, "It's longer, but it can't project holographic images at all! This generation of iPhone sucks."
zh: 这加剧了人们对于新手机的失望，“它加长了，却根本不能投射全息图像!这一代iPhone糟透了。”

google_en: Another evidence to support this news is that as early as 2014, Apple allowed headphone manufacturers to produce headphone products connected through the charging interface.
zh: 能佐证这一消息的另一证据是，早在2014年苹果就允许耳机厂商生产通过充电接口连接的耳机产品。

google_en: In addition, multiple sources claim that the new generation iPhone will cancel the 3.5mm headphone jack and instead use a Bluetooth connection and charging interface, which will provide space for Apple to add a second speaker.
zh: 另外，还有多个消息源声称，新一代iPhone将取消3.5mm耳机接口，转而使用蓝牙连接和充电接口，这将为苹果增加第二个扬声器提供空间。

google_en: These messages may be true or false, and the answer will not be revealed until Apple’s 2016 autumn conference.
zh: 这些消息或真或假，答案直到苹果2016秋季发布会才能揭晓。

google_en: Among them, Goldman Sachs maintains a "buy" rating on Apple's stock, while analysts at BMO believe that iPhone 7 will achieve historic sales results.
zh: 其中，高盛将苹果的股票维持“买入”评级，而BMO的分析师则认为iPhone7将收获一份历史性的销售成绩。

google_en: Although judging from the data released not long ago by market research organization IDC, the iPhone's market share has declined.
zh: 虽然从不久前市场研究机构IDC公布的数据来看，iPhone的市场份额有所下滑。

google_en: But this does not prevent industry insiders from being optimistic about the prospects of iPhone7 - many people believe that iPhone7 will most likely become Apple's last major upgrade of the iPhone series.
zh: 但这并不妨碍业内人士看好iPhone7的前景——许多人认为，iPhone7将很有可能成为苹果对iPhone系列的最后一次大幅升级。

google_en: At the same time, Broadcom CEO Hock Tan also said that Apple's future revenue growth will likely exceed 20%, which is entirely due to the launch of iPhone7.
zh: 同时博通公司的CEO Hock Tan也表示，苹果未来的营收增加将有可能超过20%，而这完全得益于iPhone7的推出。

google_en: 7% of the respondents said they planned to buy iPhone7, while only 4% planned to buy iPhone6 ​​two years ago.
zh: 有7%的受访者表示他们有购买iPhone7的打算，而两年前计划购买iPhone6的人数比例只有4%。

google_en: It is understood that 20% of users who currently own iPhone 6 or 6 Plus plan to purchase iPhone 7, which is a quite high proportion.
zh: 据了解，目前持有iPhone6或6Plus的用户群体有20%计划购买iPhone7，这是一个相当高的比例。

google_en: Secondly, some experts have analyzed that most Apple fans like to replace their iPhones from generation to generation.
zh: 其次，有专家分析，大部分果粉都喜欢隔代更换自己的iPhone手机。

google_en: According to statistics, among all iPhone users, about 26% have not changed their phones for 2 years, which means that almost 120 million users have used iPhones for 2 years.
zh: 据统计，在所有的iPhone用户中，有大约26%的用户已经2年没有更换手机了，也就是差不多有1.2亿的用户的iPhone已经用了2年。

google_en: Some media said that during the production of iPhone 7, Taiwan suffered several earthquakes. “The extent of damage to TSMC’s production facilities was beyond imagination and may have an impact on the initial supply of iPhone 7.”
zh: 有媒体称，iPhone7生产期间，台湾遭遇数次地震，“台积电生产设施的受破坏程度超出想象，并有可能对初期的iPhone7供应产生影响。”

google_en: The contradiction between supply and demand will affect ordinary users. It is time to choose a good channel and buy genuine iPhone7 at a low price as soon as possible.
zh: 供需矛盾会影响普通用户，是时候选择一个好渠道，第一时间低价入手正品iPhone7。

google_en: According to people familiar with the matter, Suning executives have met frequently with Apple recently in order to prepare sufficient supply.
zh: 据知情人士透露，近期，苏宁高层与苹果公司频频见面，目的就是为了准备充足的货源。

google_en: The operator has reached an agreement with Suning. It is foreseeable that with the in-depth cooperation between the two parties, it will inevitably bring lower prices and more considerate services to users.
zh: 运营商已经与苏宁谈妥，可以预见的是，随着双方的深度合作，必然会为用户带来更低的价格和更贴心的服务。

google_en: "At the lowest price, consumers may be able to buy an iPhone 7 for only 7 yuan a day."
zh: “最低的价格，消费者可能‘一天只需7元钱，就能购买iPhone7’。”

google_en: Maybe, you will receive a call in the middle of the night, "Hello, Suning.com, your iPhone 7 has arrived."
zh: 也许，你半夜就会接到电话，“您好，苏宁易购，您的iPhone7到了。”

google_en: Barcelona's "Ming Dynasty Cultural Relics Exhibition" is part of a European tour that will last until early October.
zh: 巴塞罗那的“明代文物展”是欧洲巡展的一部分，将持续到10月初。

google_en: Sufficient supply and various discounts make buying iPhone7 no longer "stressful", and Suning's logistics will turn this beauty into a more intuitive experience.
zh: 充足的货源与多样的优惠，让购买iPhone7不再“压力山大”，而苏宁的物流，更是会把这种美好变成更直观的体验感。

google_en: The organizers hope that through the cultural relics exhibition, local people can learn more about the long-standing Chinese culture, thereby enhancing mutual understanding and friendship between the two peoples.
zh: 主办方希望通过文物展，让当地人民更多地了解历史悠久的中国文化，从而增进两国人民之间的相互理解和友谊。

google_en: Hua Xia Bank and Shanghai Pudong Development Bank released their 2016 semi-annual reports yesterday. In the second quarter, CSI Financial Holdings once again increased its stake in these banks.
zh: 华夏银行、浦发银行昨日发布2016年半年报，二季度中证金再度出手增持其股份。

google_en: According to calculations by China Merchants Securities, excluding transfers, CSI Financial also increased its holdings of 38 million shares of Shanghai Pudong Development Bank in the second quarter, increasing its number of shares to nearly 600 million shares, accounting for 2.77% of Shanghai Pudong Development Bank's shares.
zh: 另据招商证券测算，扣除转增，中证金二季度亦增持浦发银行3800万股，持有其股份数增至近6亿股，占浦发银行股份比例为2.77%。

google_en: Among them, CSI Financial Holdings increased its holdings of 29.2931 million shares in Hua Xia Bank. By the end of June, the number of shares held by CSI Financial Holdings in Hua Xia Bank increased to 387 million shares, and its shareholding ratio also increased from 3.35% to 3.62%.
zh: 其中，中证金增持华夏银行2929.31万股，至6月末，中证金持有华夏银行股份数增至3.87亿股，占其股份比例也由3.35%增至3.62%。

google_en: Recently, the Hebo Garden in Shizibang, Zhengfu Village, Tongxiang City, Zhejiang Province was officially opened to villagers and tourists.
zh: 近日，浙江省桐乡市正福村狮子浜的荷博园正式对村民和游客开放。

google_en: The garden consists of more than 100 small circular ponds, and about 300 varieties of ornamental lotus, water lilies, etc. are planted.
zh: 该园由100多个圆形小池塘组成，种植了约300个品种的观赏荷花、睡莲等。

google_en: The rural lotus industry is both ornamental, recreational and economical, and has become a highlight of the local new rural development.
zh: 乡村荷花产业兼具观赏性、休闲性和经济效益，成为当地新农村发展的亮点。

google_en: However, on the morning of the 10th, the water in the water polo competition pool adjacent to the diving pool also turned green.
zh: 然而，10日早晨，与跳水池相邻的水球比赛池的水也变成了绿色。

google_en: According to foreign media reports, the "green pool" incident at the Rio Olympics has attracted much attention recently because the water in the diving pool turned from blue to green.
zh: 据外媒报道，因跳水池池水从蓝变绿，里约奥运“绿池”事件近日备受外界关注。

google_en: The Australian water polo player said after the game that his eyes stung and he wanted to cry.
zh: 澳大利亚水球选手赛后表示他的眼睛感到刺痛，想流眼泪。

google_en: After the water in the diving pool turned green at the earliest, the competition organizers worked overtime on the evening of the 9th to deal with the problem of the diving pool, but on the morning of the 10th they discovered that the color of the water polo pool had also changed rapidly.
zh: 最早在跳水池池水变绿后，比赛主办方在9日晚加班处理跳水池的问题，但在10日早晨发现水球池颜色也迅速发生变化。

google_en: Previously, Rio Olympic officials confirmed that the pool water turned green and said that the discoloration of the pool water was due to the weakening of alkalinity and would not affect the health of athletes.
zh: 此前，里约奥运官方人员确认了池水变绿的情况，并表示池水变色是由于碱性变弱的原因，不会影响运动员身体健康。

google_en: But Australian athletes said their eyes stung after their victory against Japan in the water polo pool.
zh: 但是澳大利亚运动员在与日本代表队在水球池进行比赛获得胜利之后表示，眼睛感到刺痛。

google_en: During the match between Australia and Japan, the environmental conditions in the water polo pools gradually deteriorated, but officials emphasized that they would restore the water quality of the two pools to their original colors on the 11th.
zh: 澳大利亚队与日本队比赛期间，水球池的环境条件逐步恶化，但官方强调他们会在11日将两个泳池的水质恢复到原来的颜色。

google_en: "We learned about a range of possible causes of discoloration in pool water and the alkalinity of the water."
zh: “我们了解了一系列可能会引发池水变色的原因以及水质的含碱度。”

google_en: Rio Olympics spokesman Mario Andrada said: "Yesterday afternoon, the alkalinity of the water in the diving pool first became weaker."
zh: 里约奥运会发言人安德拉达(Mario Andrada)表示：“昨天午后，跳水池中的水碱性程度首先变弱。”

google_en: "We have been following normal procedures these days, but we may have overlooked the impact that more athletes may have on water quality."
zh: “这些天我们一直走正常程序，但我们可能忽略了运动员越多可能对水质的带来影响。”

google_en: "But the change in water color definitely has no impact on human health, especially on athletes."
zh: “但水颜色发生变化肯定对身体健康，特别是对运动员是没有影响的。”

google_en: The Aquatics Center conducted a series of water quality tests and hundreds of divers and swimmers used the pool to ensure that water quality standards were met. "
zh: 水上运动中心对水质进行了一系列检测，数百名潜水员及游泳者使用了泳池可以确定水质条件达到标准。”

google_en: "We had hoped that the pool would be back to normal color in the morning, but the rain has affected the speed of recovery."
zh: “我们本来希望早晨泳池就能恢复正常颜色，但是由于下雨所以恢复的速度受到了影响。”

google_en: "This independent team confirmed our assessment and the steps we took to restore the pool to its normal color and chemical state."
zh: “这个独立的团队确认了我们的评估，也肯定了我们将泳池恢复正常颜色及正常的化学状态所采取的措施。”

google_en: According to Taiwan's "Central News Agency", an explosion occurred in a prison in a remote suburb of Metro Manila last night, injuring the warden and killing 10 inmates, reportedly including two Chinese.
zh: 据台湾“中央社”报道，大马尼拉地区偏郊1所监狱昨天夜间发生爆炸事件，造成典狱长受伤，10名囚犯死亡，据报包括2名华人。

google_en: ABS-CBN TV reported that the incident occurred at the Paranaque jail at around 9 o'clock last night, but the police did not provide a preliminary statement until 2 o'clock this morning.
zh: ABS-CBN电视台报道，事件于昨晚9时左右发生在帕拉纳圭市(Paranaque)监狱，但警方直到今天凌晨2时才提出初步说法。

google_en: The prison has not announced the names of the dead prisoners, but GMA TV reported that they included two Chinese.
zh: 狱方尚未公布死亡囚犯的姓名，但GMA电视台报道，其中包括2名华人。

google_en: The police said that the 10 prisoners asked to see the warden to complain about their transfer. However, the two sides did not agree, and some prisoners threw grenades, causing an explosion.
zh: 警方说，这10名囚犯求见典狱长，申诉移监事宜，但双方话不投机，有囚犯投掷手榴弹，酿成爆炸事件。

google_en: As of 8 a.m., prison authorities had not yet provided a detailed explanation, including how the inmates obtained the grenades.
zh: 截至上午8时，狱方尚未提出详细的说明，包括囚犯如何取得手榴弹。

google_en: Yesterday, police in the central Philippines entered the regional prison in Leyte Province and shot and killed an inmate who "attempted to attack the police."
zh: 昨天，菲国中部警方进入雷伊泰省(Leyte)地区监狱，击毙1名“企图袭警”的受刑人。

google_en: Urumqi regulates the business order of the individual tourism market and travel agencies must sign contracts with tourists
zh: 乌鲁木齐规范旅游散客市场经营秩序旅行社必须与游客签合同

google_en: Now that Xinjiang has entered the peak tourism season, in order to standardize the operating order of the individual tourist market, the Urumqi Tourism Law Enforcement Detachment and the Municipal Transportation Management Bureau Law Enforcement Detachment yesterday investigated and dealt with problems such as irregular use of tourist vehicles in the individual tourist market and the low rate of contract signing between travel agencies and tourists.
zh: 眼下新疆已进入旅游旺季，为规范旅游散客市场经营秩序，乌鲁木齐市旅游执法支队联合市运管局执法支队昨天对散客市场存在的旅游用车不规范，旅行社与游客签订合同率低等问题进行查处。

google_en: At 8 o'clock yesterday morning, about 10 buses full of tourists were parked around the Kempinski Hotel. Most of these buses were individual groups heading to Tianchi for a day trip.
zh: 昨天早上八点，在凯宾斯基酒店周围停了约10辆满载游客的大巴车，这些车辆大多都是前往天池一日游的散客团。

google_en: "Hello, I am from the Urumqi Tourism Bureau. Have you signed a contract with this travel agency?"
zh: “你好，我是乌鲁木齐市旅游局的，你们跟这个旅行社签合同了嘛？”

google_en: Yu Bin, a staff member of the law enforcement detachment of Urumqi Municipal Transportation Management Bureau, said: "Off-site tourist buses and shuttle buses operate tourist passenger transport projects in the Urumqi market, and they have no business qualifications."
zh: 乌鲁木齐市运管局执法支队工作人员余斌介绍：“异地旅游车还有班线车在乌鲁木齐市场经营旅游客运项目，没有从业资格。”

google_en: "The penalty for operating outside the scope is between 30,000 yuan and 100,000 yuan. If the driver does not have a business qualification certificate, the fine is 2,000 yuan."
zh: “超范围经营对这个处罚三到十万的罚款，驾驶员没有从业资格证是2000元的罚款。”

google_en: It is understood that the Urumqi Tourism Law Enforcement Department has previously conducted inspections on places where individual tourists gather, such as West Park and Hongshan.
zh: 据了解，此前乌鲁木齐市旅游执法部门已对西公园、红山等旅游散客集中的地方进行了检查。

google_en: Based on the results of the two inspections, Ma Qi, deputy leader of the Urumqi Tourism Law Enforcement Detachment, said: "The first is safety, and the second is standardization. There is nothing trivial about tourist vehicles. If something goes wrong, everyone will be injured and killed."
zh: 综合两次的检查情况，乌鲁木齐市旅游执法支队副支队长马琪说：“第一是安全，第二是规范，旅游车辆无小事，一旦出问题都是群伤群死。”

google_en: "We and the transportation management team continue to inspect the market and regulate travel agencies' car use to ensure the safety of tourists."
zh: “我们和运管联合持续的对市场进行检查，规范旅行社用车行为保证游客安全。”

google_en: Data released by the National Bureau of Statistics show that fixed asset investment growth, total imports and other data fell back in July.
zh: 国家统计局发布的数据显示，7月份固定资产投资增速、进口总额等数据有所回落。

google_en: On the morning of August 12, the State Council Information Office held a press conference on the performance of the national economy in July 2016.
zh: 8月12日上午，国务院新闻办就2016年7月份国民经济运行情况举行新闻发布会。

google_en: Sheng Laiyun, spokesperson of the National Bureau of Statistics and director of the National Economic Comprehensive Statistics Department, said that in July, the growth rate of some indicators of the national economy slowed down, but it was still operating within a reasonable range.
zh: 国家统计局新闻发言人、国民经济综合统计司司长盛来运表示，7月份，国民经济部分指标增速有所放缓，但仍运行在合理区间。

google_en: Sheng Laiyun said that regarding the performance of the national economy in July, I would like to borrow a sentence once said by the Prime Minister, "There are fluctuations in the situation, but the trend is still improving." This can better summarize the characteristics of the economic performance in July.
zh: 盛来运说，关于7月份的国民经济运行情况，我想借用总理曾经讲过的一句话“形有波动，势仍向好”，这能够比较好地概括7月份的经济运行的特征。

google_en: He explained that "tangible fluctuations" meant that the growth rate of some economic indicators did drop in July.
zh: 他解释“形有波动”是指7月份部分经济指标增速确实是有所回落。

google_en: Because the domestic and foreign economies were still undergoing deep adjustments in July, the international situation was complex and changeable, and the recovery of the world economy was not as good as expected, so export pressure was still relatively high.
zh: 因为7月份国内外经济仍处在深度调整之中，国际形势复杂多变，世界经济的复苏不及预期，所以出口压力还是比较大。

google_en: According to the latest information released by the Ministry of Civil Affairs, more than 60 million people across the country were affected by the disaster, with direct economic losses exceeding 200 billion yuan.
zh: 根据民政部最近发布的情况，全国6000多万人受灾，直接经济损失超过2000亿元。

google_en: Judging from the domestic situation, the entire economy is still in a critical stage of adjustment. The pain of adjustment is being released. The economy is facing considerable downward pressure, so some indicators have fluctuated.
zh: 从国内情况看，整个经济还处在调整的关键阶段，调整的阵痛在释放，经济面临不小的下行压力，所以有些指标有些波动。

google_en: Sheng Laiyun pointed out that there is another special situation in July. Floods are relatively serious, and high temperatures and hot weather have had some impact on production and operations in some areas.
zh: 盛来运指出，7月份还有一个特殊情况，洪涝灾害比较严重，高温酷暑天气对一些地区的生产经营带来了一些影响。

google_en: Judging from industry, investment, and transportation-related indicators, these regions have been affected to varying degrees.
zh: 从工业、投资、交通运输相关指标看，这些地区不同程度受到影响。

google_en: The growth rate of cargo turnover in July dropped 3.6 percentage points from the previous month. Floods have had a certain impact on traffic in these areas.
zh: 7月份的货物周转运量增速比上月回落3.6个百分点，洪涝灾害对这些地区的交通有一定的影响。

google_en: Judging from these factors, it is normal and expected for some indicators to fluctuate in July.
zh: 从这些因素来看，7月份部分指标出现波动也是很正常，也是在预期之中。

google_en: He said that "the trend is still improving" means that although the economic growth rate has slowed down, the economic operation is generally stable, and the general trend of steady progress and steady improvement has not changed.
zh: 他表示，“势仍向好”指的是尽管经济增速有所回落，但是经济运行总体平稳，稳中有进、稳中向好的大势没有变。

google_en: The CPI rose by 1.8% in July and 0.2% month-on-month; from January to July, the CPI rose by 2.1%, so the price situation is generally stable.
zh: 7月份CPI上涨1.8%，环比上涨0.2%;1-7月份CPI上涨2.1%，所以物价形势总体稳定。

google_en: According to the statistics of high temperature weather in various districts and counties on the Chongqing Meteorological Bureau portal website, except for Youyang, the rest of the city can receive varying degrees of high temperature subsidies.
zh: 根据重庆市气象局门户网对各区县高温天气的统计，除酉阳外，我市其余各地都能领取到不同程度的高温津贴。

google_en: At present, at least 28 provinces across the country have clarified the subsidy payment standards, but the standards for each province and city are different. Chongqing receives high temperature subsidies in the form of high temperature working day allowances.
zh: 目前全国至少已有28个省份明确了津贴发放标准，不过各省市发放的标准并不一样，而重庆则是按高温工作日津贴的方式领取高温津贴。

google_en: Workers working in high temperatures above 40°C can receive up to 20 yuan/day in monthly allowances (except for workers who already enjoy high-temperature job allowances in accordance with the law).
zh: 40℃以上高温工作人员每月最多可领20元/天的津贴（劳动者已经依法享受高温作业岗位津贴的除外）。

google_en: If the temperature is above 35℃ and below 37℃, the payment will be at a standard of no less than 10 yuan per person per day; if the temperature is above 37℃, the payment will be at a standard of no less than 15 yuan per person per day.
zh: 35℃以上37℃以下的，按每人每天不低于10元标准发放；37℃以上的，按每人每天不低于15元标准发放。

google_en: According to this standard, Kaizhou, which had the most hot weather days last month, can receive 330 yuan, and Chengkou, which has the fewest days, can receive 80 yuan. The highest temperature in Youyang does not meet the high temperature standard, so there is no high temperature allowance.
zh: 按照这一标准，上个月高温天气天数最多的开州能领到330元，天数最少的城口则是80元，而酉阳最高温由于没达到高温标准外，所以没有高温津贴。

google_en: If work is stopped or working hours are shortened due to hot weather, the employer shall not deduct or reduce workers' wages.
zh: 因高温天气停止工作、缩短工作时间的，用人单位不得扣除或降低劳动者工资。

google_en: In the past, many units would use refreshing drinks to offset the high temperature allowance. The Municipal Work Safety Bureau said that this behavior was not in line with current measures.
zh: 以往不少单位会以清凉饮品冲抵高温津贴，市安监局表示这种行径不合乎现行办法。

google_en: The Municipal Human Resources and Social Security Bureau stated that employees who encounter high temperatures but do not receive high temperature allowances can fight for their legitimate rights and interests through the labor dispute mediation agency where the company is located, or call 12333 to complain.
zh: 市人社局表示，员工遇到高温下作业却没收到高温津贴的，可通过企业所在的劳动争议调解机构争取合法权益，或拨打12333投诉。

google_en: If the employing unit refuses to pay the high temperature allowance, the worker may complain to the human resources and social security department at or above the county level where the employer is located.
zh: 有用人单位拒不发放高温津贴的，劳动者可向用工所在地县级以上人力资源社会保障主管部门投诉。

google_en: At the same time, since the high temperature allowance is part of the salary, not a benefit, it must be included in the total salary and personal tax deducted.
zh: 同时由于高温津贴是工资的一部分，不是福利，要纳入工资总额、扣减个税。

google_en: The first and second floors above ground are for the entrance, waiting hall, office and commercial buildings, and the first underground floor is the outbound floor.
zh: 地上1、2层为进站、候车厅及办公、商业用房，地下1层是出站层。

google_en: Therefore, high temperature allowance is not within the scope of the minimum wage and must be paid in cash and cannot be replaced by physical items such as drinks.
zh: 因此高温津贴不在最低工资范围内，必须以现金形式发放，不能用饮料等实物代替。

google_en: The newly built Urumqi Station is located in the high-speed railway area of ​​Urumqi, with a total construction area of ​​approximately 100,000 square meters.
zh: 新建成的乌鲁木齐站位于乌鲁木齐市高铁片区，整个建筑面积约有10万平方米。

google_en: There are three ticket halls on the north and south sides of the platform level and the north side of the exit level, equipped with 39 manual ticket windows and 34 automatic ticket machines.
zh: 站台层南北两侧和出站层北侧共有3个售票厅，配置了39个人工售票窗口和34台自动售取票机。

google_en: In terms of ticket checking, there are 30 channels on the east and west sides of the waiting hall. Passengers can quickly check and wait according to the ticket gate number on the ticket.
zh: 检票方面，在候车大厅东西两侧共有30个通道，旅客可根据车票上的检票口编号，进行快速查验、候车。

google_en: If you need help, you can press the 41 call buttons set up in the station to choose from and get timely service.
zh: 如果需要帮助，可就近按动站内设置的41个呼唤按钮进行选择，就可以获得及时服务。

google_en: At present, Urumqi Station is the largest comprehensive transportation hub in Xinjiang. It integrates high-speed rail, rail transit, buses, taxis, etc., and can realize seamless connection of various transfer methods.
zh: 目前，乌鲁木齐站是新疆最大的综合交通枢纽，集高铁、轨道交通、公交、出租等为一体，可实现各种换乘方式无缝对接。

google_en: In other words, all high-speed trains and 30 pairs of trains out of Xinjiang can stop at Urumqi Station.
zh: 也就是说，所有动车和30对出疆列车都可以在乌鲁木齐站停车。

google_en: Starting from July 1st, passenger trains from the old passenger station, that is, Urumqi South Station, will run to Urumqi Station in stages.
zh: 从7月1号起，老客站，也就是乌鲁木齐南站的旅客列车就分步开行到了乌鲁木齐站。

google_en: The official launch of Urumqi's new passenger station will become an important platform for Xinjiang to build a national comprehensive transportation city and promote the construction of the "Silk Road Economic Belt" and new areas.
zh: 乌鲁木齐新客站的正式投入运营将成为新疆打造全国性综合交通城市的重要平台，推进“丝绸之路经济带”和新区建设。

google_en: Now you can buy tickets at both stations. The train travel time between them is about 10 minutes. Passengers need to pay attention to the specific names of the origin and destination stations on the ticket.
zh: 现在两个站均可以买票乘车，他们之间的列车通行时间在10分钟左右，旅客需要注意票面始发和终点站的具体站名。

google_en: Gracia is a cute female toucan, exuding the atmosphere of a tropical rainforest.
zh: 格雷西亚是一只萌萌的雌性巨嘴鸟，浑身散发着热带雨林的气息。

google_en: In the Central American country of Costa Rica, Toucan Gracia and her story have long been a household name.
zh: 在中美洲国家哥斯达黎加，巨嘴鸟格雷西亚和它的故事早已家喻户晓。

google_en: At a press conference on August 10, Gracia finally appeared after recovering from the operation, showing off her brand new 3D printed plastic beak.
zh: 8月10日的新闻发布会上，术后康复的格雷西亚终于亮相，向人们展示它崭新的3D打印塑料鸟喙。
