google_en: Music with gongs and drums, traditional snacks, fancy decorations, and a bustling crowd.
zh: 敲锣打鼓的音乐、传统的小食、花俏的装饰、人群汹涌的现场。

google_en: The "2016 Bon Cultural Festival" hosted by the Federation of Hong Kong Chiu Chow Societies was held in Victoria Park from the 12th to the 14th. This is the largest Bon festival in Hong Kong.
zh: 由香港潮属社团总会主办的“2016盂兰文化节”12日至14日在维多利亚公园举办，这是香港最盛大的一场盂兰胜会。

google_en: In addition to continuing the existing "Orphan Seizing Competition", we also added a "Parent-Child Basin Stacking Competition" that the whole family can participate in.
zh: 除了延续已有的“抢孤竞赛”，还增加了全家可以参加的“亲子盆供堆垒赛”。

google_en: A couple from France stayed at the event for nearly 3 hours and had an experience in the mini flower card mobile classroom.
zh: 一对来自法国的夫妻在活动现场逗留了近3个小时，并且在迷你花牌流动教室体验了一番。

google_en: Not only does it introduce the culture and history of Bon in the form of comics, but it also has a Bon-themed 3D selfie area, a traditional snack area, and a mobile classroom for traditional crafts, attracting many children and overseas people to experience and visit.
zh: 不仅用漫画形式介绍盂兰文化历史，现场还设有盂兰主题3D自拍区、传统小食区以及传统手艺流动教室等，吸引不少小朋友和海外人士来体验参观。

google_en: They said that although France also has similar festivals to commemorate ancestors, the atmosphere is very heavy. Unlike here, there is music, food and you can learn traditional crafts.
zh: 他们表示，虽然法国也有类似纪念先人的节日，但气氛很沉重，不像这里，有音乐，有食物还可以学习传统手艺。

google_en: "I found this special festival online, so I decided to come and see it. It felt very fresh."
zh: “在网上查到这个特别的节日，所以决定来看看，感到很新鲜。”

google_en: She said, "In a busy financial metropolis like Hong Kong, we can still see such a large-scale and organized ceremony to worship our ancestors."
zh: 她说，“在香港这么繁忙的金融大都市，还能看到这么有规模、有组织的祭拜祖先的仪式。”

google_en: "This not only reflects the diversity of Chinese culture, but also allows more people to understand these traditional crafts and pass them on."
zh: “这不仅体现了中国文化的多元性，还能让更多人了解这些传统手艺并且传承下去。”

google_en: Hu Yansong, the president of this event, said, “We don’t want to make the Bon Cultural Festival very scary and make people afraid to approach it, especially children.”
zh: 本次活动总统筹胡炎松表示，“我们不想把盂兰文化节布置得很恐怖，让人不敢接近，特别是小孩子。”

google_en: "We hope that through the youth-oriented activities and decorations on site, young people will know that the meaning behind the Bon Festival culture is filial piety and gratitude."
zh: “我们希望通过现场年轻化的活动和布置，让年轻人知道盂兰节文化背后想表达的是孝道和感恩。“

google_en: He also said that a total of 24 teams participated in the "Orphan Robbing Competition" this time, including not only community organizations, but also cooperation with some schools to allow students to participate.
zh: 他也表示，这次共有24个队伍参加“抢孤竞赛”，其中不仅有社团组织，还与一些学校合作，让学生参加。

google_en: It is understood that the Hong Kong Chaozhou Bon Festival was included in the "National Intangible Cultural Heritage List" in 2011.
zh: 据了解，香港潮人盂兰胜会已于2011年列入“国家级非物质文化遗产名录”。

google_en: The audience followed the plot of "The Legend of White Snake" and the actors' singing and dancing, sometimes smiling knowingly and sometimes applauding enthusiastically.
zh: 观众们跟着《白蛇传》情节的起承转合、演员的唱念做打，时而会心微笑，时而热烈鼓掌。

google_en: On the evening of the 11th, the National Peking Opera Company of China traveled thousands of miles to Mexico City with its famous drama "The Legend of White Snake" and presented an authentic Peking Opera feast to the local people at the National Palace of Fine Arts in Mexico.
zh: １１日晚，中国国家京剧院携名剧《白蛇传》穿越千里来到墨西哥城，在墨国家美术宫为当地民众呈现了一场原汁原味的京剧盛宴。

google_en: Marissa Jimenez Cacho, who had attended a Peking Opera performance 15 years ago, accompanied her daughter to the end of the performance.
zh: １５年前曾观看过京剧演出的玛丽萨·希门尼斯·卡乔陪着女儿看完演出。

google_en: As a key performance project of the "China-Latin America Cultural Exchange Year", from August 9th to 23rd, the National Peking Opera Company of China performed 7 Peking Opera performances in five cities including Mexico City, the capital of Mexico, and Cordoba and Juarez.
zh: 作为“中拉文化交流年”重点演出项目，８月９日至２３日，中国国家京剧院在墨西哥首都墨西哥城以及科尔多瓦、华雷斯等５座城市演出７场京剧。

google_en: The enthusiasm of the Mexican audience left a deep impression on the young actor Fu Jia who plays the role of White Snake.
zh: 墨西哥观众的热情给白娘子扮演者、青年演员付佳留下深刻印象。

google_en: "This is a wonderful performance. The music, lighting, and stage performances all impressed me deeply... I think it is necessary for my daughter to learn about Chinese culture and the art of Chinese Peking Opera."
zh: “这是一场精彩绝伦的表演，音乐、灯光、舞台表演都让我印象深刻，……我觉得很有必要让女儿也来了解中国文化和中国京剧艺术。”

google_en: Liu Cigui went to Sanya to investigate "double repairs and dual cities" and required improving the level of urban construction and management
zh: 刘赐贵赴三亚调研“双修、双城”要求提升城市建管水平

google_en: Next year marks the 45th anniversary of the establishment of diplomatic relations between China and Mexico, and more cultural exchange activities will be held in China and Mexico.
zh: 明年是中墨两国建交４５周年，届时将会有更多文化交流活动在中墨两国举办。

google_en: Qiu Xiaoqi, Chinese Ambassador to Mexico, said that various cultural exchange activities during this year's "China-Latin America Cultural Exchange Year" will play a positive role in deepening understanding and enhancing friendship between the people of China and Mexico.
zh: 中国驻墨西哥大使邱小琪说，今年“中拉文化交流年”的各项文化交流活动对推动中墨两国人民加深了解、增进友谊具有积极作用。

google_en: "I didn't expect the Mexican audience to be so enthusiastic. Originally I was a little worried about whether they could understand the story, but today I saw that they were able to grasp the plot and many laughs, which was beyond my expectation."
zh: “我没有想到墨西哥观众这么热情，原本我对他们能否理解故事还有些担心，但是今天看到他们能抓住故事情节和许多笑点，这出乎我的意料。”

google_en: Liu Cigui fully affirmed the phased results achieved and the good experiences and practices created during the pilot work.
zh: 刘赐贵对试点工作中取得的阶段性成果和创造出的好经验、好做法给予充分肯定。

google_en: On the morning of the 12th, Liu Cigui presided over a symposium and listened to the report on the progress of Sanya City's "dual repairs" and "double cities" pilot work as well as the opinions and suggestions of various relevant departments.
zh: 12日上午，刘赐贵主持召开座谈会，听取了三亚市“双修”“双城”试点工作推进情况的汇报及各有关部门的意见建议。

google_en: It is necessary to play a leading role in improving the internationalization level of international tourist islands, starting from every detail, enriching international elements and creating international quality products.
zh: 要在提升国际旅游岛国际化水平中发挥好带头作用，从点滴细节入手，丰富国际元素、打造国际精品。

google_en: It is necessary to play a leading role in urban-rural integration and all-region tourism, accelerate the construction of characteristic towns, integrate tourism elements into every project, and build every village and town in Sanya into a tourist attraction.
zh: 要在城乡一体化和全域旅游中发挥好带头作用，加快特色风情小镇建设，将旅游元素融入每个项目，把三亚的每个乡村、城镇都建设成旅游景区。

google_en: Liu Cigui emphasized that Sanya should seize the historical development opportunity, take the "double repair" and "double city" pilot work as an important starting point, and give full play to the leading role of demonstration in the province's economic and social development.
zh: 刘赐贵强调，三亚要紧紧抓住历史发展机遇，以“双修”“双城”试点工作为重要抓手，在全省经济社会发展中充分发挥好示范带动的龙头作用。

google_en: Deng Yaping won 18 world championships in her 14-year sports career, becoming the first person in Chinese Olympic history to win four Olympic gold medals.
zh: 邓亚萍在14年的运动生涯中，共拿到18个世界冠军，成为中国奥运历史上第一个夺得四枚奥运金牌的人。

google_en: Zhang Qi, member of the Standing Committee of the Provincial Party Committee and Secretary of the Sanya Municipal Party Committee, Wang Lu, Vice Governor, and Lu Zhiyuan, Secretary-General of the Provincial Government, participated in the research discussion.
zh: 省委常委、三亚市委书记张琦，副省长王路，省政府秘书长陆志远参加调研座谈。

google_en: It is necessary to play a leading role in the "100-day Action to Serve Social Investment", promote the construction of a number of major projects and parks, ensure the implementation of high-quality projects, and implement various requirements of the action.
zh: 要在“服务社会投资百日大行动”中发挥好带头作用，推动一批重大项目和园区建设，确保高质量项目的落地，把大行动的各项要求落实好。

google_en: On September 26, 2010, he served as deputy secretary-general of People's Daily and general manager of People's Search Network Co., Ltd., a department-level cadre.
zh: 2010年9月26日，任人民日报社副秘书长兼人民搜索网络股份公司总经理，正厅级干部。

google_en: She has been ranked No. 1 in the world for eight consecutive years and is the female athlete who has been ranked No. 1 in the world for the longest time in the history of table tennis.
zh: 她在乒坛排名连续8年保持世界第一，是乒乓球史上排名“世界第一”时间最长的女运动员。

google_en: Recently, she will join forces with Yu Minhong to build the first sports industry innovation and entrepreneurship platform in China.
zh: 日前，她将和俞敏洪联手共同打造国内第一家体育产业创新创业平台。

google_en: As the first world champion in Chinese men's gymnastics, Huang Yubin chose to take up the coaching staff after retiring.
zh: 作为中国男子体操首位世界冠军，黄玉斌退役后选择拿起教鞭。

google_en: There is also such a group of star coaches in the Chinese sports world: they were extremely successful in the era of athletes and won countless honors for the country; after retirement, they passed on what they have learned over the years to those who came after them, and trained them to win championships.
zh: 中国体坛上也有这样一群明星教练：他们在运动员时代风光无限，为国家赢得无数荣耀；退役后将多年所学传授于后来者，培养出中夺冠军。

google_en: Since then, Tian Liang has continued to appear in advertising endorsements, and has played important roles such as "Cowherd" and "Lei Feng" in recent years.
zh: 此后，田亮一直广告代言不断，更是在近年扮演了“牛郎”、“雷锋”等重要角色。

google_en: Whether it is due to increasing age or limited playing time, some players' performance will decline every season.
zh: 无论是因为年龄的增大还是出场时间被限制，每个赛季都有一些球员的表现会出现退步。

google_en: From the women's team coach to the men's team coach and then to the head coach, Huang Yubin created an "Olympic gold team" and led the team to achieve a mythical record of 9 gold medals, 1 silver medal and 4 bronze medals in the Beijing Olympics.
zh: 从女队教练到男队教练，再到总教练，黄玉斌打造了一支“奥运金团”，更率队在北京奥运会取得了9金1银4铜的神话战绩。

google_en: Many NBA players have proven their ability. But while some people progress, others decline.
zh: 很多NBA球员都证明了自己的实力。但是有人进步就有人衰落。

google_en: Of course, some "regression" may just be a shrinking of data, and the strength of these players may not have declined.
zh: 当然了，有些“退步”可能仅仅是数据的缩水，这些球员的实力可能并未下降。

google_en: Even though Wade is still one of the best shooting guards in the league, his performance in the Bulls should not be as good as that in the Heat.
zh: 即便韦德仍是联盟里最好的得分后卫之一，但是他在公牛的表现应该不会有热火那么好了。

google_en: Coming to the Windy City, the Flash is bound to give more of the ball to Butler and Rondo, and he is likely to choose a healthy style of play in the regular season.
zh: 来到了风城，闪电侠势必把球权更多地让给巴特勒和隆多，自己很可能在常规赛选择养生打法。

google_en: The backcourt formed by him and Rondo has limited shooting range, and star Butler's three-point shooting percentage is only 32.8%, which makes their offense next season very crowded.
zh: 他和隆多组成的后场射程有限，当家球星巴特勒的三分命中率也只有32.8%，这让他们下赛季的进攻会打得很拥挤。

google_en: Okafor's situation is rather embarrassing. As the 76ers' first choice last season, he has to compete with Simmons and Embiid for playing time and ball rights in the new season.
zh: 奥卡福的情况比较尴尬，作为上赛季76人的第一选择，他在新赛季不得不和西蒙斯以及恩比德竞争上场时间和球权。

google_en: This competition may not come quickly. Simmons still needs to adapt to the NBA arena, and Embiid must fully recover from his injuries as soon as possible. However, whether Okafor can have a place in the 76ers' long lineup is still a question.
zh: 这一竞争可能不会来的很快，西蒙斯还需要适应NBA赛场，恩比德也要尽快从伤病中完全恢复，但是奥卡福能否在76人的长人阵中有位置还是个问题。

google_en: Last season, 32% of Okafor's points came from low-post offense, which was higher than Cousins, Vucevic and Brook Lopez. At the same time, his usage rate was also among the top 40 in the league.
zh: 上个赛季，奥卡福32%的得分来自低位进攻，这一比例高于考辛斯、武切维奇和布鲁克·洛佩斯，同时他的使用率也高居联盟前40。

google_en: In the past two seasons, Thompson's usage rate has been stable in the top 20 in the league, and these are also the two best seasons of his career.
zh: 过去两个赛季，汤普森的使用率已经稳定在了联盟前20，而这也是他生涯最出色的两个赛季。

google_en: But the problem is that with the arrival of Durant, Thompson's usage rate will definitely drop, which will inevitably affect his performance.
zh: 不过问题是，随着杜兰特的到来，汤普森的使用率一定会下降，这势必将影响他的发挥。

google_en: With Simmons already showing excellent potential as a point forward and Embiid also having a body that is more suitable for NBA games, Okafor's status may not be so stable anymore.
zh: 随着西蒙斯已经展现了出色的控球前锋潜质，恩比德也拥有着更适合NBA比赛的身材，奥卡福的地位恐怕很难再那么稳固了。

google_en: But this does not mean that Tang Shen's level has declined, it is more like he has made sacrifices for the team as a whole.
zh: 但这并不意味着汤神的水平退步，这更像是他为球队整体做出了牺牲。

google_en: Durant's arrival will definitely shrink the data of the Warriors players, but the one who has shrunk the most is probably Thompson.
zh: 杜兰特的到来一定会让勇士队的球员们数据缩水，但这其中缩水最严重的恐怕就是汤普森了。

google_en: Parker performed better last season than the data reflected, not only because his efficiency at the basket reached a career high, but his chemistry with Aldridge also benefited the Spurs.
zh: 帕克在上个赛季表现得比数据反映的要好些，不仅是因为他的篮下效率来到了生涯最高，他和阿尔德里奇的化学反应也让马刺队受益。

google_en: This impact will not only be the impact of the number of shots, Tang Shen's ball-handling offense will definitely be greatly reduced next season, which in some aspects will also make it easier for opponents to defend him.
zh: 这一影响将不仅是出手次数的影响，汤神的持球进攻在下赛季肯定也会大大减少，这在某些方面也会降低对手对他的防守难度。

google_en: Duncan retired, Ginobili announced another year of fighting, and the GDP combination finally came to an end. As the youngest of the three, there was not much oil left in the French sports car's fuel tank.
zh: 邓肯退役，吉诺比利宣布再战一年，GDP的组合最终也走到了尽头，作为三个人里最年轻的一个，法国跑车的油箱里也没有多少油了。

google_en: After winning the third championship ring, only Kareem Abdul-Jabbar, Jordan and Russell won more regular season MVPs than James, and Jordan was the only person with more FMVPs than James.
zh: 在得到了第三枚总冠军戒指之后，只有贾巴尔、乔丹和拉塞尔比詹姆斯赢得了更多的常规赛MVP，而乔丹是唯一一个FMVP比詹姆斯多的人。

google_en: James, who is entering the 14th season of his career, needs to better ensure his physical strength and prepare for the playoffs.
zh: 来到了职业生涯第14个赛季的詹姆斯需要更好的保证体力，为季后赛做好准备。

google_en: Oh, by the way, James just brought Cleveland its first professional sports championship trophy in the past 52 years.
zh: 哦，对了，詹姆斯刚刚为克利夫兰带来了过去52年里第一座职业体育冠军奖杯。

google_en: On the 12th local time, Huang Jing, chairman of the Moscow Overseas Chinese Federation, said excitedly when seeing a reporter from China News Service.
zh: 当地时间12日，莫斯科华侨华人联合会主席黄静在看到中新网记者时激动的说道。

google_en: "We must carry forward the talents we learned at home in Russia."
zh: “一定要把从国内学到的才艺在俄罗斯发扬开来”。

google_en: Therefore, in the regular season, James' data is likely to decline further, and he will assign more burdens to Irving, but he will still easily become the top three players in the league.
zh: 因此，在常规赛里，詹姆斯的数据很可能进一步下滑，他会把更多的重担分给欧文来承担，不过他仍然会轻松地成为联盟前三的球员。

google_en: Not long ago, she participated in the "Chinese Talents (Calligraphy, Painting) Training Course for Overseas Chinese Cultural Societies" sponsored by the Overseas Chinese Affairs Office of the State Council of China and hosted by Jinan University.
zh: 前不久，她在国内参加了由中国国务院侨务办公室主办、暨南大学承办的“海外华人文化社团中华才艺(书法、绘画)培训班”。

google_en: When I first participated in the training class, I had no idea where to start with calligraphy and painting. As a result, after the training class, I was able to draw and write my own works.
zh: 刚刚参加培训班时，自己对于书画完全不知道从哪里下手，结果在培训班结束后，已经能画出和写出自己的作品。

google_en: After returning to Moscow, I must use the knowledge and skills I have learned to make my own contribution to the spread and promotion of Chinese culture.
zh: 自己回莫斯科后，一定要用所学到的知识和技能，为中华文化的传播和弘扬作出自己的贡献。

google_en: She said that she had made great progress with the help of the teachers in the training class, and at the same time she felt the important responsibility of being an "overseas disseminator of Chinese culture."
zh: 她说，自己在培训班老师的帮助下进步非常大，同时也感受到了作为“中华文化海外传播者”的重任。

google_en: Na Yanwei, Secretary General of the Russian Association for the Promotion of Chinese Culture, who also participated in this training course, also felt the same way.
zh: 同时参加这一培训班的俄罗斯中华文化促进会秘书长那延伟也有相同感觉。

google_en: Na Yanwei said that after returning to Russia, he will spread and promote traditional Chinese culture among Chinese and Russians who love Chinese culture.
zh: 那延伟说，自己回俄后定要把中华传统文化在华人和热爱中国文化的俄罗斯人中间传播和弘扬下去。

google_en: Today at 19:35, in the first match of the 22nd round of the Chinese Super League, Chongqing Lifan challenged Beijing Guoan away from home.
zh: 今日19点35分，在中超第22轮率先开打的一场比赛中，重庆力帆客场挑战北京国安。

google_en: In the 29th minute, Wang Dong scored a penalty kick. In the 39th minute, new aid Caldek scored his first goal in the Super League with the assist of Fernando. In the 81st minute, Guoan got a goal back.
zh: 第29分钟，王栋操刀点球破门，第39分钟，新援卡尔德克在费尔南多助攻下收获中超首球，第81分钟，国安扳回一球。

google_en: In the 15th minute, Zhang Xizhe made a straight pass from midfield. Yilmaz had already rushed into the penalty area. Liu Yu, who was defending alone, took the lead and destroyed the ball.
zh: 第15分钟，张稀哲中场直线挑传，伊尔马兹已直冲禁区，单兵防守的刘宇抢先出脚将球破坏。

google_en: After 10 minutes of the game, Lifan made consecutive corner kick opportunities. Fernando's volley from a small angle was blocked by the Guoan defense.
zh: 比赛进行10分钟后，力帆连续冲击中连获角球机会，费尔南多小角度抽射被国安防线挡出底线。

google_en: One minute later, Park Cheng made a pass from the left. Yu Dabao fired a shot from the middle of the penalty area but missed the target. Lifan goalkeeper Deng Xiaofei confiscated the ball.
zh: 1分钟后朴成在左路前插传中，于大宝禁区中路扫射未踢正部位，力帆门将邓小飞将球没收。

google_en: Guoan made substitutions in the 37th minute. Zhang Xiaobin came off the field and Zhang Chiming came on to rebel against the old team.
zh: 国安在第37分钟就进行换人调整，张晓彬下场，张池明登场反戈旧主。

google_en: Caldeke got rid of the ball in front of the penalty area. Fernando made a low pass from the left side of the penalty area. Caldeke took advantage of the situation and scored.
zh: 卡尔德克禁区前摆脱分球，费尔南多禁区左侧低平球传中，卡尔德克顺势推射破门。

google_en: Fernando made a one-on-one play on the right and suddenly passed the ball in front of the goal. When Kaldek came forward to respond, he was knocked down by Lei Tenglong. The referee awarded a penalty kick and showed Lei Tenglong a yellow card.
zh: 费尔南多右路一对二回带后突然挑传门前，卡尔德克前插接应时被雷腾龙飞扑动作放倒，裁判判定点球，并向雷腾龙出示黄牌。

google_en: This was also Caldec's first goal in the Chinese Super League, giving Lifan a 2:0 lead.
zh: 这也是卡尔德克在中超首发的赛事中就取得入球，力帆2:0领先。

google_en: At the beginning of the second half, Fernando won a free kick on the right side with a forced breakthrough, but unfortunately the shot went high from a small angle.
zh: 下半场刚刚开场费尔南多就以强行突破赢得右侧任意球，可惜小角度攻门打高。

google_en: After Deng Xiaofei was judged to be delaying and received a yellow card, substitute Peng Xinli also received a yellow card for a foul in front of the penalty area.
zh: 在邓小飞被判定拖延时间领到黄牌后，替补出场的彭欣力因禁区前犯规也领到黄牌。

google_en: In the 56th minute, Zhang Chiming cut in from the left and cooperated with Zhang Xizhe, but his curve ball was blocked by Deng Xiaofei.
zh: 第56分钟，张池明左路内切中与张稀哲传递配合，其弧线球攻门被邓小飞挡出。

google_en: Liu Yu tackled Klimets fiercely in front of the penalty area. He and the emotional Wang Dong received yellow cards one after another.
zh: 刘宇禁区前凶狠铲抢侵犯克里梅茨，他与情绪激动的王栋相继领到黄牌。

google_en: In the 63rd minute, Fernando was directly knocked over by Klimets while running from the right. Fernando was very dissatisfied with Klimets' actions, and Klimets received a yellow card.
zh: 第63分钟，费尔南多右路奔袭时被克里梅茨直接撞翻，费尔南多对克里梅茨的动作非常不满，克里梅茨领到黄牌。

google_en: One minute later, Fernando once again showed his ability to run on the right, and Yu Dabao also received a yellow card for a pursuit foul.
zh: 1分钟后费尔南多再度在右路展示奔袭能力，于大宝追防犯规也领到黄牌。

google_en: In the 86th minute, Zhou Ting sent a cross from the right. Sergeyev stopped the ball on his chest in the middle of the penalty area and then shot. Deng Xiaofei once again blocked the ball with a wonderful save.
zh: 第86分钟，周挺右路送出传中，谢尔盖耶夫在禁区中路胸部停球后顺势施射，邓小飞再次以精彩扑救将球封出。

google_en: Yilmaz forced a breakthrough inside the penalty area and fell to the ground when Zheng Yourong stretched his legs to intercept. The referee awarded a penalty kick. Yilmaz scored the goal, Lifan 2:1 Guoan.
zh: 伊尔马兹禁区线内强行突破，在郑又荣伸腿拦截动作下倒地，裁判判定点球，伊尔马兹操刀破门，力帆2:1国安。

google_en: After 4 minutes of stoppage time, Lifan maintained the 2-1 score until the end and defeated Guoan away from home.
zh: 4分钟补时过后，力帆将2-1的比分保持到终场，于客场战胜国安。

google_en: Lehmann will serve as an expert for the Bundesliga's Asian media partners and participate in various local fan events.
zh: 莱曼届时将作为德甲亚洲媒体合作伙伴的专家，参加当地各种球迷活动。

google_en: After scoring these precious 3 points, Lifan currently has 27 points, temporarily ranking 10th in the standings.
zh: 拿下这宝贵的3分之后，目前力帆的积分达到27分，暂居积分榜第10位。

google_en: This event will span two continents and cover four top cities. They will work with fans everywhere to build momentum for the new season.
zh: 本次活动将横跨两个大洲、覆盖四座顶级城市，他们将在各地和球迷们一起为新赛季预热造势。

google_en: According to reports, this autumn, Bundesliga ambassadors Lehmann and Matthäus will represent the Bundesliga in Asia and the Americas to embark on legendary tours, kicking off the opening of the 2016/17 Bundesliga season.
zh: 据介绍，今年秋季，德甲联赛形象大使莱曼和马特乌斯将代表德甲在亚洲和美洲陆续展开传奇之旅，为2016/17赛季德甲的开幕打响前哨。

google_en: The Bundesliga is known as one of the five major European leagues (Premier League, La Liga, Serie A, Bundesliga, Ligue 1) and is the undisputed flagship event of the German sports community in the kingdom of football.
zh: 德甲联赛被誉为欧洲五大联赛(英超、西甲、意甲、德甲、法甲)之一，是足球王国德国体育界当仁不让的旗舰赛事。

google_en: As one of the most powerful leagues in the world, the Bundesliga attracted approximately 13.3 million spectators to the stadium in the 2014-2015 season alone.
zh: 作为全球最具实力的联赛之一，德甲仅2014-2015赛季就吸引了约1330万名观众来到球场观战。

google_en: Representatives of the Bundesliga giants, Bayern Munich and Borussia Dortmund, and famous stars Thomas Muller, Lahm, Gotze, etc. are all household names in China.
zh: 德甲豪门的代表拜仁慕尼黑、多特蒙德和著名球星托马斯·穆勒、拉姆、格策等在中国可谓家喻户晓。

google_en: In conjunction with the Bundesliga's previously launched Chinese platforms of Weibo, Youku and WeChat, the Bundesliga hopes to provide Chinese fans with broader, timely and convenient channels to obtain the latest news about the league.
zh: 配合此前德甲已上线的微博、优酷和微信中文平台，德甲方面寄望为中国球迷提供更广泛和及时便捷的渠道，获取该联赛的最新消息。

google_en: Unfortunately, OPEC's latest monthly report showed that crude oil production continued to increase in July, and Saudi Arabia's production reached a new high.
zh: 可惜，OPEC最新月报显示出7月原油产量继续增加，沙特产量更创下新高。

google_en: This report cannot help but cast doubt on the credibility of OPEC in the market. The road to oil price recovery may still be full of thorns.
zh: 这份报告不禁令市场对OPEC的信誉产生怀疑，油价复苏的道路恐怕仍然布满荆棘。

google_en: OPEC's monthly report released on Wednesday showed that the output of the entire OPEC organization, including Gabon, rose by 46,000 barrels per day in July to 33.11 million barrels per day.
zh: OPEC周三公布的月报显示，包括加蓬在内的整个OPEC组织7月产量上升4.6万桶/日，至3311万桶/日。

google_en: On Monday, OPEC Rotating Chairman and Qatar Energy Minister Saada said that OPEC will hold an informal meeting during the International Energy Forum from September 26 to 28.
zh: 本周一，OPEC轮值主席兼卡塔尔能源大臣萨达表示，OPEC将在9月26-28日的国际能源论坛期间举行非正式会议。

google_en: OPEC also said in its monthly report that low crude oil prices have prompted global refiners to produce more refined oil products, thereby exacerbating the market's oversupply.
zh: OPEC还在月报中表示，原油价格低廉已促使全球炼油商生产更多精炼油品，从而加重了市场供应过剩的程度。

google_en: Affected by this news, coupled with the U.S. raising its crude oil production forecast and an unexpected increase in crude oil inventories, international oil prices closed down for two consecutive days.
zh: 受此消息影响，再加上美国上调原油产量预期和原油库存意外增加，国际油价连续两日收跌。

google_en: As of Wednesday's close, the price of light crude oil futures for September delivery on the New York Mercantile Exchange fell by 2.48%, and the price of London Brent crude oil futures for October delivery fell by 2.07%.
zh: 截至周三收盘，纽约商品交易所9月交货的轻质原油期货价格下跌2.48%，10月交货的伦敦布伦特原油期货价格下跌2.07%。

google_en: Reuters believes that the proposed meeting of oil-producing countries is unlikely to significantly tighten supply, and data released by the U.S. Energy Information Administration also suppressed market sentiment.
zh: 路透社认为，提议召开的产油国会议不太可能令供应明显收紧，美国能源信息署公布的数据也打压市场人气。

google_en: Iran's official news agency Fars quoted Iranian Oil Minister Zanganeh as saying on Wednesday that Iran's daily crude oil production peaked at 3.85 million barrels, the highest level since 2008.
zh: 伊朗官方通讯社Fars周三援引伊朗石油部长赞加内的发言称，伊朗的日原油产量最高为385万桶，这是2008年以来的最高水平。

google_en: The last time oil-producing countries met was in April, OPEC members failed to reach an agreement on any measures.
zh: 上次产油国召开会议已经是4月份的事情，OPEC成员国未能就任何措施达成协议。

google_en: As soon as the news of the meeting came out, Russian Energy Minister Novak said that there was no need for a new round of production freeze negotiations under the current oil prices.
zh: 召开会议的消息刚出，俄罗斯能源部长诺瓦克就表示，当前油价下没有进行新一轮冻产谈判的必要。

google_en: Emma Richards, an oil and gas analyst at BMIResearch, said the market and media may be overreacting to the upcoming OPEC meeting.
zh: BMIResearch石油与天然气分析师理查兹（Emma Richards）表示，市场和媒体可能对OPEC将召开的会议反应过度。

google_en: Helima Croft, head of commodity strategy at Royal Bank of Canada, said OPEC changes market sentiment by sending signals that they will broker an agreement.
zh: 加拿大皇家银行大宗商品策略主管克罗夫特（Helima Croft）表示，OPEC通过释放他们将促成协议的信号来改变市场的情绪。

google_en: This method is like smoke and mirrors to distract people's attention (deliberately giving a wrong impression).
zh: 这个手段就像是引开人视线的烟雾与镜子（故意给人错误印象）。

google_en: This is likely to further undermine the market's confidence in OPEC. After all, this organization has staged a "crying wolf" event.
zh: 这很可能进一步破坏市场对OPEC的信心，毕竟这个组织上演过一次“狼来了”。

google_en: Eugen Weinberg, head of commodities research at Commerzbank, said people think the possibility of OPEC trying to stabilize the market through its September meeting is low.
zh: 德国商业银行大宗商品研究主管温伯格（Eugen Weinberg）称，人们认为OPEC试图通过9月会议稳定市场的可能性很低。

google_en: All localities should focus on random inspections of medical institutions that publish medical advertisements in violation of regulations, have concentrated complaints and reports, and have been punished many times in the past.
zh: 各地要将违规发布医疗广告、投诉举报集中、既往被多次处罚的医疗机构作为抽查重点。

google_en: The National Health and Family Planning Commission and the State Administration of Traditional Chinese Medicine will organize and supervise the implementation of special supervision and inspection work in some provinces in due course.
zh: 国家卫生计生委、国家中医药管理局将适时组织对部分省份专项监督检查工作开展情况进行督查。

google_en: According to media disclosures, due to the previous large-scale influx of capital into Internet medicine, the current problem of product homogeneity is serious, the investment boom has gradually subsided, and capital has entered a wait-and-see period.
zh: 据媒体披露，由于此前资本大规模涌入互联网医药，造成目前产品同质化的问题严重，投资热潮渐退，资本进入观望期。

google_en: However, while most Internet medical companies are struggling to obtain Series A or Series B financing, there are several leading companies in the field that are still able to receive capital support.
zh: 然而，就在大部分互联网医疗企业挣扎在A轮或B轮的融资路上的时候，有几家细分领域领先企业仍能获得资本热捧。

google_en: According to data from the Hong Kong Alibaba Hospital Management Research Center, a large number of Internet medical companies have died within one year of their establishment, and about 20% of start-up Internet medical companies have ceased to exist.
zh: 另据香港艾力彼医院管理研究中心数据显示，创业一年内的互联网医疗公司大量死亡，约20%的初创互联网医疗企业已不复存在。

google_en: It seems that Internet medical entrepreneurship must not be a "swarm of bees", but must accurately identify the market demand and be dedicated to specializing in depth.
zh: 看来，互联网医疗创业断不可“一窝蜂”，而是要看准市场需求，沉得下心做专，做深。

google_en: Yuyue invested 12 million yuan, accounting for 40% of the registered capital, and Jiuzhoutong Equipment Company invested 18 million yuan, accounting for 60% of the registered capital.
zh: 鱼跃出资1200.00万元，占注册资本的40%，九州通器械公司出资1800.00万元，占注册资本的60%。

google_en: In recent years, with the country's policy support in medical informatization, electronic and integrated supply chain management systems have gradually entered hospitals at all levels.
zh: 近年来，随着国家在医疗信息化方面的政策支持，电子化、集成化的供应链管理系统逐步进入各级医院。

google_en: This cooperation between Yuyue and Jiuzhoutong is aimed at market demand, helping hospitals build advanced supply chain management systems, and taking this opportunity to seek more cooperation.
zh: 此次鱼跃与九州通的合作正是瞄准了市场的需求，帮助医院搭建先进供应链管理系统，并以此为契机谋求更多合作。

google_en: Unlike many Internet medical companies that are greedy for everything, iBaby has focused on the vertical field of Internet obstetrics from the beginning, deeply cultivating both pregnant mothers and doctors.
zh: 与很多互联网医疗公司贪大求全不同，iBaby从最初就专注于互联网产科垂直领域，深耕孕妈和医生两端。

google_en: Pregnant mothers can not only receive free 24-hour and one-to-one consultation with competent doctors, but also pay for targeted medical consultation.
zh: 孕妈不仅可以免费24小时和一对一的主管医生问诊，还可以付费定向寻医问诊。

google_en: On the doctor side, iBaby breaks geographical restrictions by organizing experts to conduct micro-lectures such as online lectures, peer exchanges, and case discussions for grassroots doctors.
zh: 而在医生端，iBaby通过采取组织专家给基层医生开展在线讲座、同行交流、病例讨论等微讲座的形式，打破地域限制。

google_en: Currently, there are three sections on the doctor's side, namely doctor continuing education, doctor social interaction and doctor help-seeking.
zh: 目前医生端开设三个板块，分别为医生继续教育、医生社交和医生求助。

google_en: Provide services including online learning, case discussions, academic exchanges; social platforms between doctors in the same hospital and departments; legal aid, entrepreneurship support and other services needed for doctor-patient relationships or personal life.
zh: 提供包括在线学习、病例讨论、学术交流；同医院、同科室医生之间社交平台；医患关系或个人生活所需要的法律援助、创业支持等服务内容。

google_en: According to media reports, CEO Wang Lei recently stated that Alibaba Health is “willing to work hard” to acquire health big data.
zh: 据媒体报道，CEO王磊近日表示阿里健康“愿意沉下心来”拿下健康大数据。

google_en: Internet companies and data companies lack professionalism and cannot achieve uniformity in writing methods on the same entry.
zh: 互联网公司、数据公司缺少专业性，在同一词条上的书写方法上都达不到统一。

google_en: Alibaba's current layout in the medical and health field is divided into three areas, namely Alibaba Health, Tmall Medical Center and Alipay Future Hospital.
zh: 阿里目前在医疗健康领域的布局分为三块，分别是阿里健康、天猫医药馆和支付宝未来医院。

google_en: Wang Lei admitted that starting a business in medical and health care will be more difficult than in other industries. "It's not just about how much money you have, but also about being calm and able to endure loneliness and do it slowly."
zh: 王磊坦言，医疗健康创业会比其他行业要难，“这不仅仅是有多少钱的事情，还要沉得下心，耐得住寂寞慢慢去做。”

google_en: The Brazilian Olympic Games are in full swing, and even though it is midnight in China when the games are broadcast, many citizens will stay up late to watch.
zh: 巴西奥运会赛事正如火如荼地进行，即便赛事播出时在国内是半夜时分，很多市民也会熬夜观看。

google_en: In this regard, doctors specifically remind you that staying up late to watch games has health risks and may cause cardiovascular disease.
zh: 对此，医生特别提醒，熬夜看赛事存在健康隐患，有可能引发心血管疾病。

google_en: Staying up late to watch Olympic games can easily damage your heart
zh: 连续熬夜看奥运赛事容易损伤心脏

google_en: Han Zhiyuan specifically reminded that people with cardiovascular risk factors such as high blood pressure, high blood sugar, high blood lipids, smoking habits, family history, etc., will be more likely to develop cardiovascular disease if they stay up late.
zh: 韩志远特别提醒，有高血压、高血糖、高血脂、吸烟习惯、家族病史等心血管危险因素的群体，如果熬夜，会更容易引发心血管疾病。

google_en: If you stay up late for a long time, this hormone will still be secreted in large amounts, and the human body will continue to be in a state of tension and excitement, unable to recover normally, which can easily cause vasoconstriction, increase blood pressure, and thus cause cardiovascular disease.
zh: 如果长时间熬夜，该激素仍会大量分泌，人体会持续处于紧张兴奋的状态，无法得到正常的恢复，容易引起血管收缩、血压升高，从而引起心血管疾病。

google_en: For elderly friends, Han Zhiyuan suggested that they try not to stay up late to watch Olympic games, especially those with a history of cardiovascular disease.
zh: 对于老年朋友，韩志远建议，尽量不要为了看奥运比赛而熬夜，特别是有心血管疾病史的群体。

google_en: If you stay up late for a long time, not only your cardiovascular function will be affected, but your gastrointestinal function, immune system, and neuroendocrine system will also be affected, and your risk of cancer will even increase.
zh: 如果长期熬夜，不仅心血管功能受影响，而且胃肠功能、免疫系统、神经内分泌系统都会受影响，甚至罹患肿瘤的风险也会增大。

google_en: During the last "World Cup" football match, Han Zhiyuan received a patient in his 60s. The cause of his myocardial infarction may be related to staying up late to watch the game.
zh: 在上届“世界杯”足球赛期间，韩志远曾接诊过一名60多岁的患者，其心肌梗塞的引发或与熬夜看比赛有关。

google_en: Han Zhiyuan said that since this year, his department has treated some patients with myocardial infarction or stroke around the age of 25. This is largely caused by the patient's long-term lifestyle of staying up late.
zh: 韩志远介绍，今年以来，其科室已接诊了一些25岁左右的心肌梗塞或者脑中风患者，这很大程度上是患者长期熬夜的生活方式造成的。

google_en: 1. Don’t stay up late every day. Occasionally stay up late to watch your favorite sports. For other sports, you might as well wait until the next day to watch the replay of the event.
zh: 1.不要每天都熬夜，偶尔熬夜观看最喜欢的体育项目，其他项目不妨等第二天看赛事重播。

google_en: Beijing time on August 12th, after the women's 50-meter rifle three-position final at the 2016 Rio Olympics, Chinese veteran Du Li won the bronze medal.
zh: 北京时间8月12日消息，2016年里约奥运会女子50米步枪三种姿势决赛战罢，中国老将杜丽获得铜牌。

google_en: 2. When staying up late, replenish water in a timely manner and eat more fruits to prevent blood vessel blockage and enhance the body's immunity.
zh: 2.熬夜时适时补充水分，多吃水果，可预防血管堵塞、增强机体免疫力。

google_en: Du Li became a veteran of four Olympic dynasties and won a total of 2 gold medals, 1 silver medal and 1 bronze medal in 4 Olympic Games.
zh: 杜丽成为奥运四朝元老，4次奥运共拿下2金1银1铜四块奖牌。

google_en: In 1998, he joined the Shandong Provincial Shooting Team and followed coach Wang Dewen for professional shooting training.
zh: 1998年，进入山东省射击队，跟随王德文教练进行专业的射击训练。

google_en: In June 2003, she participated in the women's 10-meter air rifle gold medal in the Croatian Shooting World Cup and broke the world record with a ring of 504.9.
zh: 2003年6月，参加射击世界杯克罗地亚站女子10米气步枪金牌并以504.9环打破世界纪录。

google_en: In August 2008, he broke the Olympic record and won the gold medal in the 50-meter sports rifle three-position competition with a total score of 690.3.
zh: 2008年8月，在50米运动步枪三姿的比赛中以总成绩690.3环破奥运会纪录夺得金牌。

google_en: In August 2004, she won the gold medal in the women's 10-meter air rifle, becoming the Chinese team's first gold medal at the Athens Olympics.
zh: 2004年8月，获得女子10米气步枪金牌，为中国代表队在雅典奥运会夺得首金。

google_en: In January 2015, Du Li announced that she would return to the national team and start training to prepare for the Rio Olympics.
zh: 2015年1月，杜丽宣布重回国家队开始训练，备战里约奥运。

google_en: In August 2012, after failing to win the London Olympics, Du Li applied for temporary retirement from the International Shooting Federation.
zh: 2012年8月，折戟伦敦奥运会后，杜丽向国际射联申报了暂时退役申请。

google_en: In March 2016, the Rio Olympic trials ended, and she once again qualified for the women's 10-meter air rifle Olympics after 8 years.
zh: 2016年3月，里约奥运选拔赛结束，时隔8年再次获得女子10米气步枪奥运会参赛资格。

google_en: On August 6, 2016, in the women's ten-meter air rifle event at the Rio Olympics, Du Li won the silver medal with a score of 207 rings.
zh: 2016年8月6日，在里约奥运会女子十米气步枪赛事中，杜丽以207环的成绩获得银牌。

google_en: On August 12, 2016, she won the bronze medal in the women's 50-meter rifle three-position competition at the Rio Olympics.
zh: 2016年8月12日，在里约奥运会女子50米步枪三种姿势比赛中，获得铜牌。

google_en: The film is expected to premiere on CCTV and LeTV early next year, and will also launch a VR panoramic documentary version for the first time.
zh: 该片预计于明年初在中央电视台和乐视首播，还将首次推出VR全景纪实版。

google_en: The biggest advantage of VR works is that it gives the audience a unique sense of "immersion" in watching movies, which also puts higher requirements on the shooting process.
zh: VR作品的最大优势是令观众具有独一无二的观影“沉浸”感，而这也对拍摄过程提出了更高要求。

google_en: The documentary "Polar" is a large-scale work focusing on the Qinghai-Tibet Plateau, the third pole of the earth. It tells the story of the integration of Tibetan tradition and modernity and the interaction between Tibet and the world from a new perspective.
zh: 纪录片《极地》是一部聚焦地球第三极青藏高原的大型作品，以全新视角讲述藏地传统与现代交融以及西藏与世界互动的故事。

google_en: On August 11, the Yantai Detachment of the Shandong Armed Police Corps organized special operations snipers to brave the high temperature of 34 degrees Celsius to Kunyu Mountain to conduct jungle training.
zh: 8月11日，武警山东总队烟台支队组织特战狙击手冒着34摄氏度的高温来到昆嵛山开展丛林训练。

google_en: The filming team of the "Polar" Panoramic VR Special Edition stated that they want to ensure that the images in every direction are impeccable and give the audience an immersive feeling.
zh: 《极地》全景VR特别版的摄制团队表示，他们要确保每一个方位的画面都无可挑剔，让观众有身临其境之感。

google_en: This incident is regarded as the peak of the Cold War and is known as the "Cuban Missile Crisis" in history.
zh: 这一事件被看做冷战的顶峰，史称“古巴导弹危机”。

google_en: During the Cold War, the Soviet Union transported missiles into Cuba, which almost led to a nuclear war between the United States and the Soviet Union.
zh: 冷战期间，苏联把导弹运进古巴，差点导致美苏发生核战争。

google_en: But what is less known is that also during the Cold War, a strong solar storm almost caused the United States to launch a nuclear war against the Soviet Union. This event was not announced to the public for the first time until August 9 by researchers.
zh: 但鲜为人知的是，同样是冷战期间，一场强烈的太阳风暴也曾险些导致美国对苏联发动核战争，这一事件直到8月9日才首次由研究人员对外公布。

google_en: On May 23, 1967, a severe solar storm caused severe interference to the U.S. military's radar and radio communications in the Arctic.
zh: 1967年5月23日，一场强烈的太阳风暴对美国军方位于北极的雷达与无线电通信造成强烈干扰。

google_en: These radars were part of the U.S. ballistic missile warning system and were used to monitor Soviet missiles.
zh: 这些雷达是美国弹道导弹预警系统的一部分，用于监测苏联的导弹。

google_en: This paper, written by researchers at the University of Colorado, interviewed U.S. military personnel who were involved in forecasting and analyzing solar activity at the time, and reviewed unclassified literature.
zh: 这篇由美国科罗拉多大学研究人员完成的论文采访了当时参与预报与分析太阳活动的美军方人员，并查阅了非保密文献。

google_en: The paper writes that in the 1960s, in order to prevent the Soviet Union from suddenly launching a nuclear war, the U.S. Air Force always had some fighter planes carrying nuclear warheads flying in the sky.
zh: 论文写道，上世纪60年代，为防止苏联突然发动核战争，美国空军始终有一部分载有核弹头的战机飞在天上。

google_en: The U.S. military commander did not know that the culprit of this interference was the solar storm and not the Soviet Union, so he ordered the fighter planes to enter combat readiness.
zh: 美军军方指挥官不知道这次干扰的罪魁祸首是太阳风暴而非苏联，于是下令使战机进入战斗准备状态。

google_en: Fortunately, the U.S. military's research on solar activity and its electromagnetic interference with the earth, which began in the late 1950s, finally prevented this potential military conflict.
zh: 幸运的是，美国军方从上世纪50年代末就开始的太阳活动及其对地球电磁干扰的研究，最终阻止了这场潜在的军事冲突。

google_en: Later, he compiled a detailed report based on information provided by the U.S. Air Force Aviation Weather Service.
zh: 稍后，他汇总美国空军航空气象处提供的信息，提交了一份详细报告。

google_en: As a direct consequence of this solar storm, the U.S. military has since regarded space weather as an operational concern and established a more powerful space weather forecasting system.
zh: 这场太阳风暴的直接后果是，美国军方从此把空间天气视为一项作战关切，并建立了一个更强大的空间天气预报系统。

google_en: During daily travel, citizens find that their cars are blocked by strange vehicles. If they cannot contact the driver of the strange vehicle, they can use the "WeChat Move Car" function to solve this problem.
zh: 市民在日常出行中，发现爱车被陌生车辆阻碍了，在联系不上陌生车辆司机的情况下，可以使用“微信挪车”功能解决这一困扰。

google_en: After the launch of this service, in daily life, if citizens encounter strange vehicles that hinder the movement of their vehicles without the driver being present, they can use the "WeChat Move Car" function to solve such problems.
zh: 这项服务推出后，日常生活中，市民如遇陌生车辆在驾驶人不在现场的情况下阻碍自己车辆行驶时，就可通过使用“微信挪车”功能解决此类问题。

google_en: The first function of this new service is to be fast and save administrative costs; the second function is to respect and protect the personal privacy of citizens; the third function is to provide all-weather and all-time services.
zh: 这个新服务功能一是快捷，节省行政成本；二是尊重、保护公民个人隐私；三是全天候、全时段服务。

google_en: As long as citizens have WeChat, they can operate it on their own very conveniently. This method can relatively enable both parties to move the car to "meet" in a friendly and easy manner, alleviate the problem of parking difficulties, and reduce the occurrence of car-related security cases.
zh: 只要市民有微信，就可以非常便捷地自行操作，这种方式相对能使移车双方都能比较友好轻松地“相遇”，缓解停车难问题，并可减少涉车的治安案件发生。

google_en: Starting from August 11, the Xi'an Traffic Police WeChat service account "Xi'an Traffic Police" launched the "WeChat Car Moving" service.
zh: 8月11日起，西安交警微信服务号“西安交警”推出“微信挪车”服务。

google_en: On the other hand, for car owners who refuse to move their cars, park illegally or obstruct traffic, the Xi'an traffic control department stated that the traffic police will take different measures based on the actual situation and deal with them as appropriate.
zh: 另一方面，对于拒不移车、违法停放或妨害通行的车主，西安交管部门表示，交警届时将会根据实际情况采取不同的处置措施，视情况给予处理。

google_en: On August 9, at the cultural tourist attraction of Dihua Ancient Town in Danfeng County, more than 10 young employees of Shangluo Power Supply Company came here to carry out the "Meet the Ancient Town and Love the Electric Power" and our festival-Chinese Valentine's Day themed activities.
zh: 8月9日，在丹凤县棣花古镇文化旅游景区，商洛供电公司10余名青年职工来到这里开展“相约古镇情满电力”暨我们的节日·七夕主题活动。

google_en: "This time the company has provided us with such a relaxed, happy and harmonious platform. I like it very much. It is meaningful and interesting."
zh: “这次公司为我们提供了这样一个轻松、快乐、和谐的平台，我非常喜欢，有意义又不失趣味。”

google_en: Danfeng County Company of Shangluo Power Supply Company, in conjunction with the construction of spiritual civilization, actively organized and carried out the "Meet the Ancient Town and Love the Power" and our festival, Chinese Valentine's Day themed activities.
zh: 商洛供电公司丹凤县公司结合精神文明建设工作，积极组织开展“相约古镇情满电力”暨我们的节日·七夕主题活动。

google_en: A company employee who participated in the event said: "I usually spend my main energy on work and study, and I lack time and platform to communicate with colleagues and friends."
zh: 参加活动的公司职工表示：“自己平时主要精力都用在工作和学习上，缺少时间和平台去和同事、朋友交流。”

google_en: The much-watched Beijing Olympic men's singles champion and Spanish superstar Nadal defeated his opponent in straight sets in the men's singles match that day and advanced to the quarterfinals. The men's doubles match also advanced to the finals.
zh: 备受关注的北京奥运会男单冠军、西班牙巨星纳达尔当日在男单比赛中直落两盘战胜对手晋级八强，男双比赛也晋级决赛。

google_en: The Chinese Valentine's Day activity was widely praised by the young employees on site, and they all hope that the company will hold more such activities in the future to strengthen communication and exchanges with more other young people.
zh: 七夕活动受到了现场青年职工们的广泛好评，纷纷希望该公司以后多举办这样的活动，与更多其他的青年加强沟通与交流。

google_en: As a Golden Slam winner, Nadal has a special liking for the Olympic Games. Although he has not recovered from his injury, he has made great achievements in this three-line attack.
zh: 作为金满贯得主的纳达尔，对奥运会情有独钟，伤未痊愈的他，此次三线出击，斩获颇丰。

google_en: The women's singles event of the Rio Olympics suffered a number of seed players withdrawing. After several days of fierce competition, the top four women's singles were all selected on the 11th.
zh: 里约奥运会女单项目遭遇到多名种子选手退赛，经过几天激烈的争夺，女单四强１１日全部产生。

google_en: He and teammate Lopez will compete for the gold medal in the men's doubles final against Romania's Tekau and Meguia.
zh: 他和队友洛佩兹将在男双决赛中与罗马尼亚选手特卡乌和梅格亚争夺金牌。

google_en: Kvitova will compete with Puig for a ticket to the final, while the other final seat will be between Keys and Kerber.
zh: 科维托娃将与普伊格争夺一张决赛的入场券，而另外一个决赛席位将在凯斯和科贝尔之间产生。

google_en: On April 27, 2015, the United States and Japan jointly issued a new version of the "U.S.-Japan Defense Cooperation Guidelines" in New York, allowing the Japanese armed forces to play a more offensive role around the world.
zh: 2015年4月27日，美国和日本在纽约联合发表新版《美日防卫合作指针》，允许日本武装力量在全球扮演更具进攻性的角色。

google_en: The semi-finals of the women's doubles competition have also been produced. The semi-final matches are: Hingis/Basinski vs. Hradka/Hlavakova; Makarova/Vesnina vs. Strycova/Safarova.
zh: 女双比赛的四强也全部产生，半决赛的对阵分别是：辛吉斯／巴辛斯基对赫拉德卡／赫拉瓦科娃；马卡洛娃／维斯尼娜对斯特里科娃／萨法洛娃。

google_en: The mixed doubles match held on this day also determined the quarterfinals. However, the loss of the top-seeded combination of Mahu/Garcia and the withdrawal of Natto made the mixed doubles match slightly eclipsed.
zh: 这一天进行的混双比赛也决出了八强，不过头号种子马胡／加西亚组合的落马，以及纳豆组合的退赛，令混双比赛略有些失色。

google_en: This is the fifth time a Chinese private think tank has published a Japanese military power assessment report, and the fourth time it has released an English version.
zh: 这是中国民间智库第五次发表日本军力评估报告，也是第四次推出英文版。

google_en: This is the day when US Secretary of Defense Carter, US Secretary of State Kerry, Japanese Foreign Minister Fumio Kishida and Japanese Defense Minister Gen Nakatani attended a press conference in New York.
zh: 这是当日美国国防部长卡特、美国国务卿克里、日本外务大臣岸田文雄和日本防卫大臣中谷元在纽约出席新闻发布会。

google_en: The report stated that 2015 was the final year of the Abe administration’s major policy adjustments in the security field for several consecutive years.
zh: 报告称，2015年是安倍政府在安全领域连续数年推进重大政策调整的阶段性收官之年。

google_en: The report is divided into nine chapters, including overall policy adjustments, military strength, defense budget, military deployment, weapons and equipment, institutional reform, military training exercises, foreign military security cooperation, military security relations with China, etc.
zh: 报告分9章，包括总体政策调整、军事实力、国防预算、军事部署、武器装备、体制编制改革、军事训演、对外军事安全合作、对华军事安全关系等内容。

google_en: From now on, Japan's measures in the security field will mainly be at the operational level such as the application of the legal system, strategic implementation, and policy implementation, rather than major adjustments and changes in frameworks, mechanisms, and policies.
zh: 此后，日本在安全领域的举措将主要是在法制运用、战略贯彻、政策落实等操作层面，而不是框架、机制和政策的大幅调整和变动。

google_en: The report emphasizes that the Abe cabinet is trying to make breakthroughs in the above three points to achieve the multiple goals of promoting Japan's "normal nationalization", the Self-Defense Forces going out to intervene in international security affairs, strengthening the Japan-US alliance, and preventing and containing China.
zh: 报告强调，安倍内阁试图通过以上三点突破，达到推动日本“正常国家化”、自卫队走出去介入国际安全事务、强化日美同盟、防华制华的多重目的。

google_en: Previously, the China Strategic Culture Promotion Association released Japanese military strength assessment reports on June 5, 2012, July 19, 2013, July 23, 2014, and June 30, 2015.
zh: 此前，中国战略文化促进会先后于2012年6月5日、2013年7月19日、2014年7月23日、2015年6月30日发布过日本军力评估报告。

google_en: On August 12, the British "Financial Times" published a set of photos of the residence of the US Ambassador to China.
zh: 英国《金融时报》8月12日发布了一组美国驻华大使官邸的图集。

google_en: In contrast, the US ambassador's residence looks like it could be used as a safe house in the next film adaptation of John Le Carré's Cold War spy novel.
zh: 文章称，与之形成对比的是，美国大使官邸从外观来看，完全可以在下一部改编自约翰勒卡雷冷战间谍小说的电影中作为安全屋。

google_en: The official residence is gray and heavily defended with perimeter fences, a second interior wall, barbed wire and vehicle barricades.
zh: 官邸是灰色的，并用外围防护栏、第二层内墙、带刺铁丝网以及车辆路障层层严密防守。

google_en: The dark coal yard warehouse has been transformed into a "green grass" football field; the red brick spire factory building has been transformed into a modern sports hall.
zh: 黑乎乎的煤场仓库，变成“绿草如茵”的足球场；红砖尖顶的厂房，变成现代化的运动馆。

google_en: On National Fitness Day, the Nanluo Maying Sports and Culture Park outside Wangjiangmen in Hangzhou unveiled its mystery.
zh: 在全民健身日，杭州望江门外的南落马营体育文化公园，揭开了神秘的面纱。

google_en: Make up for the shortcomings of public sports facilities
zh: 补齐公共体育设施短板

google_en: It used to be a coal mine, but it has been idle since it was closed more than ten years ago, leaving behind a large amount of illegal construction and domestic waste.
zh: 这里曾是煤场，十多年前关闭后一直闲置，留下了大量的违法建筑和生活垃圾。

google_en: After renovation, it has become a sports and cultural park and will be officially opened to the public in November, providing free sports venues to citizens, which will undoubtedly open up a new fertile ground for national sports.
zh: 这里经过整治后，成了体育文化公园，并将于11月正式对外开放，向市民免费提供运动场所，也无疑为全民体育开辟了全新的沃土。

google_en: This reminds people of Hangzhou Chen Jinglun Sports School, the "Whampoa Military Academy" of Chinese swimming circles that has produced many world champions.
zh: 这不禁让人想起杭州陈经纶体校，这座中国泳坛的“黄埔军校”游出了多名世界冠军。

google_en: The continuous emergence of swimming stars vividly illustrates the relationship between competitive sports and national sports - the rich mass base provides good conditions for the selection of professional athletes.
zh: 泳坛名将源源不断地产生，生动地诠释了竞技体育与全民体育之间的关系——丰厚的群众基础为选拔专业选手提供了良好的条件。

google_en: The level of competitive sports is closely related to the foundation of national sports. Competitive sports depends on national sports in a certain sense, and national sports depends on venue conditions.
zh: 竞技体育的水平与全民体育的基础密切相关，竞技体育在一定意义上取决于全民体育，而全民体育又取决于场地条件。

google_en: In June this year, the State Council issued the "National Fitness Plan (2016-2020)", which focused on the development of mass sports.
zh: 今年6月，国务院印发了《全民健身计划（2016-2020年）》，将发展群众体育作为重点内容。

google_en: In order to make up for this shortcoming, on the one hand, relevant departments must fully consider the layout of sports venues when conducting urban planning.
zh: 为了补齐这块短板，一方面，相关部门在进行城市规划时要充分考虑到体育场馆的布局。

google_en: According to reports, as of 2015, although my country's per capita sports venue area has been 150 times that of when the People's Republic of China was founded, it still lags far behind the sports powers.
zh: 据报道，截至2015年，我国的人均体育场地面积虽然已是新中国成立时的150倍，但仍远远落后于体育强国。

google_en: After a little life comes into this world, parents must be responsible for this life. This responsibility lies not only in the physical health of the child, but also in the spiritual development, that is, education.
zh: 在小生命来到这个世上之后，爸爸妈妈们就要对这个生命负责，这个负责不仅仅在于孩子的身体健康上，还在于精神的发展上，也就是教育。

google_en: On the other hand, already built public sports venues, including those in schools and other units, should try to expand their opening scope and improve their use efficiency as much as possible.
zh: 另一方面，已建成的公共体育场馆，包括学校等单位里的体育场馆，应尽量扩大开放范围，尽可能地提高使用效率。

google_en: The Rio Olympics, which is currently in full swing, has inspired people's enthusiasm for sports and awakened everyone's awareness of participation.
zh: 目前正如火如荼进行着的里约奥运会，激发着人们的运动热情，也唤醒了大家的参与意识。

google_en: When a new life is born, new parents need to spend time and energy to take care of and educate the child and be responsible for it.
zh: 当一个新生命降临的时候，新爸新妈们就需要花费时间精力来照看和教育孩子，对他负责。

google_en: If you fail in your children's education, no matter how successful your career is, it cannot make up for the shortcomings in life and the failure of the family.
zh: 如果在子女的教育上失败，那么即使事业再成功，也无法弥补生活的缺憾、家庭的失败。

google_en: Good family education means that parents need to accompany their children regularly, give them love and patient care, and also teach their children to develop civilized words and deeds so that they can better learn knowledge and improve their intelligence.
zh: 良好的家庭教育意味着父母需要经常的陪伴孩子，给孩子关爱，耐心的照顾，另外还需要教孩子养成文明的言行举止，让孩子更好的学习知识，提升智力。

google_en: Responsibility, in addition to physical care and keeping them healthy, also lies in spiritual education, that is, letting children learn how to be a human being, how to be an adult, and how to be successful.
zh: 而负责任，除了体现在身体的护养，让他们健康，还在于精神的教育，也就是让孩子学习如何做人，如何成人，如何成功。

google_en: Every word and deed of parents will affect the growth of children. They will imitate their parents, which is often said that dragons beget dragons and phoenixes beget phoenixes. The son of a mouse can dig holes. The children will be like the parents.
zh: 父母的一言一行都会影响到孩子的成长，他们会模仿自己的父母，也就是人们常说的龙生龙，凤生凤，老鼠的儿子会打洞，父母什么样孩子就什么样。

google_en: Therefore, parents need to be a good example in front of their children, standardize their words and deeds, and cultivate their own excellent character. These can indirectly help their children shape a good character and make them better.
zh: 所以父母在孩子面前需要做个好榜样，规范自己的言行，培养自己优秀品格，这些都可以间接的帮助孩子塑造良好的心性，让他更加优秀。

google_en: She has an outgoing and lively personality, can get along well with friends, and has good adaptability to the environment.
zh: 她性格外向活泼，能与朋友们很好地相处，对环境的适应能力也不错。

google_en: Amy is a smart and beautiful girl.
zh: 艾米是一个聪明漂亮的女孩。

google_en: This secret has been with Amy for a long time. Usually the problem is not serious》
zh: 这个秘密陪伴艾米很久了。平时问题并不严重》

google_en: Even by studying and working in scattered, modular times, she can basically complete the tasks and achieve good results.
zh: 即便通过分散的，模块化的时间来学习和工作，她也基本上都可以完成任务，并取得不错的成绩。

google_en: But Amy has a little secret in her heart: she cannot focus on the study and work tasks she has to do for a long time.
zh: 但艾米心里有一个小小的秘密：她不能长久将注意力集中在她要做的学习、工作任务上。

google_en: The purpose of an individual's resistance to self-exposure and emotional experience is not to threaten the individual's self-understanding and self-esteem.
zh: 个体对于自我暴露及其情绪体验的抵抗，其目的在于不使个体的自我认识与自尊受到威胁。

google_en: However, when the tasks are heavy and time is tight, Amy feels very painful and tormented.
zh: 但是，当任务重，时间紧的时候，艾米就感觉到非常痛苦和折磨。

google_en: Some behaviorist psychologists understand resistance as an individual's disobedience to behavioral modification.
zh: 也有些行为主义心理学家把阻抗理解为个体对于其行为矫正的不服从。

google_en: I tried to let Amy do an exercise to calm herself down through breathing relaxation and feel the suffering.
zh: 我试着让艾米做了一个练习，让她通过呼吸放松的方式让自己平静下来，去感受那份煎熬。

google_en: And once she left the trapped situation, she felt relaxed and free again.
zh: 而一旦离开那个被困住的情境，她感觉自己放松下来，重新获得了自由。

google_en: Han, a 63-year-old homeless man, had a drunken argument with another homeless man, Xiao, and stabbed him to death with a knife.
zh: 现年63岁的流浪者韩某与另一流浪汉肖某酒后发生争执，遂持刀将其扎死。

google_en: Han said that on the day of the incident, they were invited by their friends to drink together, and they had two arguments during and after the meal.
zh: 韩某称，案发当天，他俩被朋友叫去一起喝酒，两人在吃饭时和饭后曾两次发生争执。

google_en: Han said that before the incident, he and the homeless man Xiao lived on the ground in an alley in Dongcheng District, and they were more than 20 meters apart.
zh: 韩某称案发前他和流浪汉肖某都住在东城区一胡同内的地上，两人相距20多米。

google_en: In court, the victim's family demanded compensation from Han for funeral expenses and death compensation, totaling more than 530,000 yuan.
zh: 庭上，被害人家属要求韩某赔偿丧葬费、死亡赔偿金等共计53万余元。

google_en: Han said that he was afraid that Xiao would hit him, so he picked up a fruit knife from the garbage dump and stabbed him to death.
zh: 韩某称，他怕肖某打他，就从垃圾堆捡来一把水果刀，将其扎死。

google_en: It has been four years since Uber entered the Taiwan market and has had a considerable impact on the local traditional taxi industry.
zh: Uber进入台湾市场4年，对当地传统出租车行业产生了不小的冲击。

google_en: However, Zheng Lijia, chairman of the Taipei Drivers Union, said that it has been four years since Uber came to Taiwan and the Taiwanese authorities only held a meeting at the end of this month. Drivers can no longer wait.
zh: 台北市司机工会理事长郑力嘉却表示，Uber来台4年，台当局这月底才召开会议，司机们已无法再等。

google_en: Taiwan's "United Daily News" reported on August 12 that more than a hundred taxis bypassed Taiwan's "Executive Yuan" in protest on the morning of the 12th, causing serious traffic paralysis in the surrounding area.
zh: 台湾《联合报》8月12日消息称，12日上午逾百辆出租车绕行台湾“行政院”以示抗议，导致周边出现严重交通瘫痪现象。

google_en: However, the government broke its promise and kept delaying the process.
zh: 然而政府言而无信，一拖再拖。

google_en: Original title: 2,000 chickens from a Jiangsu breeding farm were seized by the court and the owner sold them without authorization and was sentenced
zh: 原标题：江苏一养殖场2000只鸡被法院查扣场主擅自变卖获刑

google_en: After receiving the seizure ruling, Li privately sold some of the seized laying hens in the farm without the permission of the Shuyang Court.
zh: 李某在收到扣押裁定后，在未经沭阳法院许可的情况下，私自将该养殖场内被扣押的部分蛋鸡卖掉。

google_en: After the judgment came into effect, because Li did not automatically perform the obligations determined by the judgment, Wang applied to the Shuyang Court for compulsory execution.
zh: 判决生效后，因李某没有自动履行判决确定的义务，王某向沭阳法院申请强制执行。

google_en: On October 16, 2014, the Shuyang Court issued a civil ruling, ruling that 2,000 laying hens in all Li's farms should be impounded and should not be transferred or sold without permission.
zh: 2014年10月16日，沭阳法院作出民事裁定，裁定对李某所有养殖场内蛋鸡2000只予以扣押，未经允许不得转移、变卖。

google_en: The head of the Industrial Coordination Department of the National Development and Reform Commission pointed out here today that excess steel production capacity is a global problem.
zh: 国家发展改革委产业协调司负责人今天在此间指出，钢铁产能过剩是全球性问题。

google_en: Without the permission of the Beijing Winter Olympics Organizing Committee, no one may use the Beijing Winter Olympics Bid Committee emblem or logo for commercial purposes.
zh: 未经北京冬奥组委许可，任何人不得将北京冬奥申委会徽、标志用于商业目的。

google_en: Reporters learned on August 12 that the Beijing 2022 Winter Olympics and Paralympic Winter Games Organizing Committee issued an announcement stating that the Beijing Winter Olympics Organizing Committee will inherit the Beijing Winter Olympics Bid Committee's emblem, logo and other intellectual property rights.
zh: 记者8月12日获悉，北京2022年冬奥会和冬残奥会组织委员会发布公告表明，北京冬奥组委继承北京冬奥申委会徽、标志等知识产权。

google_en: Law-abiding taxi drivers, who are at the bottom of the labor force, have to compete with Uber, which is illegal but has no restrictions, and they feel cheated by the authorities.
zh: 属于底层劳工的守法出租车司机，却要与违法却不受限制的Uber竞争，感到被当局欺骗。

google_en: As of March 8, 2015, when the Shuyang County Public Security Bureau conducted an inspection, there were only 142 laying hens left in the farm.
zh: 至2015年3月8日沭阳县公安局勘查时，养殖场内只剩蛋鸡142只。

google_en: The person in charge pointed out that the Party Central Committee and the State Council attach great importance to the global problem of excess steel production capacity.
zh: 该负责人指出，对钢铁产能过剩这一全球性问题，党中央国务院高度重视。

google_en: Our country has taken resolute and effective measures to resolve excess production capacity, and the results are gradually showing.
zh: 我国已经采取坚决有效的措施化解过剩产能，而且成效正在逐步显现。

google_en: All departments and regions have actively implemented the State Council's deployment and carried out work conscientiously. This year, crude steel production capacity will be reduced by about 45 million tons.
zh: 各部门、各地区积极贯彻落实国务院部署，认真开展工作，今年要压减粗钢产能4500万吨左右。

google_en: In recent years, my country's capacity utilization rate has been higher than the global average, and also higher than that of the United States and Europe and other countries and regions.
zh: 我国近年产能利用率均高于全球平均水平，也高于美欧等国家和地区。

google_en: Implementing trade protection measures will not help fundamentally solve the development problems of the global steel industry. On the contrary, it will only cause further impact on the international trade order.
zh: 实施贸易保护措施无助于从根本上解决全球钢铁产业的发展问题，相反，只会对国际贸易秩序造成进一步冲击。

google_en: The person in charge emphasized that international trade of steel products is essentially a market behavior, which is an independent choice based on the needs of the importing country and consumers after comprehensive consideration of factors such as product cost-effectiveness.
zh: 这位负责人强调，钢铁产品国际贸易本质上讲是市场行为，是源于进口国需求、消费者综合考虑产品性价比等因素后的自主选择。

google_en: When talking about debt, the person in charge emphasized that resolving the debt problem is an important issue that needs to be properly handled in the process of resolving excess production capacity.
zh: 在谈到债务时，该负责人强调，化解债务问题是化解过剩产能过程中需要妥善处理好的重要问题。

google_en: Based on my country's national conditions, my country does not encourage steel exports. On the contrary, it has taken a series of practical measures to control steel exports.
zh: 从我国国情出发，我国并不鼓励钢材出口，相反，还采取一系列切实措施控制钢材出口。

google_en: Due to the large scale of assets of steel companies and their wide coverage, some companies have complex debt relationships. If they are not handled properly, they may lead to regional risks.
zh: 由于钢铁企业资产规模大，涉及面广，一些企业的债务关系复杂，如果处置不当，有可能引发区域性风险。

google_en: According to the person in charge, in recent years, as the downward pressure on the economy has increased, total social demand has gradually weakened, the capacity utilization rate of some industries has declined, and the production and operation difficulties of enterprises have increased.
zh: 据该负责人介绍，近年来，随着经济下行压力加大，社会总需求逐步减弱，部分行业产能利用率下降，企业生产经营困难加大。

google_en: The main reasons for the losses are the same as the difficulties faced by the global steel industry - weak market demand and low capacity utilization.
zh: 导致亏损的主要原因与全球钢铁行业面临的困境一样——市场需求不振、产能利用率低。

google_en: Our country mainly adopts market mechanisms, economic means and legal measures. The government mainly does a good job in protecting employees and social stability, and ensuring a fair and just market order.
zh: 我国主要采取市场机制、经济手段和法治办法，政府主要是做好职工兜底和社会稳定工作，保证公平公正的市场秩序。

google_en: Some enterprises are unable to adapt to the changes in the market environment, and their production and operations are unsustainable or even on the verge of bankruptcy. However, restricted by some institutional factors, there are many obstacles to exiting in a market-oriented manner, and they have become "zombie enterprises".
zh: 一些企业不适应市场环境变化，生产经营难以为继甚至濒临倒闭，但受一些体制机制因素制约，以市场化方式退出的障碍较多，成为“僵尸企业”。

google_en: The existence of such enterprises distorts market signals, reduces the efficiency of factor resource utilization, increases social management costs, and hinders the establishment of a fair competitive market environment.
zh: 这类企业的存在，扭曲了市场信号，降低了要素资源利用效率，增加了社会管理成本，妨碍了公平竞争市场环境的建立。

google_en: On the afternoon of the 10th, the Chinese tourist police immediately attracted people's attention when they appeared in Moscow's Red Square. Chinese tourists waved in surprise, and locals and foreign tourists couldn't help but stop and look back.
zh: 10日下午，中国旅游警察在莫斯科红场一亮相，就立刻引起了人们的注意，中国游客怀着惊喜纷纷挥手致意，当地人和外国游客不禁驻足回望。

google_en: On the same day, members of China’s first professional tourist police team, the Tourist Police Detachment of the Public Security Bureau of Sanya City, Hainan Province, came to Moscow’s Red Square to exchange and learn with the local tourist police on duty.
zh: 当天，中国首支专业旅游警察队伍——海南省三亚市公安局旅游警察支队的成员来到莫斯科红场，和当地执勤的旅游警察交流学习。

google_en: The person in charge emphasized that in the next step, we must unswervingly continue to work on reducing overcapacity and ensure that the target task of reducing crude steel production capacity by 100 million to 150 million tons in five years is completed.
zh: 这位负责人强调，下一步，要坚定不移继续抓好去产能工作，确保完成5年化解粗钢产能1亿~1.5亿吨的目标任务。

google_en: Along the way, he carefully observed every word and deed of his Russian counterpart and communicated with her from time to time.
zh: 他一路上仔细观察俄罗斯同行的一言一行，并不时地与她进行交流。

google_en: The Moscow tourist police were divided into three groups to perform patrols in Red Square, Nikolsky Pedestrian Street, GUM Department Store and other places. The Chinese tourist police also learned from the patrol. The whole process lasted for more than an hour.
zh: 莫斯科旅游警察在红场、尼科利斯基步行街、古姆百货商场等地分成三个小组执勤巡逻，中国旅游警察一起跟岗学习，整个过程持续了一个多小时。

google_en: "Hainan, as an international tourist island, is gradually paying attention to attracting international tourists. We hope to improve our capabilities to match the status of an international tourist island."
zh: “海南作为国际旅游岛，正在逐步重视吸引国际游客，我们希望提高自身能力来匹配国际旅游岛的地位。”

google_en: "Everyone in the Moscow tourist police knows foreign languages, and some can speak two or more languages. This has greatly touched us."
zh: “莫斯科旅游警察每个人都掌握外语，有的还会两门以上，这对我们触动非常大。”

google_en: When Spanish tourists came for consultation, the Moscow tourist police patiently explained to them in fluent Spanish, which left a deep impression on Wang Bing.
zh: 当遇到西班牙游客前来咨询时，莫斯科旅游警察用流利的西班牙语为对方进行了耐心讲解，这给王冰留下深刻印象。

google_en: Female police officer Liu Xinye is in her 20s and is proficient in English and Spanish. She just joined the tourist police last year.
zh: 女警官柳希涅今年20多岁，通晓英语和西班牙语，她去年刚加入旅游警察队伍。

google_en: Before studying on the same day, the Chinese tourist police also went to the Moscow tourist police brigade to communicate with their Russian counterparts.
zh: 当天在跟岗学习前，中国旅游警察还到莫斯科市旅游警察大队驻地与他们的俄罗斯同行进行交流。

google_en: "The questions they usually ask for help are: how to get there, where is a certain monument, how to get a taxi, how to get back to the hotel."
zh: “他们通常求助的问题是：路怎么走，某个纪念碑在哪里，怎么打出租，怎么回到旅馆。”

google_en: "I often deal with Chinese tourists and I am very happy to see them traveling to Russia."
zh: “我常常与中国旅游者打交道，看到他们来到俄罗斯旅游非常高兴。”

google_en: Rysakov, head of the Moscow Tourism Police Brigade, said that in recent years, Moscow's urban environment and tourism atmosphere have become better and better, and it is increasingly attractive to foreign tourists.
zh: 莫斯科市旅游警察大队大队长雷萨科夫说，近年来莫斯科的城市环境和旅游氛围变得越来越好，对外国游客的吸引力日益增加。

google_en: The police brigade divided them into nine groups based on their foreign language proficiency. They took classes twice a week to learn self-defense techniques, laws and regulations, and foreign languages.
zh: 警察大队根据外语水平将他们分成9个小组，每周上2次课，学习自卫招式、法律法规和外语。

google_en: Currently, all Moscow tourist police are fluent in English, and some also speak Spanish and German.
zh: 目前，所有莫斯科旅游警察都熟练掌握英语，部分还掌握西班牙语和德语。

google_en: In order to meet the needs of tourism development, a tourism police team was established in July 2014, responsible for patrolling and protecting major scenic spots, helping and guiding tourists.
zh: 为适应旅游发展需要，2014年7月成立旅游警察队伍，负责在各大景点巡逻保卫，帮助和疏导游客。

google_en: Rysakov told reporters that the Moscow Tourist Police has accumulated a certain amount of experience since its establishment and hopes to inspire its colleagues in Sanya.
zh: 雷萨科夫告诉记者，莫斯科旅游警察自组建以来，已经积累了一定的经验，希望能对三亚同行有所启发。

google_en: "Currently, two tourist policemen have begun to learn Chinese and can already speak it well. We will continue to improve their Chinese proficiency," Rysakov said.
zh: “目前有两名旅游警察开始学习汉语，已经说得不错了，我们还要继续提高他们的汉语水平，”雷萨科夫说。

google_en: He believes that cooperation between the police departments of Russia and China will enhance the sense of security for their citizens traveling to each other's countries.
zh: 他认为，俄中两国警察部门合作将提升本国公民到对方国家旅游的安全感。

google_en: "The Moscow Tourist Police's recruitment, policing model, equipment and good interaction with tourists have brought us a lot of inspiration," Chen Xiaokun said.
zh: “莫斯科旅游警察的人员招录、警务模式、装备配备，以及与游客的良好互动给我们带来了很多启发，”陈晓昆说。

google_en: Regarding the conditions for applying for a residence permit, it is generally stated in the above-mentioned areas that one needs to live for more than half a year and meet one of the conditions of legal and stable employment, legal and stable residence, and continuous education.
zh: 对于申领居住证的条件，上述地区普遍提出，需居住半年以上，符合有合法稳定就业、合法稳定住所、连续就读条件之一。

google_en: A reporter from China News Network found that at least nine provinces and cities, including Hebei, Jilin, Tianjin, Jiangxi, Sichuan, Hainan, Gansu, Fujian, and Beijing, have issued detailed rules for the implementation of residence permits.
zh: 中新网记者梳理发现，目前至少已有河北、吉林、天津、江西、四川、海南、甘肃、福建、北京等9个省市出台了居住证实施细则。

google_en: A reporter from China News Network noticed that the benefits provided by the residence permit vary from place to place. Compared with the national version of the regulations, the scope of public services and conveniences provided by some areas has been expanded.
zh: 中新网记者注意到，在居住证提供的待遇方面，各地“含金量”不一，与国家版的规定相比，一些地区提供的公共服务和便利的范围有所扩大。

google_en: In addition, Beijing and many other places have clearly required that the scope of public services and conveniences be gradually expanded and announced to the public on a regular basis.
zh: 此外，北京等多地还明确要求，逐步扩大提供公共服务和便利的范围，并定期向社会公布。

google_en: For example, Fujian proposed to announce to the public at least every three years the scope of public services and conveniences enjoyed by residence permit holders.
zh: 如，福建提出，至少每3年向社会公布一次居住证持有人享受的公共服务和便利的范围。

google_en: These areas have made it easier for children to take the local high school and college entrance examinations if they meet relevant conditions.
zh: 这些地区均增加了子女在满足相关条件下可在当地参加中高考的便利。

google_en: The "Interim Regulations on Residence Permit" stipulate that for those who meet the conditions for applying for a residence permit, the public security organ shall issue a residence permit within 15 days from the date of acceptance.
zh: 《居住证暂行条例》规定，对符合居住证办理条件的，公安机关应当自受理之日起15日内制作发放居住证。

google_en: Regarding the time limit for issuance of certificates, most regions agree with the national version, that is, they will be issued within 15 days.
zh: 对于发证时限，大部分地区跟国家版的意见一致，即在15日内发放。

google_en: Hebei has made it clear that for those who meet the application conditions and have complete materials, the public security police station in the place of residence should issue a residence permit within 3 working days from the date of acceptance.
zh: 河北明确，对符合申领条件、材料齐全的，居住地公安派出所应自受理之日起3个工作日内发放居住证。

google_en: According to the "Interim Regulations on Residence Permit", the above-mentioned regions have clarified that those who apply for a residence permit for the first time will be exempted from the document production fee.
zh: 按照《居住证暂行条例》规定，上述地区均明确，首次申领居住证，免收证件工本费。

google_en: Jiangxi stipulates that if the application conditions for a residence permit are met and the supporting materials are complete, the public security agency shall issue a residence permit within 5 working days from the date of acceptance.
zh: 江西规定，符合居住证申领条件且证明材料齐全的，公安机关应当自受理之日起5个工作日内制作发放居住证。

google_en: For example, Sichuan requires that local police stations or entrusted community service agencies must strictly implement the approved charging items and charging standards, and resolutely prohibit exceeding the scope, exceeding the standard charging or charging for rides.
zh: 如，四川要求，各地公安派出所或者受委托的社区服务机构要严格执行核定的收费项目及收费标准，坚决禁止超范围、超标准收费或搭车收费。

google_en: After investigation, it was found that on July 27, 2016, Chen Yangxia, the former secretary of the Dingnan County Party Committee of Ganzhou City, reported to the Provincial Commission for Discipline Inspection to work as the director of the Party Style and Political Style Supervision Office (deputy director level, one-year probation period).
zh: 经查，2016年7月27日，原赣州市定南县委书记陈阳霞到省纪委报到上班，担任党风政风监督室主任（副厅长级，试用期一年）。

google_en: The red wine consumed that night was provided by Li Youcai personally, and other expenses were borne by Liu.
zh: 当晚饮用的红酒由黎友才个人提供，其他费用由刘某某个人承担。

google_en: Pogba received two yellow cards in the Italian Cup last season and will be automatically suspended for one game according to the rules.
zh: 博格巴上赛季在意大利杯中吃到两张黄牌，根据规则将自动禁赛一场。

google_en: Although he has transferred back to the Premier League, the Football Association still postponed his cumulative suspension to the Premier League.
zh: 虽然他已经转会回到了英超，但是英足总仍然将其累计禁赛顺延至英超赛场。

google_en: The Jiangxi Provincial Commission for Discipline Inspection reported that Chen Yangxia, Cheng Ziliang and others organized and accepted dinner invitations in private clubs, which violated the spirit of the eight central regulations and violated party discipline.
zh: 江西省纪委通报称，陈阳霞、程子亮等人在私人会所组织和接受吃请，违反了中央八项规定精神，触犯了党的纪律。

google_en: As the 12th pick in the first round of 2014, Saric will officially land in the NBA next season and join the Philadelphia 76ers.
zh: 作为2014年的首轮12号新秀，萨里奇将在下赛季正式登陆NBA，并加盟费城76人队。

google_en: Recently, 76ers coach Brett Brown gave Saric high praise. The Spurs coach believed that he saw the shadow of the young Manu Ginobili in Saric.
zh: 近日，76人队主帅布雷特-布朗给予萨里奇很高的评价，这位马刺系主帅认为他在萨里奇看到了年轻时的马努-吉诺比利的影子。

google_en: As a young European player, many fans don't know much about Saric, but through this Olympics, I believe Saric's performance has left a deep impression on people.
zh: 萨里奇身为一个年轻的欧洲球员，很多球迷对他并不是很了解，但是通过本届奥运会，相信萨里奇的表现给人们留下了很深的印象。

google_en: In Croatia's last game, which narrowly defeated Spain, Saric successfully blocked Pau Gasol's rim attack at the last minute in an attempt to drag the game into overtime.
zh: 上一场克罗地亚险胜西班牙的比赛，萨里奇在最后时刻成功封盖掉保罗-加索尔试图将比赛拖入加时的篮下进攻。

google_en: As a result, Pogba will sit on the sidelines in the away game against Bournemouth on August 14, and his first show back at Manchester United will be postponed to the home game against Southampton on the 20th.
zh: 如此一来，在8月14日客场迎战伯恩茅斯的比赛中，博格巴将作壁上观，他重返曼联的首秀将延至20日与南安普顿的主场比赛。

google_en: Obviously, Saric has shown his talent and the 76ers have high expectations for him.
zh: 很显然，萨里奇已经展现出了他的天赋，并且让76人对他充满期待。

google_en: In the first half, Saric showed his ability to open up space on the court. After passing the pick-and-roll with his teammates, he was able to hit shots from beyond the three-point line.
zh: 上半场，萨里奇展现出了他在场上拉开空间的能力，通过与队友的挡拆之后，他在三分线外能命中投篮。

google_en: In Croatia's first two games at the Olympics, Saric scored a total of 24 points, 17 rebounds and 12 assists.
zh: 克罗地亚在本届奥运会上的前两场比赛，萨里奇一共得到24分、17个篮板和12次助攻。

google_en: Although the current 76ers have many talented young players inside, they do not have Saric's outside ability.
zh: 虽然目前这支76人的内线囤积了不少有天赋的年轻球员，但是他们并不具备萨里奇的外线能力。

google_en: From blocking shots to launching long passes and fast breaks and completing assists, there are only a handful of post players who can do this in today's NBA.
zh: 从盖帽到发动长传快攻并完成助攻，当今NBA赛场上能做到这点的内线球员屈指可数。

google_en: Since the start of the Olympics, Saric has averaged 13 points, 8 rebounds and 5 assists in 3 games. His performance can be called comprehensive.
zh: 自从本届奥运会开始以来，萨里奇在3场比赛里场均得到13分、8个篮板和5次助攻，表现堪称全面。

google_en: Since deciding to return to the Cavaliers in the summer of 2014, James has signed two consecutive 1+1 contracts.
zh: 自从2014年夏天决定重返骑士队以来，詹姆斯连续签了两份1+1的合同。

google_en: With the league's revenue significantly boosted, thanks to a new television deal, and a battle between owners and players over what to do with the money, there are fears the NBA will be locked down next summer.
zh: 鉴于联盟收入的大幅提升，这得感谢新的电视转播协议，以及老板和球员之间关于如何处理这笔钱的争斗，外界担心NBA将会在明年夏天陷入停摆。

google_en: As the NBA's current collective bargaining agreement is about to enter its final year, as the vice president of the NBA Players Association, James will be at the forefront of collective bargaining agreement negotiations.
zh: 随着NBA现今这份劳资协议即将进入最后一年，作为NBA球员工会的副主席，詹姆斯将会身处劳资协议谈判的最前线。

google_en: Regardless of when the 2017-18 season officially begins, James is still under contract.
zh: 无论2017-18赛季从什么时候正式开始，詹姆斯都是在合同之内的。

google_en: Since the stunning debut of the iPhone SE, the mobile phone market has also ushered in a craze for small-screen phones.
zh: 自iPhoneSE惊艳亮相之后，手机市场也迎来了小屏机的热潮。

google_en: But for James, he doesn't have to worry about becoming a free agent next summer because he has already signed a three-year contract extension with the Cavaliers.
zh: 但是对于詹姆斯来说，他在明年夏天不用担心自己会成为自由球员，因为他已经与骑士队续约了一份3年期合同。

google_en: In terms of appearance, nubiaZ11mini uses a 5-inch 1080P screen, and the classic "little red circle" design is still on the lower front.
zh: 在外观方面，nubiaZ11mini采用了一块5英寸的1080P屏幕，正面下方依旧是经典的“小红圈”设计。

google_en: Not long ago, Nubia also launched the first product of its Z11 series: nubia Z11mini.
zh: 前不久，努比亚也推出了其Z11系列的首款作品：nubiaZ11mini。

google_en: The price of nubia's Z11mini, a small-screen camera phone that has just been launched, has been reduced by 200 yuan, from the original 1,499 yuan to 1,299 yuan.
zh: nubia旗下刚刚上市的小屏拍照手机Z11mini降价200元，即从原来的1499元降至1299元。

google_en: nubiaZ11mini continues its consistent excellent camera genes and is equipped with a 5.0-inch screen that is easier to hold with one hand and a convenient and easy-to-use rear fingerprint recognition, making it an outstanding user experience.
zh: nubiaZ11mini延续了其一贯的卓越拍照基因，并配备了单手更易握持的5.0英寸屏幕、便捷易用的后置指纹识别，成就了其出众的使用体验。

google_en: The middle frame is made of metal, and the bottom adopts a symmetrical design and is equipped with a Type-C data interface.
zh: 中框为金属材质，底部采用对称式设计并配置了Type-C数据接口。

google_en: "Although the Nanhu rescue team is very professional, we still hope that boating tourists can wear life jackets, refrain from illegal actions on the lake, and play safely," Zheng Jianjun said.
zh: “虽说南湖救援队非常专业，但仍希望广大划船的游客能穿上救生衣，在湖上不要做违规行动，安全游玩。”郑建军说。

google_en: Zheng Jianjun, chief of the Water Management Section of Nanhu Park, said that the deepest point at the bottom of Nanhu Lake is more than 10 meters, and those who enter the water without understanding the situation are likely to be in danger.
zh: 南湖公园水域管理科科长郑建军介绍，南湖水底最深处超过10米，不了解情况下水者，很可能发生危险。

google_en: Weitou Village is blessed with a unique marine environment and two major leisure tourism resources, natural ecology and human ecology.
zh: 围头村具有得天独厚的海洋环境，坐拥自然生态和人文生态两大休闲旅游资源。

google_en: "However, individual owners who have purchased parking spaces in the community are afraid that doing so will affect the rental price of their own parking spaces, and they also suspect that others have selfish motives, so they have been sabotaging the project behind the scenes, causing the parking space renovation to be shelved."
zh: “但是购买了小区车位的个别业主，怕这样做会影响自己的车位出租价格，也怀疑其他人存有私心，所以一直背后搞破坏，导致车位改造一事被搁置。”

google_en: There are still different opinions in academic circles on when and by whom sweet potatoes were introduced.
zh: 对于番薯在何时由何人引进这一问题，学界的说法仍纷繁不一。

google_en: According to the current mainstream view, there are three main routes for the introduction of sweet potatoes.
zh: 在目前较为主流的观点中，番薯的引进主要有三条线路。

google_en: Among the three lines of sweet potato introduction, the one with the greatest influence and wide spread was Chen Zhenlong’s introduction to Fuzhou from the Philippines.
zh: 番薯引入的三条线路中影响最大、传播最广的，就是陈振龙由菲律宾引入福州。

google_en: The Beijing Municipal Social Group Management Office will launch a special inspection on the use of unified receipts for social group membership fees from now on.
zh: 北京市社会团体管理办公室即日起将对社会团体会费统一收据使用情况开展专项检查。

google_en: According to the relevant person in charge of the Municipal Societies Office, the scope of this inspection includes social groups that received unified receipts for social group membership fees from the Municipal Societies Office from 2013 to 2015.
zh: 市社团办相关负责人介绍，本次检查范围包括2013至2015年度在市社团办领用社会团体会费统一收据的社会团体。

google_en: Inspections are divided into two types: unit self-inspection and focused spot inspection.
zh: 检查分为单位自查和重点抽查两种。

google_en: The International Olympic Committee and media practitioners around the world seem to be ready to meet this round of challenges.
zh: 国际奥委会和世界各国的媒体从业者，看来都已经要迎接这一轮挑战了。

google_en: On August 11, the public offering of H shares of Everbright Securities entered the last day. Sources pointed out that the market response was muted in the two days before the IPO. According to the plan, it will be listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange on August 18.
zh: 8月11日，光大证券H股公开发售进入最后一天。有消息指出，招股前两日市场反应平淡。按照计划，其将于8月18日在港交所挂牌上市。

google_en: An analyst at a domestic securities firm said that Orient Securities’ foundation in Hong Kong is not very good, and its asset management business is the strength of Orient Securities. Compared with bank-based securities firms such as Bank of China International and CITIC Securities, it appears to be inherently deficient.
zh: 国内一家券商分析师表示，东方证券在港基础并不算好，旗下资管业务才是东证所长。相比中银国际、中信证券等银行系券商，显得先天不足。

google_en: Judging from the reports of this Olympic Games, various media have made great changes compared with the past in many aspects such as communication methods, product forms, language styles, and news perspectives.
zh: 而从本届奥运会的报道来看，各媒体在传播方式、产品形态、语言风格、新闻视角等诸多方面都较以往做了很大的改变。

google_en: The Rio Olympic Organizing Committee said in the Olympic Communication Strategy formulated in 2012: "The success of the Olympic Games is defined by the people who share their stories on social media."
zh: 里约奥组委在２０１２年制定的奥运传播战略中就曾说：“奥运会成功与否是由哪些在社交媒体分享故事的人们定义的。”

google_en: The second-tier cities that have introduced or are about to introduce property market control policies are not only Suzhou, but also Hefei, Nanjing and other cities.
zh: 出台或者即将出台楼市调控政策的二线城市不止苏州，还包括合肥、南京等城市。

google_en: After the introduction of this new regulation, Suzhou will become the first second-tier city in the country to restart purchase restrictions.
zh: 此项调控新政出台后，苏州将成为全国第一个重启限购的二线城市。

google_en: Previously, Hefei has taken the lead in issuing a loan restriction policy. For home buyers who have two houses in Hefei and one housing loan has not been settled, banks will refuse to provide mortgage services.
