zh: 此前，合肥已经率先发布限贷政策，对于在合肥名下有两套房且有一套住房贷款未结清的购房者，银行将拒绝提供房贷服务。

google_en: Experts pointed out that since the beginning of this year, as the securities market has returned to dullness, the performance of many securities companies has declined. However, the situation after the company is listed depends more on the development of the company's own business and cannot be generalized.
zh: 专家指出，今年以来随着证券市场回归平淡，很多券商业绩都出现了下滑，但公司上市之后情况要更多看公司本身业务的发展情况，不能一概而论。

google_en: Last week, the costume drama "Beauty's Private Kitchen" was temporarily suspended, unexpectedly triggering heated discussions about the falsification of ratings of domestic dramas.
zh: 上周，古装剧《美人私房菜》临时停播，意外引发了关于国产剧收视率造假的热烈讨论。

google_en: After experiencing the "golden era" of soaring box office in 2015, the overall film market has entered a cooling-off period in 2016. Whether it can exceed last year's total box office of 44.069 billion yuan has become a suspense.
zh: 经历2015年票房猛增的“黄金时代”后，2016年整体电影市场进入了冷静期，能否突破去年440.69亿元的总票房成绩都成为一个悬念。

google_en: According to data released by the National Bureau of Statistics, in October, the prices of new and second-hand houses in Beijing both cooled down, rising by only 0.6% and 1.1% month-on-month.
zh: 从国家统计局公布的数据看，10月，北京新房和二手房价格双双降温，环比仅上涨0.6%和1.1%。

google_en: Lupescu, currently the chief technical officer of UEFA, gave a technical report on the 2016 European Championship and last season's UEFA Champions League at this conference.
zh: 现任欧足联首席技术官的卢佩斯库在本次大会上做了一份关于2016年欧锦赛以及上赛季欧冠联赛的技术报告。

google_en: Reference News Network reported on January 18 that the British media said that Beijing may have a long history of three thousand years, but it is also rapidly transforming into the modern and charming city it is today.
zh: 参考消息网1月18日报道英媒称，北京或许有三千年的悠久历史，但它也在迅速变身为今天的现代魅力都市。

google_en: BBC calls Beijing the most exciting city: making foreigners feel like they are "living in a new era"
zh: BBC称北京成最激动人心城市：让老外感觉“生活在新时代”

google_en: With blazingly fast internet, cutting-edge technology like facial recognition software, huge investments in artificial intelligence and an unparalleled international energy, the Chinese capital is one of the most exciting cities for exploratory foreigners.
zh: 这座中国首都拥有速度高得惊人的互联网，有人脸识别软件等尖端技术，在人工智能方面投入了巨资并且拥有无可匹敌的国际化能量，它对富于探索精神的外国人而言是最激动人心的城市之一。

google_en: According to a report on the BBC website on January 16, German expatriate Clemens Sethi said: "If I can succeed there, I can succeed anywhere in the future." He was quoting the lyrics of singer Frank Sinatra's song praising New York City.
zh: 据英国广播公司网站1月16日报道，德国侨民克莱门斯·塞希说：“如果我能在那儿成功，我以后在任何地方都能成功。”他引用的是歌手弗兰克·西纳特拉歌颂纽约市的歌词。

google_en: Sethi, who serves as the creative director of "Traveler Archives" magazine, said: "If Sinatra were alive today, he would probably sing about a city like Beijing." He said that living in this city will make you feel like "living in the new era" and always keeping up with the trends.
zh: 在《旅行者档案》杂志担任创意总监的塞希说：“如果西纳特拉活到今天，他很可能会歌唱北京这样的城市。”他说，生活在这座城市会让你感觉“生活在新时代”，总是能跟上潮流。

google_en: Simon Norton, who is originally from England but has recently been living in Beijing, said in an article on his personal blog website 4Corners7Seas: "People generally have a feeling of being at the center of something grand. This feeling is difficult to explain, but it keeps many foreigners there for a long time. They want to see what it will become, and they want to witness it with their own eyes."
zh: 老家位于英格兰、但最近生活在北京的西蒙·诺顿在个人博客网站4Corners7Seas上发表文章说：“人们总体上有一种处于某种宏大事物中心的感觉，这种感觉很难说清楚，但它让许多外国人长久留在那里。他们想看看它会变成什么样，并且希望亲眼见证。”

google_en: The city’s high-quality, high-speed internet and tech-friendly environment make daily life easier than ever.
zh: 报道称，这座城市优质高速的互联网和对技术友好的环境使日常生活比以往任何时候都更容易。

google_en: Food is also at the core of many major festivals in China over the years. Participating in these celebrations is highly praised by foreigners. The Spring Festival is the most important social and economic festival and one of the festivals easiest for foreigners to participate.
zh: 食品也是中国历年诸多重大节日的核心，参加这些庆祝活动受到外国人的推崇，春节是最重要的社会和经济节日，也是外国人最容易参与的节日之一。

google_en: Beijing also recently announced plans to spend 13.8 billion yuan to build an artificial intelligence technology park. Once completed, more than 400 companies will settle there and focus on developing various artificial intelligence technologies from biometrics to self-driving cars.
zh: 北京最近还宣布计划斥资138亿元人民币修建一个人工智能科技园，建成后将有逾400家企业在那里落户，它们将专注于开发从生物测定到自动驾驶汽车的各种人工智能技术。

google_en: But smartphones are just the beginning of Beijing's technological ambitions, the report said. Facial recognition software is already widespread, with many mobile apps using the technology to make bank transfers and payments, let people into apartments and offices, and even use it to verify the identity of online ride-hailing drivers.
zh: 报道表示，但智能手机只是北京技术雄心的开始，面部识别软件已经十分普及，许多手机应用都使用这种技术来进行银行转账和支付、让人们进入公寓和办公室，甚至用它来核实网约车司机的身份。

google_en: Andy Peñafuerte, who is from Manila and currently serves as deputy editor-in-chief of the "Beijing Children" website, said: "Beijing is rapidly transforming into a cashless society. The Internet integrates the functions of traditional wallets into smartphones, making it easier for everyone to conduct many transactions."
zh: 来自马尼拉、目前在“北京儿童”网站担任副总编的安迪·佩尼亚富埃尔特说：“北京正在迅速转变为一个无现金社会，互联网把传统钱包的功能整合到智能手机上，使每个人都能更容易地进行许多交易。”

google_en: Sethi said: "I suggest that helping Chinese friends prepare for the New Year, cleaning the apartment is as important as posting red Spring Festival couplets with New Year greetings on the door of the home. On New Year's Eve, all family members will gather together to have a sumptuous meal, and then stay up until midnight to welcome the New Year with bright and loud fireworks. For foreigners, spending this night with friends and family is indeed an opportunity to integrate."
zh: 塞希说：“我建议帮助中国朋友为过年做准备，打扫公寓和在家门贴上写有新年祝福语的红色春联同等重要，在除夕那一天，所有的家庭成员都要齐集一堂吃一顿丰盛的大餐，然后守岁到午夜，用绚丽响亮的焰火迎接新年。对外国人而言，与朋友和家人共度这个夜晚的确是一个融入的机会。”

google_en: According to reports, the number of foreigners in Beijing is large and growing, but China's language barriers and the ease of communication among expats can easily become excuses for them not to fully integrate into the local culture.
zh: 报道称，北京的外国人数量众多而且在不断增长，但中国的语言障碍以及侨民之间交流的便利很容易成为他们不完全融入当地文化的借口。

google_en: The easiest way to overcome this is to learn a little Mandarin - it's easier than one might think.
zh: 克服这一点最简单的办法就是学习一点普通话——这比人们可能想象的要简单。

google_en: "In these so-called "foreigner bubbles" ("foreigner bubbles" refers to foreigners who only mix among foreigners without contact with local people and local culture - translator's note), foreigners hang out in their own communities, eat in Western restaurants, and have only foreigners among their friends.
zh: ”在这些所谓的“老外泡泡”中（“老外泡泡”是指外国人只在外国人中间混，而不接触当地人和当地文化——译者注），外国人在自己的社区里抱团，在西方餐馆吃饭，并且朋友中只有外国人。

google_en: "Some foreigners have lived in China for many years but have little experience with their host country," Sethi said. "If your initial attempts to contact Chinese people are not successful, it is easy to feel that it is easier to get along with other foreigners."
zh: 塞希说：“一些外国人已经在中国生活多年，但对他们的东道国几乎没有什么体验。如果你最初接触中国人的尝试不算成功，那么你很容易有还是与其他外国人相处更容易的感觉。

google_en: Learning even a few classic phrases can be helpful when shopping, ordering food at a restaurant, or chatting in a taxi.
zh: 哪怕学几句经典的短句也会对购物、在餐馆订餐或是在出租车上闲聊有帮助。

google_en: "Taking one or two hours of private Chinese lessons per week or learning an entry-level radio drama should fit into everyone's busy schedule," Sethi said.
zh: 塞希说：“每周上一两个小时的中文私教课或者学习入门级的广播剧应该会适合每个人的忙碌日程。”

google_en: Stubborn air pollution is also a fact of daily life, but government efforts in recent years have curbed some of the problem.
zh: 报道称，顽固的空气污染也是日常生活中的一个事实，不过近年来的政府努力遏制了一些问题。

google_en: Residents stress the importance of getting outdoors during the warmer months when pollution tends to be less, and treating those blue-sky days as opportunities to wander the historic hutongs or explore the popular Ritan Park.
zh: 居民们强调，在污染往往较轻的温暖月份里到户外活动很重要，要把那些蓝天日当作在历史悠久的胡同里徜徉或是探索备受欢迎的日坛公园的机会。

google_en: Pan Gongsheng pointed out that the current risk of cross-border capital flows is controllable, and the fundamental factors supporting the balance of international payments still exist for a long time.
zh: 潘功胜指出，目前跨境资本流动风险可控，支撑国际收支平衡的根本性因素仍然长期存在。

google_en: The report believes that the hindering effect of aging on the growth of human capital is increasingly obvious, especially in the Northeast region, where the average annual contribution rate of aging to the growth of human capital is -1.28%.
zh: 报告认为，老龄化对人力资本增长的阻碍作用日益明显，尤其在东北地区，老龄化对人力资本增长的年均贡献率为-1.28%。

google_en: Norton said: "Beijing is the Chinese city where you can find the most things below the surface. You can find great art and music events, indulgent nightlife, historical wonders, ultra-modern business districts and ancient hutong areas."
zh: 诺顿说：“北京是能在表面以下发现最多东西的中国城市，你能发现很不错的艺术和音乐活动、纵情的夜生活、历史奇观、超现代的商业区和古老的胡同区。”

google_en: The European Commission believes that this move is harmful to the interests of consumers and hinders competition.
zh: 欧盟委员会认为此举有损消费者的利益，并且阻碍了竞争。

google_en: In April this year, the European Commission accused Google of forcing mobile phone manufacturers to pre-install software such as Google search and Chrome browsers, otherwise they would not be allowed to use other Google applications.
zh: 欧盟委员会今年4月指控谷歌强迫手机厂商预装谷歌搜索和Chrome浏览器等软件，否则便不允许其使用其他谷歌应用。

google_en: China News Service, Beijing, December 17 (Reporter Gao Kai) The world is dazzling because of heritage - the 2016 International Summit Forum on the Appraisal, Restoration and Protection of Ancient Chinese Paintings and Calligraphy opened on December 17 at Renmin University of China.
zh: 中新网北京12月17日电 (记者 高凯)世界因遗产而璀璨——2016中国古书画鉴定修复与保护国际高峰论坛于12月17日在中国人民大学开幕。

google_en: EU regulators initially gave Google until July 27 to respond.
zh: 欧盟监管者最初要求谷歌在7月27日之前作出回应。

google_en: If convicted of antitrust charges, Google would face a fine of up to 10% of its global revenue, which is approximately US$7.4 billion.
zh: 倘若反垄断罪名成立，谷歌最高面临其全球营收10%的罚款，约为74亿美元。

google_en: Google also faces an EU investigation for favoring its own shopping service in search results.
zh: 谷歌还因为在搜索结果中偏向自家购物服务而面临欧盟的调查。

google_en: One picture to understand: Bitcoin’s legal status around the world
zh: 一张图看懂：比特币在世界各地的法律地位

google_en: Google did not immediately comment.
zh: 谷歌尚未立刻对此置评。

google_en: Zhang Yuning's study abroad is a real deal. It can be said that his "jumping" from the National Youth Team to the National Olympics was not accidental, and the extent of his leap in growth is still surprising.
zh: 张玉宁的留洋是实打实的，可以说他实现从国青到国奥的“跳级”并不是偶然的，而他飞跃成长的幅度依然令人惊讶。

google_en: Abstract: In addition to the price correction naturally caused by speculative attributes, this round of digital currency’s sharp decline is also related to the “old enemy”—regulatory risk.
zh: 摘要：除了投机属性天然引发的价格回调，本轮数字货币惨跌也与“宿敌”——监管风险不无关系。

google_en: *This article comes from Wall Street News (WeChat ID: wallstreetcn), edited by Wang Mu. For more exciting information, please visit wallstreetcn.com, or download the Wall Street Insights APP. *
zh: *本文来自华尔街见闻（微信ID：wallstreetcn），编辑王穆。更多精彩资讯请登陆wallstreetcn.com，或下载华尔街见闻APP。*

google_en: As regulatory storms arise in major Bitcoin markets such as China, South Korea and the European Union, global digital currencies led by Bitcoin have suffered a bloodbath this week. The price of Bitcoin fell below the psychological round number of US$10,000 on Tuesday and recorded the largest single-day decline in three years.
zh: 随着中国、韩国和欧盟等比特币主要市场的监管风暴迭起，以比特币为首的全球数字货币本周以来惨遭血洗，比特币价格周二起跌破1万美元心理整数位，并创三年以来最大单日跌幅。

google_en: Judging from the visual map, Eastern countries have a more conservative attitude toward Bitcoin than the West. Countries that account for the majority of the world are still waiting to see the legality of digital currencies, which means that "black swan risks" are still very high.
zh: 从可视化地图看，东方国家对比特币的态度比西方更为保守，占全球主体的国家仍在观望数字货币合法性，代表“黑天鹅风险”依旧很大。

google_en: At this important juncture, the visual big data website HowMuch.net produced a map showing the legal status and degree of regulation of Bitcoin in countries around the world.
zh: 在这个重要的关口，可视化大数据网站HowMuch.net制作了一份图谱，展现比特币在全球各国的合法性地位和受监管程度。

google_en: In addition to price corrections naturally caused by speculative attributes, this round of sharp decline in digital currencies is also related to regulatory risks, which have always been the "old enemy".
zh: 除了投机属性天然引发的价格回调，本轮数字货币惨跌也与一直以来的“宿敌”——监管风险不无关系。

google_en: (The above picture is from the HowMuch.Net visualization team drawing on January 15th)
zh: （上图来自HowMuch.Net可视化团队在1月15日制图）

google_en: As shown in the figure below, green represents the legal market for Bitcoin; orange represents the neutral market, although the status of Bitcoin has not been publicly legalized, but there are no major restrictions on use; light pink represents the restricted market, that is, local governments try to control the use of digital currencies through red line policies or supervision; dark pink represents countries where Bitcoin is defined as illegal; gray represents countries that have not yet commented.
zh: 如下图所示，绿色代表比特币的合法市场；橘黄色代表中性市场，虽尚未公开合法化比特币地位，但也没有主要的使用限制；淡粉色代表受限制的市场，即当地政府尝试通过红线政策或监管来方法数字货币的使用；深粉色代表比特币被定义为非法的国家；灰色是尚未置评的国家。

google_en: The article pointed out that from the distribution of non-green color blocks in the picture, it can be seen that Eastern countries in the traditional sense have a more conservative attitude towards Bitcoin than the West.
zh: 文章指出，从图中非绿色的色块分布可以看出，传统意义上的东方国家对比特币的态度比西方更为保守。

google_en: Russia is currently the largest country that has defined Bitcoin as illegal, China is one of the largest restricted markets for Bitcoin, and India is one of the largest countries that has not yet commented on Bitcoin and has not yet introduced relevant policies.
zh: 俄罗斯是目前定义比特币为非法的最大国家，中国是比特币最大的受限市场之一，印度是对比特币尚不予置评、还没有出台相关政策的最大国家之一。

google_en: North America and Western Europe are the regions with the highest acceptance of Bitcoin, i.e. the distribution of green blocks is more concentrated.
zh: 北美和西欧是对比特币接受程度最高的地区，即绿色块的分布更为集中。

google_en: Countries in the Middle East and Latin America have clearly divided views on Bitcoin, and the distribution of color blocks in the above regions is more mixed.
zh: 中东和拉丁美洲各国对比特币的看法呈现明显分化，上述地区的色块分布更为混杂。

google_en: Based on the above data, it can be seen that among the 246 countries in the world that are counted, a total of 99 countries (or 40%) impose no restrictions on the transaction and use of Bitcoin, that is, green and orange areas.
zh: 综合上述数据可知，在全球受统计的246个国家中，共有99个国家（或占比40%）对比特币的交易和使用不施加限制，即绿色和橘黄色的地区。

google_en: There are 7 countries (or 3%) that are restricted markets (light pink), 10 countries (or 4%) that define Bitcoin as illegal (dark pink), and 130 countries (or 53%) that do not have more information on the treatment of digital currencies (grey).
zh: 有7个国家（或占比3%）是受限市场（淡粉色），有10个国家（或占比4%）定义比特币为非法（深粉色），有130个国家（或占比53%）还没有更多的对待数字货币信息（灰色）。

google_en: This shows that the countries that account for the majority of the world (53%, more than half) are still waiting to see the legality of digital currencies, led by Bitcoin, within their borders. It also means that the "black swan risk" of Bitcoin is still very high, because some of them may eventually make legislative decisions to restrict digital currencies.
zh: 这说明，占全球主体（53%，超过半数）的国家仍在观望以比特币为首的数字货币在境内的合法性，也代表了比特币的“黑天鹅风险”依旧很大，因为其中一部分国家最终可能会作出限制数字货币的立法决定。

google_en: Among them, Iraq, Iran, Turkey, and Brazil are all legal Bitcoin markets. Afghanistan, Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Bolivia, etc. have certain restrictions on their transactions and use. More Latin American countries have not yet spoken out about Bitcoin.
zh: 其中伊拉克、伊朗、土耳其、巴西都是合法的比特币市场，阿富汗、巴基斯坦、沙特、埃及、玻利维亚等对其交易和使用有一定程度的限制，更多的拉美国家对比特币还没有发声。

google_en: The article believes that global regulatory agencies have not fully understood the emerging category of digital currency, which may be the main reason why most countries have not yet made a statement.
zh: 文章认为，全球监管机构对数字货币这个新兴类别还没有完全理解，可能是大部分国家还没有作出表态的主要原因。

google_en: Although Bitcoin's "popularity" has grown exponentially since last year, it does not mean that all countries are interested. Some countries may be worried that their local legal currencies will be threatened, or they may be worried that digital currencies are being used by criminal organizations.
zh: 尽管比特币的“人气”自去年以来呈指数级增长，并不代表所有国家都感兴趣，可能有些国家担心当地法币因此受到威胁，或更担心数字货币被犯罪组织利用。

google_en: The Wall Street Journal once wrote a detailed summary of the international regulatory news on Bitcoin since last week, including China's crackdown on centralized service online platforms and mobile apps for over-the-counter exchanges, South Korea is still considering closing digital currency exchanges, and the European Union believes that Bitcoin has not yet been widely accepted and warned investors of the risk of "losing all their money."
zh: 华尔街见闻曾撰文详细总结了上周以来针对比特币的国际监管新闻，包括中国开始打击场外类交易所的集中服务在线平台和移动App、韩国仍在考虑关闭数字货币交易所、欧盟认为比特币还没有被广泛接受并警告投资者“赔到血本无归”的风险等。

google_en: Wall Street News editor-in-chief selects "Reading News|2018: Global central banks start the first year of digital currency? ” once mentioned that from any perspective of supervision, acceptance/criticism, and adoption, 2018 will be the first year of digital currency for global central banks.
zh: 华尔街见闻主编精选《读要闻|2018：全球央妈开启数字货币元年？》曾提到，从监管、接受/批判、采纳的任一角度来看，2018年都将成为全球央行的数字货币元年。

google_en: Xinhua News Agency, Madrid, January 8 (Reporter Xie Yuzhi) Barcelona’s new aid Coutinho made his debut wearing a Barcelona jersey at Camp Nou on the 8th.
zh: 新华社马德里1月8日电（报道员谢宇智）巴塞罗那新援库蒂尼奥8日在诺坎普首次身披巴萨球衣亮相。

google_en: Coutinho passed Barcelona's physical examination that morning and signed a contract with Barcelona Chairman Bartomeu that will expire in the summer of 2023.
zh: 库蒂尼奥当日上午通过了巴萨的体检，并与巴萨主席巴托梅乌在一份将于2023年夏天到期的合同上签了字。

google_en: Russia and other major countries’ criticism of Bitcoin’s legal status is actually to make way for the official issuance of digital currencies.
zh: 俄罗斯等大国批评比特币合法性地位的做法，其实也是为了给官方发行数字货币让路。

google_en: Since Coutinho is still injured, he still needs to rest for nearly 20 days before he can make his debut in a Barcelona jersey.
zh: 由于眼下库蒂尼奥仍有伤在身，他还需休整近20日才能迎来自己身披巴萨球衣的处子秀。

google_en: Then he appeared as a Barcelona player in front of nearly 7,000 fans at Camp Nou.
zh: 随后他作为巴萨球员，在诺坎普近7000名球迷面前亮相。

google_en: According to Spanish media, Coutinho's total transfer fee may reach 160 million euros (1 euro is approximately 7.77 yuan), making him the most valuable player in the history of Barcelona and La Liga.
zh: 据西班牙媒体透露，库蒂尼奥的转会费总额或达到1.6亿欧元（1欧元约合7.77元人民币），是巴萨俱乐部及西甲历史第一身价。

google_en: In 2016, Huawei had a total of 180,000 employees, and employee expenses reached 121.8 billion, a year-on-year increase of 21%.
zh: 2016年华为员工共18万，雇员费用高达1218亿，同比增长了21%。

google_en: In 2006, Sa Dingding joined Universal Music Group with his unique music style and became the first Chinese to sign a contract with Universal's UK headquarters.
zh: 2006年，萨顶顶凭借独特的音乐风格加盟环球唱片，成为与环球英国总部签约的第一个中国人。

google_en: Purchase restrictions are a tough line in many cities’ real estate control policies.
zh: 限购是很多城市房地产调控政策的一道硬杠杠。

google_en: In May 2017, Jinan issued regulations that allow undergraduates who have paid social security for half a year to enjoy the same housing purchase policies as local permanent residents;
zh: 2017年5月，济南出台规定，本科生连续缴社保半年，可享有本地常住户口居民同等购房政策；

google_en: Every disturbance in the property market affects people's sensitive nerves.
zh: 楼市一丝丝的风吹草动都牵动着人们的敏感神经。

google_en: Subsequently, the policy was tightened, and officials stated that “college students can buy a house at a price 20% lower than the market price”;
zh: 随后政策加码，官方表示，“大学生可以低于市场价20%的价格买房”；

google_en: In June, Wuhan issued a policy that stipulates that college students can settle in the city within three years of graduation with their graduation certificate and employment certificate.
zh: 6月，武汉出台政策，规定大学生毕业3年内凭毕业证和就业证即可落户。

google_en: In July, Chengdu issued regulations that young talents with a bachelor's degree or above from other places can apply to settle in Chengdu with their graduation certificates.
zh: 7月，成都出台规定，外地大学本科及以上学历的青年人才，凭毕业证即可申请落户成都。

google_en: In addition, Kunshan, Shanghai Lingang and other cities or regions have also introduced policies related to "talent introduction" to lower the threshold for talents to purchase houses and settle down.
zh: 除此之外，还有昆山、上海临港等城市或区域也出台了 “人才引入”相关政策，对人才购房落户降低门槛。

google_en: Zhang Hongwei believes that this is actually a competition between major cities for population, especially talents. Only by retaining the population, especially talents, can cities be competitive. This is the most important significance of these real estate policies.
zh: 张宏伟认为，这实际上是各大城市对于人口尤其是人才的争夺，留住人口尤其是人才，城市才具有竞争力，这才是这些房地产政策最重要的意义。

google_en: Director Er Dongsheng said that day that the filming plan has been around for a long time. The first script adaptation was in 1999, and he was even planning to find Takeshi Kaneshiro to play Yan Shisan.
zh: 尔冬升导演当日表示，拍摄计划由来已久，第一次改编剧本是在1999年的时候，甚至还准备找金城武来饰演燕十三。

google_en: Zou Shoumin, director of the Environmental Supervision Bureau of the Ministry of Environmental Protection of China, introduced in Beijing on the 22nd that in August, a total of 57 cases of consecutive daily penalties were implemented nationwide. The newly revised "Environmental Protection Law" implemented at the beginning of this year has significantly increased China's environmental law enforcement.
zh: 中国环境保护部环境监察局局长邹首民22日在北京介绍，8月份，全国范围内实施按日连续处罚案件共57件，今年初实施的新修订《环境保护法》明显加码中国环境执法力度。

google_en: Some people even think that this means that the time has come to lift the "purchase restrictions" in the property market.
zh: 有人甚至认为，这意味着楼市“限购”取消的时机已到。

google_en: At present, environmental protection agencies across China can use punishment methods such as continuous daily penalties, seizures, production restrictions and suspensions, and transfers to administrative detention to investigate and deal with environmental violations, and cooperate with judicial agencies to punish environmental crimes.
zh: 目前，中国各地环保机关可使用按日连续处罚、查封扣押、限产停产以及移送行政拘留等处罚手段查处环境违法行为，并与司法机关配合惩治环境犯罪。

google_en: According to Zou Shoumin, in August, a total of 335 cases were sealed and detained across China; a total of 177 cases were restricted or suspended; a total of 189 cases were transferred to administrative detention; and a total of 166 cases of suspected environmental pollution crimes were transferred.
zh: 邹首民介绍，8月份，中国各地共实施查封、扣押案件共335件；实施限产、停产案件共177件；移送行政拘留共189起，移送涉嫌环境污染犯罪案件共166件。

google_en: Among them, Henan has implemented 7 consecutive penalties on a daily basis. Currently, China is comprehensively stepping up environmental pollution control from end-to-end control to full-process embedding.
zh: 其中，河南实施按日连续处罚7件，当前，中国正在从末端管控至全程嵌入，全面加力环境污染治理。

google_en: Although the downward pressure on the economy is emerging, China's Ministry of Environmental Protection has made it clear before that China should correctly handle the positioning of environmental protection in economic development and strengthen its "green focus." The more economic growth slows down, the less it can relax environmental protection and give full play to the optimization role of environmental protection in the economy.
zh: 虽然经济下行压力显现，但中国环保部此前已明确表态，中国应正确处理好环境保护在经济发展中的定位，增强“绿色定力”，越是经济增速下行，越不能放松环保，发挥好环境保护对经济的优化作用。

google_en: On January 9, the share price of Kweichow Moutai, the "Kingdom of A-shares", once again hit a record high, closing at 782.52 yuan, with a total market value of 983 billion yuan, just one step away from a trillion-dollar market value.
zh: 1月9日，A股“股王”贵州茅台股价再次创出历史新高，截至收盘收于782.52元，总市值达9830亿元，距离万亿市值仅一步之遥。

google_en: On December 28, 2017, Kweichow Moutai issued an announcement stating that after research, it was decided to appropriately increase the price of Moutai products from 2018, with an average increase of about 18%.
zh: 2017年12月28日贵州茅台发布公告称经研究决定，自2018年起适当上调茅台酒产品价格，平均上调幅度18%左右。

google_en: There is no highest, only higher. Kweichow Moutai's stock price cannot stop on the road to new highs.
zh: 没有最高，只有更高，贵州茅台股价在创新高的道路上根本停不下来。

google_en: The guide price of 1,499 yuan has increased by 200 yuan from the previous retail price of 1,299 yuan.
zh: 1499元的指导价较此前1299元的零售价上涨了200元。

google_en: Statistics show that the GDP of Guizhou Province in the first three quarters of 2017 was 950 billion yuan, and Moutai’s market value was far behind Guizhou Province’s GDP in the first three quarters of last year.
zh: 统计显示，2017年贵州省1-3季度生产总值为9500亿元，茅台市值将贵州省去年前三季度GDP远远甩在身后。

google_en: This price increase has stimulated the stock price of Kweichow Moutai to soar. According to statistics from a Beijing Morning News reporter, in the eight trading days since the news of the price increase was announced, Kweichow Moutai's stock price has risen by 95 yuan, an increase of more than 14%.
zh: 此次提价举动刺激了贵州茅台股价飙涨，北京晨报记者统计发现，贵州茅台提价消息宣布的8个交易日以来，贵州茅台股价上涨了95元，涨幅超过14%。

google_en: Since 2017, the stock prices of most listed liquor companies have continued to rise sharply, among which the stock prices of Shuijingfang, Wuliangye, Shanxi Fenjiu, Kweichow Moutai, etc. have more than doubled.
zh: 2017年以来，大多数白酒上市公司股价持续大涨，其中水井坊、五粮液、山西汾酒、贵州茅台等股价涨幅超过一倍。

google_en: After entering Microsoft's real-time conversation translation mode, the screen is divided into two equal parts, and the two users of the conversation can each choose the language on their side.
zh: 在进入微软的实时对话翻译模式后，屏幕被分为两等份，对话的两位用户可以各自选择自己那一边的语言。

google_en: On the morning of December 21, Kvitova completed the operation. Doctors repaired all tendons and 2 nerves in her five fingers.
zh: 12月21日早上，科维托娃完成手术，医生修复了她5根手指的所有肌腱和2根神经。

google_en: Driven by Moutai, listed liquor companies have begun to increase prices and control supplies, and enjoy the dividends brought by consumption upgrades.
zh: 在茅台的带动下，白酒类上市公司纷纷开启提价控货节奏，坐享消费升级带来的红利。

google_en: High-level foreign talents holding Chinese green cards who establish technology-based enterprises can enjoy "national treatment."
zh: 持有中国绿卡的外籍高层次人才创办科技型企业，可享受“国民待遇”。

google_en: Among the "Twenty Measures", the first one is to "support high-level foreign talents holding permanent residence ID cards to establish technology-based enterprises."
zh: “二十条”措施中，第一条就是“支持持永久居留身份证外籍高层次人才创办科技型企业”。

google_en: On December 20, Beijing time, Azarenka announced through social media that she had successfully given birth to a son and became a mother.
zh: 北京时间12月20日，阿扎伦卡通过社交媒体宣布顺利产下一子，升级做了母亲。

google_en: According to data from the National Bureau of Statistics, China's GDP grew by 6.9% year-on-year in the first three quarters of 2017, 0.2 percentage points faster than the same period last year. Among them, the first quarter, second quarter, and third quarter grew by 6.9%, 6.9%, and 6.8% respectively. It has been running in the 6.7-6.9% range for nine consecutive quarters, maintaining medium-to-high growth.
zh: 国家统计局数据显示，2017年前三季度中国GDP同比增长6.9%，比上年同期加快0.2个百分点。其中一季度、二季度、三季度分别增长6.9%、6.9%、6.8%，连续9个季度运行在6.7-6.9%区间，保持中高速增长。

google_en: Russian media said that Putin will have a new domestically produced special car: the unit price is 15% cheaper than Mercedes-Benz
zh: 俄媒称普京将拥有国产新专车：单价比奔驰便宜15％

google_en: The budget target is to keep the price 15% lower than the Mercedes-Benz S-Class.
zh: 预算目标是把价格控制在比梅赛德斯-奔驰S级汽车低15%。

google_en: Reference News Network reported on January 18 that Russian media said that Russian Minister of Industry and Trade Manturov said that the unit price of cars in President Putin’s “fleet” starts from 6 to 7 million rubles.
zh: 参考消息网1月18日报道 俄媒称，俄罗斯工贸部长曼图罗夫表示，总统普京“车队”的汽车单价从600-700万卢布起。

google_en: According to a report by Russia's Lenta.com on January 16, from the end of February to the beginning of March, the Russian National Automotive Engineering Institute (NAMI), the main research and development unit for presidential cars, will deliver 16 vehicles to the Federal Guard Service.
zh: 据俄罗斯连塔网1月16日报道，2月底至3月初，总统座驾的主要研发单位——俄罗斯国家汽车工程研究院（NAMI）将向联邦警卫局交付16辆车。

google_en: It is reported that the engineering and technical team of the German Porsche Company participated in the research and development of the power unit.
zh: 据悉，德国保时捷公司的工程技术团队参与了动力装置研发。

google_en: According to reports, the news of building the first domestically produced stretch sedan since the Soviet Union for the president appeared about five years ago. According to the plan of the R&D unit, the new car will be equipped with an 800-horsepower engine and armor, and the vehicle will weigh 6 tons.
zh: 报道称，为总统制造苏联以来第一辆国产加长轿车的消息出现在大约5年前。根据研发单位的计划，新汽车将安装800马力发动机和装甲，整车重量为6吨。

google_en: According to reports, the "Fleet" project requires the use of a unified modular platform to manufacture three types of cars for the country's top figures - a limousine, a sedan and a small passenger car. The budget allocation for the project is 12.4 billion rubles.

zh: 记者7日从河北开滦集团获悉，7日上午11时25分，位于河北省唐山市古冶区的开滦集团化工有限公司乳化车间发生爆炸事故，现场有13名作业人员被困。

zh: 不过歌迷们对此并没有表示任何不满，反而齐齐送上祝福，因为失约的原因是周杰伦幸福地当上了爸爸。

google_en: Report from our newspaper (Reporter Cui Wei) Since his debut 15 years ago, Jay Chou has been releasing a new album every year, but last year he rarely missed an appointment.
zh: 本报讯(记者崔巍)自15年前出道以来，周杰伦每年必出一张新专辑，但是去年他却罕见地失约了。

google_en: After letting everyone wait for a full year and a half, Jay Chou finally came to Beijing yesterday to present to people his first work after becoming a father, and it is also the 14th album in his music career, "Jay Chou's Bedtime Story".
zh: 让大家等待了整整一年半之后，昨天周杰伦终于来到北京，为人们献上这张他升级人父后的首份作品，同时也是他音乐生涯中的第14张专辑《周杰伦的睡前故事》。

google_en: According to a report on the US Newsweek website on January 15, researchers from China's Air Force Engineering University wrote a paper titled "Research on Orbital Change Model for Space-Based Laser Clearance of Small-Scale Space Debris." The paper describes how space debris can be irradiated by lasers into smaller, less harmful fragments by using space-based platform lasers.
zh: 据美国《新闻周刊》网站1月15日报道，中国空军工程大学的研究人员撰写了一篇题为《天基激光清除小尺度空间碎片变轨模型研究》的论文，该论文描述了通过使用天基平台激光器，空间碎片可以如何被激光辐照成更小的、危害没那么大的碎片。

google_en: Reference News Network reported on January 18 that US media said that Chinese scientists have put forward a bold and innovative proposal to use large lasers to clean up the cluttered Earth orbit and destroy old satellites and their sky debris.
zh: 参考消息网1月18日报道 美媒称，中国科学家提出了一项大胆创新的提议，使用大型激光器清理杂乱的地球轨道，毁掉旧卫星以及其天空垃圾。

google_en: US media: Scientists from China's Air Force Engineering University study laser satellites to remove space debris
zh: 美媒：中国空军工程大学科学家研究激光卫星，用于清除太空垃圾

google_en: According to reports, space debris has been a concern for international space agencies for many years, and NASA has considered a variety of options to track, detect and remove man-made debris.
zh: 报道称，多年来，太空垃圾一直都是国际空间机构关心的问题，美国航天局考虑了多种选择方案跟踪、探测和移除人造碎片。

google_en: Ways to remove large-scale space debris include giant nets to sweep and collect waste, and magnets that can be used to suck them out of orbit. Chinese scientists conducted laser simulation studies and came to the conclusion that this would be an effective way to clean up the Earth's orbit.
zh: 清除大尺度空间碎片的方式包括用来清扫和收集废物的巨型网，以及可以被用来将它们吸出轨道的磁体。中国科学家进行了激光器仿真研究，得出以下结论，即这将是清理地球轨道的有效方式。

google_en: The abstract of the paper states: "(Simulation research) provides the necessary theoretical basis for the application of laser space debris removal technology on space-based platforms."
zh: 该论文的摘要称：“（仿真研究）为天基平台激光清除空间碎片技术的应用提供了必要的理论基础。”

google_en: According to a report on the website of the American monthly magazine Popular Mechanics on January 17, space is basically empty, but the space next to the earth is becoming more and more crowded. Every satellite we send into space ends up being just another piece of debris orbiting the Earth, and over time, the debris accumulates.
zh: 另据美国《大众机械》月刊网站1月17日报道，太空基本上是空的，但紧挨着地球的太空越来越拥挤。我们送入太空的每颗卫星最终都会变成又一块围绕地球运行的碎片，而且随着时间的推移，这些碎片会堆积起来。

google_en: High-speed debris moving along the Earth's orbit is regarded as a serious threat to future space missions and has been described by experts from the European Space Agency as a "deadly chain of threats." High-velocity debris continues to increase with every passing year.
zh: 沿地球轨道运动的高速碎片被视为对未来空间任务的严重威胁，被欧洲航天局的专家形容为“致命的一连串威胁”。过去的每一年，高速碎片都在持续增加。

google_en: The more debris there is, the higher the chance that a functioning satellite will be hit by debris, damaging or destroying a multi-million dollar investment.
zh: 碎片越多，某颗仍在正常运转的卫星被碎片击中的几率越高，进而损坏或摧毁一项价值数百万美元的投资。

google_en: According to reports, all space agencies have formulated plans to remove space debris in the future.
zh: 报道称，所有太空机构都制定了在未来清除太空垃圾的计划。

google_en: A 2014 study by U.S. defense giant Lockheed Martin found that there are approximately 200 threats to satellites in orbit every day.
zh: 美国国防业巨头洛克希德－马丁公司2014年的研究发现，对于正在沿轨道运行的卫星而言，每天大约有200个威胁物。

google_en: At present, China has also proposed a solution to space junk, which is to use a large laser to break floating space junk into small, less harmful fragments.
zh: 眼下，中国也提出一个解决太空垃圾的办法，即用一台大型激光器把漂浮的太空垃圾击成不那么有害的小碎片。

google_en: NASA is considering using jet gas to slow down the debris and deorbit it. Europe is considering launching a satellite carrying a large net to capture the debris and bring it back to Earth. Japan's idea is to use an electric chain to capture the debris.
zh: NASA正在考虑用喷射气体降低碎片的速度，使其脱离轨道，欧洲正在考虑发射一颗携带一张大网的卫星，捕捉碎片，带回地球，日本的想法是用一条电动链捕捉碎片。

google_en: Installing such a laser on a satellite would be effective enough to clean up space, at least according to simulations, according to a paper published in the German monthly Optics by a group of researchers from China's Air Force Engineering University.
zh: 据中国空军工程大学的一群研究人员在德国《光学》月刊上发表的一篇论文，在一颗卫星上安装这样一台激光器将足够有效地清理太空，至少根据模拟结果是这样。

google_en: According to reports, the only way to confirm effectiveness is to conduct tests. There are currently no such missions scheduled, but perhaps sooner or later someone will install a laser on a satellite and send it into space.
zh: 报道称，证实有效性的唯一途径是进行测试，目前尚无此类任务的安排，但或许早晚会有人在卫星上安装激光器然后将其送入太空。

google_en: Once we do that, we can finally begin to eliminate the space junk problem once and for all.
zh: 一旦做到了，我们就可以最终开始一劳永逸地消除太空垃圾的问题。

google_en: (Compiled by Hu Jing and Wang Haifang)
zh: （编译/胡婧、王海昉）

google_en: Federer, who has won many tournaments during his 18-year career, received more than 60 percent of the fan vote in this stylish final.
zh: 在费德勒18年的职业生涯中赢得了非常多的比赛，在这场时尚的决赛中，他收获了超过60%的粉丝投票。

google_en: A few days ago, the Chinese Athletics Association issued a serious notice to crack down on the phenomenon of substitute running, and prepared to impose heavy penalties on violators with life-long bans.
zh: 几天前，中国田协严肃认真地出了个通知，严打替跑现象，并且准备对违规者给予终身禁赛的重罚。

google_en: At the just-concluded 2016 Xiamen (Haicang) International Half Marathon, two runners died suddenly.
zh: 在刚刚结束的2016厦门（海沧）国际半程马拉松赛上，发生两名跑者猝死事件。

google_en: According to relevant regulations of the Indian government, if you want to open a retail store in India, 30% of product parts must be purchased in India.
zh: 根据印度政府的相关规定，要想在印度开设零售店，必须在印度采购30%的产品零部件。

google_en: The night before last, the finals of Alibaba Music's 2016 Rolling Stone Original Band Competition were held at Guangzhou Central Station. In the end, the "Every Tuesday Afternoon" band won the championship with their song "He Doesn't Want to Live in a Dream, But Will Always Live in a Dream." Like all live shows, they tried their best to use singing, movement, and modeling to convey emotions and cry for "freedom."
zh: 前晚，阿里音乐2016滚石原创乐团大赛决赛在广州中央车站举行，最终“每个星期二下午”乐团凭借一首《他不愿生活在梦中，却永远生活在梦中》夺冠，如同所有的liveshow一样，他们竭尽所能利用歌声、动作、造型传达情绪，为“自由”呐喊。

google_en: Five well-known musicians came to serve as judges that night, namely Peng Juxin, Yan Zhongkun, Li Chi, Zhu Qi, and "sultry singer" Yu Kewei.
zh: 当晚来了五位知名音乐人当评委，分别是彭莒欣、颜仲坤、李赤、朱七，还有“闷骚歌手”郁可唯。

google_en: Before accepting an exclusive interview with a reporter from the Yangcheng Evening News, Yu Kewei took a sip of wine. She thought it would help her say more. "Fast Girl", "Time Cooks the Rain", Rolling Stone, Tianyu... are the keywords attached to her by the market. While she accepts them calmly, she also tries her best to protect her inner purity.
zh: 在接受羊城晚报记者专访之前，郁可唯喝了一口小酒，她觉得这样会多说几句。“快女”、《时间煮雨》、滚石、天娱……是市场附加在她身上的关键词，她在坦然接受的同时也极力守护内心的净土。

google_en: According to Xinhua News Agency, Shenzhou 11 astronauts Jing Haipeng and Chen Dong were interviewed by media reporters at the astronaut apartment in Beijing Space City on the 7th and were in good condition.
zh: 据新华社电 神舟十一号航天员景海鹏、陈冬7日在北京航天城航天员公寓接受了媒体记者采访，状态良好。

google_en: This is also the true living situation of many singers at present - they know what the market needs and what they like.
zh: 这也是目前很多歌手的真实生存状态——知道市场需要什么，也知道自己喜欢什么。

google_en: Around 10 a.m. on the 16th, an explosion occurred at the Shuangma Chemical Plant in Dongchen Town, Rugao City, Jiangsu Province.
zh: 16日上午10时左右，江苏省如皋市东陈镇双马化工厂发生爆炸。

google_en: The reporter learned from the Propaganda Department of the Rugao Municipal Party Committee that on-site rescue was in progress and the injured had been rescued one after another.
zh: 记者从如皋市委宣传部了解到，现场施救正在进行中，已有伤员被陆续救出。

google_en: Last night, the Shenzhen Marathon Organizing Committee announced the punishment of two substitute runners B0575 and B0800. Their results will be cancelled, and they will be reported to the Chinese Athletics Association for additional penalties.
zh: 昨晚，深马组委会公布了对B0575、B0800两名替跑参赛者的处罚公告，取消两人成绩，并将报请中国田协追加处罚。

google_en: The exact number of casualties is currently unknown, and the cause of the explosion is under investigation.
zh: 目前具体伤亡情况不明，爆炸原因正在调查。

google_en: During heavy training, runners need to consume enough nutrients to meet their body's energy needs.
zh: 在繁重的训练期间，跑者需要摄入足够的营养来满足身体对能量的需求。

google_en: In terms of daily diet, the amount of food during the offseason must be smaller than during training, especially reducing the intake of carbohydrates and increasing the intake of protein and fiber.
zh: 在日常饮食方面，休赛期的食物量肯定要比训练期间的少，特别是减少碳水化合物的摄入，增加蛋白质和纤维的摄入。

google_en: From December 15th to 22nd, 2016, the National Center for the Performing Arts' new production of the play "Hamlet" once again ignited the Chinese audience's enthusiasm for artistic classics.
zh: 2016年12月15日至22日，国家大剧院全新制作的话剧《哈姆雷特》，再次引燃了中国观众对艺术经典的热情。

google_en: Different from the traditional way of picking up garbage and distributing promotional materials, the organizers specially set up 6 game experience areas, including water-saving toilet display, enzyme production experience, traffic dominoes, etc.
zh: 不同于以往捡垃圾、发宣传材料的传统方式，主办方专门设置了6个游戏体验区，包括节水马桶展示、酵素制作体验、交通多米诺骨牌等。

google_en: Promote environmental protection Yesterday, Xicheng District held a large-scale environmental volunteer service theme event called "Green Home, Benefiting Xicheng"
zh: 宣传环保昨天，西城区举办了“绿色家园，益动西城”大型环境志愿服务主题活动

google_en: Officials from the China National Development and Reform Commission stated that the 11th Five-Year Plan emission reduction targets will be met ahead of schedule, giving the steel industry, which has been suppressed by electricity and production restrictions, strong expectations for resumption of production.
zh: 中国发改委官员对十一五减排目标提前完成的表态，让受限电限产压制的钢铁行业有了强烈的复产预期。

google_en: At present, in China, many children have given up their studies because they aim to become professional golfers, and they are on a smooth career path, let alone considering college.
zh: 目前在国内，许多小朋友因为以职业高尔夫球手为目标，放弃了学业，而在职业道路上走得平顺，更不会考虑大学。

google_en: Although the steel mills have not yet received a clear notice from the local government announcing that the energy conservation and emission reduction work has ended, the industry estimates that around December 15, 2010, steel mills in various places that were originally restricted from production will gradually resume production, and steel prices may begin to come under pressure.
zh: 虽然目前钢厂并未收到当地政府宣布节能减排工作已结束的明确通知，但业内估计，2010年12月15日左右，各地原本被限产的钢厂将陆续完成复产，钢价或将开始承压。

google_en: We have not yet received notice of the end of power and production restrictions, but in fact the pressure on various companies has been much less than in September and October, a source from a private steel company in Hebei Province told reporters.
zh: 目前还没有收到限电限产结束的通知，但实际上各个企业的压力已经大大小于9、10月份，河北省一家民营钢企人士对记者说。

google_en: Some places in Hebei have repeatedly issued documents on power and production rationing, and at one time imposed forced shutdowns to restrict enterprise production.
zh: 河北部分地方曾屡次下发限电限产文件，并一度采取强制拉闸的方式限制企业生产。

google_en: The reporter learned from local companies that steel mills in most areas of Hebei have resumed work, and the pressure to limit production has eased.
zh: 记者从当地企业了解到，目前河北绝大部分地区的钢厂已经复工，限产压力缓解。

google_en: Coupled with the gradual end of energy conservation and emission reduction, most steel plants will basically resume production by around December 15, and products will gradually arrive in various markets before New Year's Day.
zh: 加之节能减排的逐步结束，到12月15日前后，大部分钢厂将基本复产，产品将于元旦前陆续到达各地市场。

google_en: My steel network analyst Zhang Tieshan predicts that as winter has entered in the north, the terminal demand for construction steel will gradually turn from strong to weak.
zh: 我的钢铁网分析师张铁山预计，由于北方已经入冬，建筑钢材的终端需求将逐步由强转弱。

google_en: On December 20, ZTE smart car related people told The Paper (www.thepaper.cn) reporter that ZTE acquired 70% of the shares of Zhuhai Guangtong Bus and established ZTE's smart car team on this basis. "The amount is not convenient to disclose, reaching hundreds of millions of yuan. We are recruiting talents, and smart cars will be a very important business for ZTE in the future."
zh: 12月20日，中兴智能汽车相关人士对澎湃新闻（www.thepaper.cn）记者表示，中兴通讯收购了珠海广通客车70%的股份，并在此基础上组建了中兴通讯的智能汽车团队，“金额不方便透露，达到数亿元。我们正在招揽人才，未来智能汽车将是中兴通讯一个很重要的业务。

google_en: According to foreign media reports, on July 19, local time in the United States, the famous Hollywood director Garry Marshall died of complications from pneumonia in a hospital in Burbank, California. He was 81 years old.
zh: 据外媒报道，美国当地时间7月19日，好莱坞著名导演加里·马歇尔因肺炎并发症在加州伯班克的一家医院里逝世，享年81岁。

google_en: The increase in resource supply will put some pressure on steel prices, which are currently rising.
zh: 资源供应的增加将使得目前涨势正好的钢材价格受到一定压力。

google_en: Its press secretary Michelle Bega confirmed the news to a reporter from USA Today.
zh: 其新闻发言人米雪儿·贝佳向《今日美国》的记者证实了这一消息。

google_en: In the history of Guoyu's appearance in the finals, no one has ever won two doubles titles at the same time.
zh: 在国羽出战总决赛的历史上，还从未有一人同时拿下双打两冠。

google_en: The 68th Emmy Awards Ceremony was held yesterday (the evening of September 18, local time) in Los Angeles, USA.
zh: 第68届艾美奖颁奖典礼昨日(当地时间9月18日晚)在美国洛杉矶举行。

google_en: This year's drama category "The King of Stars" and "The Queen of Stars" competed fiercely, and in the end two newcomers defeated a number of veteran actors: the Best Actor Award was won by first-time nominee Rami Malek, the actor of "The Matrix", and the Best Actress Award was won by Tatiana Maslany of "Orphan Black."
zh: 今年的剧情类“视帝”“视后”竞争激烈，最终由两位新人打败了一众老演员：最佳男主角奖由首次提名的《黑客军团》男主角拉米·马雷克夺得，最佳女主角奖由《黑色孤儿》的塔提阿娜·玛斯拉尼夺得。

google_en: The big winners at this year's Emmy Awards are undoubtedly "Game of Thrones" and "American Crime Story."
zh: 本届艾美奖的大赢家当属《权力的游戏》和《美国犯罪故事》。

google_en: So far, "Game of Thrones" has won 38 Emmy Awards, becoming the TV series with the most Emmy Awards in history.
zh: 至此，《权力的游戏》已经收获了艾美奖奖座38个，成为历史上获得艾美奖最多的电视剧集。

google_en: Unfortunately, Game of Thrones failed to win any acting awards this year.
zh: 遗憾的是，今年《权力的游戏》在演员奖项上颗粒无收。

google_en: "American Crime Story" swept all the important awards in the miniseries/television movie category, while "Game of Thrones" won 12 awards (including technical categories), including three major awards for best drama series, best director and best screenwriter.
zh: 《美国犯罪故事》包揽了迷你剧/电视电影类的重要大奖，《权力的游戏》则拿下12个大奖(含技术类)，其中包括剧情类最佳剧集、最佳导演和最佳编剧三个重磅大奖。

google_en: International Online News (Reporter Liu Pai): On the 18th, the Economic and Commercial Office of the Italian Embassy in China held a China-Italy Environmental Protection Forum. People from enterprises and scientific research institutions in both countries exchanged opinions extensively on cooperation between the two countries in the field of renewable resources under the new situation and reached a positive consensus.
zh: 国际在线消息（记者刘湃）：18日，意大利驻华使馆经济商务处举办中国－意大利环保洽谈会，来自两国企业和科研机构人士就新形势下两国在可再生资源领域的合作广泛交换意见，达成积极共识。

google_en: Just a few years ago, the only people who could get involved in venture capital were people who had founded companies and later joined venture capital firms, or those who were analysts at venture capital firms hoping to take their careers to the next level.
zh: 就在几年前，能够涉足风投领域的仅局限于创办过公司，后来加入风投公司的人，又或者那些希望事业更上一层楼的风投公司分析师。

google_en: Entrepreneurs can more easily obtain small financing from AngelList's large number of investors, so they don't need informants to connect them with top venture capital firms.
zh: 创业者能够更加轻松地从AngelList数目众多的投资者那里获得小额融资，因而不需要线人给他们跟顶级风投公司牵线搭桥。

google_en: It is reported that the Chinese representatives mainly include China Renewable Resources Development Co., Ltd. and China International Technology Transfer Collaboration Network, while the Italian representatives are composed of the Global Energy and Environment Exchange Organization, the Italian Bologna Region Enterprise Federation and other institutions.
zh: 据悉，中方参会代表主要有中国再生资源开发有限公司、中国国际技术转移协作网络，意方则由全球能源环境交流组织、意大利博洛尼亚大区企业联合会等机构组成。

google_en: Fang Wenshan admitted that it is his dream to tell a complete story through music.
zh: 方文山坦言，用音乐来讲完整的故事，是自己的梦想。

google_en: With a song lasting four to five minutes, it’s difficult to tell a complete story.
zh: 一首歌四到五分钟，要完整讲述一个故事很困难。

google_en: Representatives of the Italian side said that Italy has a variety of environmental protection technologies and solutions in the field of renewable resources, and proposed to carry out pilot projects with China in three aspects: industrial waste treatment, waste oil treatment and waste incineration equipment. At the same time, Italy looked forward to promoting its experience in environmental protection cooperation with China to other regions around the world.
zh: 意方代表表示，意大利在可再生资源领域拥有多样性的环保技术和解决方案，提议在工业垃圾处理、废油处理和垃圾焚烧处理设备三方面与中方开展试点项目，同时期待将与中国的环保合作经验推广到全球其他地区。

google_en: When I write songs, I only have emotions and no storyline, which I always feel is a pity.
zh: 我写歌的时候只有情绪，没有故事线，一直觉得很可惜。

google_en: A reporter from Fawan learned from the event that young actor Huang Xuan was hired as the national tobacco control publicity ambassador.
zh: 法晚记者从活动上获悉，青年演员黄轩被聘为全国控烟宣传形象大使。

google_en: At the first anniversary publicity event for the implementation of the "Beijing Smoking Control Regulations" held this morning, the young student representatives who won the "My Tobacco Control Declaration" national youth tobacco control micro video interacted with Huang Xuan, the national tobacco control publicity ambassador, and reviewed the collection event video and the screening of the award-winning outstanding works.
zh: 今天上午举行的《北京市控制吸烟条例》实施一周年宣传活动上，“我的控烟宣言”全国青年控烟微视频获奖的青年学生代表与全国控烟宣传形象大使黄轩互动，并且回顾了征集活动视频及获奖优秀作品展映。

google_en: The audience puts on a mask and becomes a ghost-like presence in the story. This is the biggest game rule of "Sleepless Night".
zh: 观众戴上面具，成为故事中幽灵一般的存在，这是《不眠之夜》最大的游戏规则。

google_en: Huang Xuan revealed that he smoked in college. After fully understanding the dangers of smoke, he successfully quit smoking. This time, he took the initiative to assume the responsibility of a smoking cessation ambassador and called on young people to stay away from tobacco.
zh: 黄轩自曝大学时期曾抽烟，在充分认识烟雾危害后，成功戒烟，这次更主动承担了戒烟大使的职责，号召青少年远离烟草。

zh: 腾讯财经讯1月18日，人民币兑美元中间价报6.4401，上一交易日中间价贬值66个基点，结束了此前的五连涨。

zh: 隔夜市场，美元回暖，美元指数走出V字形态，截至北京时间07：30报90.8900。

google_en: At the same time, the U.S. unemployment rate remained at 4.1% in December, the lowest since 2000, and companies are expected to increase wages in the coming months.
zh: 同时，美国12月份失业率仍然保持在4.1%，为2000年以来最低，预计企业将未来几个月上涨工资。

google_en: Federal Reserve officials generally believe that tax reform is a factor supporting this moderately strong economic outlook. The Federal Reserve predicts economic growth of 2.5% in 2018 and raises interest rates three times.
zh: 美联储官员普遍认为税改是支持这个适度走强经济前景的一个因素，美联储预测2018年经济增长2.5%，加息3次。

google_en: The Economic Beige Book released by the Federal Reserve shows that almost all of the 12 Federal Reserve regions reported moderate to moderate growth in economic activity in early 2018 and remained optimistic about the outlook for this year.
zh: 美联储公布经济褐皮书显示，12个联储地区几乎都报告2018年初经济活动取得适度到温和的增长，对今年前景保持乐观。

google_en: Market participants pointed out that in recent times, the European Central Bank's expected tightening of monetary policy has pushed up the euro exchange rate, the U.S. dollar index has continued to decline, and the RMB exchange rate against the U.S. dollar has experienced a rapid rise. However, at present, the European Central Bank is unlikely to adjust its policy stance soon. After short-term fluctuations in the foreign exchange market, it will eventually return to fundamentals, and the continued smooth operation of the RMB exchange rate is a high probability event.
zh: 市场人士指出，近段时间，欧洲央行货币政策收紧预期推升欧元汇率，美元指数连续下滑，人民币对美元汇率相应出现一波快速拉升行情，不过目前看，欧洲央行不太可能很快调整政策立场，外汇市场短期波动后终究要向基本面回归，人民币汇率继续平稳运行是大概率事件。

google_en: It is worth noting that as the market's expectations for the RMB become more stable, the attractiveness of RMB assets to foreign investors has gradually become more prominent.
zh: 值得注意的是，随着市场对人民币预期更趋平稳，人民币资产对境外投资者的吸引力也逐渐凸显。

google_en: A Beijing News reporter learned from the Xinxiang County Party Committee Propaganda Department that a total of one person was injured in the explosion.

google_en: Videos posted by local netizens showed thick smoke billowing from the explosion site and accompanied by noises.
zh: 当地网友发布的视频显示，爆炸现场浓烟滚滚，并伴有响声。

google_en: Some netizens said that the explosion took place this morning at a chemical plant in Xiaoji Town, Xinxiang County, Henan Province.
zh: 有网友称，事发今日上午，爆炸地点是位于河南省新乡县小冀镇的一处化工厂。

google_en: A reporter from the Beijing News learned that the chemical plant where the incident occurred is Henan Xinxiang Liutong Industrial Co., Ltd.
zh: 新京报记者了解到，事发化工厂为河南省新乡六通实业有限公司。

google_en: Public information shows that the above-mentioned company was established in February 2002, and its business scope includes chemical product manufacturing.
zh: 公开资料显示，上述企业成立于2002年2月，经营范围中包括化工产品制造。

google_en: A reporter from the Beijing News noticed that as early as 2015, the chemical plant involved was exposed by the media, including Henan TV, for illegal sewage discharge.
zh: 新京报记者注意到，早在2015年，涉事化工厂就因违规排污，被包括河南电视台在内的媒体曝光。

google_en: This afternoon, the Xinxiang County Party Committee Propaganda Department responded that the explosion occurred at 7:50 a.m. and that the fire has been effectively controlled and one person was slightly injured. The cause of the incident is under investigation.
zh: 今日下午，新乡县委宣传部对此回应称，爆炸发生在上午7点50分，目前火情已得到有效控制，有1人受轻伤。事发原因正在调查中。

google_en: The China Securities Regulatory Commission announced on February 10, 2017 that it had approved the IPO applications of 12 companies in accordance with legal procedures that day, and required the above-mentioned companies and their underwriters to negotiate with the Shanghai and Shenzhen Stock Exchanges to determine the issuance schedule and publish prospectus documents one after another.
zh: 证监会2017年2月10日发布消息称，当日按照法定程序核准了12家企业的首发申请，并要求上述企业及其承销商将分别与沪深交易所协商确定发行日程，并陆续刊登招股文件。

google_en: On that day, the 85-year-old Yoji Yamada, the director of the original film "Family Trouble", took the trouble to fly to Beijing and visit the set in person.
zh: 当日原作《家族之苦》导演，85岁高龄的山田洋次不辞辛劳飞临北京，亲临片场探班。

google_en: A reporter from Beijing Business Daily found that Guangdong Shangpin Home Furnishing Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as Shangpin Home Delivery), which is targeting the small and medium-sized board of the Shenzhen Stock Exchange, was among them.
zh: 北京商报记者发现，瞄准深交所中小板的广东尚品宅配家居股份有限公司(以下简称尚品宅配)位列其中。

google_en: On December 26, reporters learned from the Municipal Environmental Protection Bureau that Lu'an City successfully applied for 98 national and provincial environmental protection projects in 2012, seeking special environmental protection funds totaling 145.26 million yuan.
zh: 12月26日，记者从市环保局了解到，2012年六安市共成功申报国家和省各类环保项目98个，争取环保专项资金共计14526万元。

google_en: According to the latest prospectus released by Shangpin Home Delivery, the company was founded in 2004 and is registered in Guangzhou. It is mainly engaged in the personalized customization production and sales of whole-house panel furniture and the sales of supporting home products. It also provides design, research and development and technical services of design software and overall information solutions to home furnishing industry enterprises.
zh: 根据尚品宅配最新公布的招股书，该公司成立于2004年，注册地为广州市，主要从事全屋板式家具个性化定制生产、销售及配套家居产品的销售，并向家居行业企业提供设计软件及信息化整体解决方案的设计、研发和技术服务。

google_en: Among them, there are 55 national-level environmental protection projects, striving for 132.46 million yuan in national environmental protection special funds; 43 provincial-level environmental protection projects, striving for 12.8 million yuan in provincial-level environmental protection special funds.
zh: 其中，国家级环保项目55个，争取国家环保专项资金13246万元；省级环保项目43个，争取省级环保专项资金1280万元。

google_en: It is understood that the project construction involves comprehensive management of regional water environment (including ecological environmental protection of Wabu Lake), environmental protection of drinking water sources, comprehensive improvement of rural environment, prevention and control of pollution from large-scale livestock and poultry breeding, pollution control of industrial enterprises, and demonstration of ecological city construction.
zh: 据了解，项目建设涉及到区域水环境综合治理(包括瓦埠湖生态环境保护)、饮用水源地环境保护、农村环境综合整治、规模化畜禽养殖污染防治、工业企业污染治理以及生态市建设示范等多个方面。

google_en: Today, four groups including Tonglu County in Zhejiang Province that have contributed to Beautiful China won the 8th China Environmental Award.
zh: 今天，浙江省桐庐县等4个为美丽中国作出贡献的群体荣获第八届中华环境奖。

google_en: After the implementation of the project, it will play a positive role in promoting the regional scientific development of Lu'an City, realizing lake recuperation, accelerating the improvement of water environment quality in the basin, ensuring the safety of drinking water, and promoting energy conservation and emission reduction.
zh: 项目实施后，对促进六安市区域科学发展，实现湖泊休养生息，加快流域水环境质量改善，保障饮用水安全，推进节能减排具有积极作用。

google_en: Li Wei, head of the selection committee and secretary-general of the China Environmental Protection Foundation, said that our country is facing ecological problems left over from the development model that emphasized GDP and ignored environmental protection in previous decades.
zh: 评选委员会负责人、中华环保基金会秘书长李伟说，我国正面临着前几十年重GDP、轻环保发展模式遗留下来的生态问题。

google_en: The selection of this year's China Environment Award aims to commend those units and individuals who have made contributions to improving the environment and people's livelihood, to show respect for public opinion.
zh: 本届中华环境奖的评选，旨在表彰那些为改善环境民生作出贡献的单位及个人，以体现对民意的尊重。

google_en: The China Environmental Award, established in 2000, is the highest award in the field of environmental protection in my country. The selection committee is composed of multiple central departments.
zh: 设立于2000年的中华环境奖是我国环境保护领域的最高奖项，由多个中央部门组成评选委员会。

google_en: Jarvis, Facebook CEO Mark Zuckerberg's home-made artificial intelligence assistant, will use the voice of American movie star Morgan Freeman, according to a popular vote.
zh: 根据大众的投票，Facebook CEO马克·扎克伯格（Mark Zuckerberg）自制家用人工智能助理Jarvis将使用美国影星摩根·弗里曼（Morgan Freeman）的声音。

google_en: In the opinion of the selection committee, Tonglu County in Zhejiang Province, which is based on ecological county establishment, should win this honor.
zh: 在评选委员会看来，以生态立县为本的浙江省桐庐县当获此殊荣。

google_en: The system, which runs in Zuckerberg's home, is named after Tony Stark's artificial intelligence assistant in the movie "Iron Man."
zh: 这套系统在扎克伯格家中运行，它的名字与电影《钢铁侠》中托尼·史塔克（Tony Stark）的人工智能助手相同。

google_en: Hubei police took down 4 cross-border telecommunications fraud gangs and involved more than 500 cases in 31 provinces, cities and counties, involving a total amount of more than 70 million yuan.
zh: 湖北警方跨国端掉4个电信诈骗团伙串并31个省市县500余起案件涉案金额7000余万元

google_en: Rokid, a developer of intelligent interactive robots, received new investment led by Temasek
zh: 智能交互机器人研发商Rokid获新投资 淡马锡领投

google_en: Reporter Cai Changchun of our newspaper "Legal Daily" reporter learned from the Ministry of Public Security today that a series of transnational telecommunications network fraud cases uncovered by the Ministry of Public Security and the police from Xiangyang, Hubei went to Malaysia with the cooperation of the Malaysian Police Headquarters. This is a relatively representative Taiwanese telecommunications network fraud case.
zh: 本报记者蔡长春《法制日报》记者今天从公安部了解到，由公安部指挥、湖北襄阳警方赴马来西亚，在马来西亚警察总署配合下破获的跨国系列电信网络诈骗案，是一起比较有代表性的台湾系电信网络诈骗案件。

google_en: In recent years, start-up companies in the field of artificial intelligence have continued to be favored by capital.
zh: 近年来，人工智能领域的初创公司持续受到资本热捧。

google_en: Artificial intelligence Rokid has recently completed a new round of financing, led by Temasek, followed by Credit Suisse, CDIB (an investment institution under Taiwan's China Development Financial Holdings), old shareholder IDG Capital and other investors.
zh: 人工智能Rokid即于近日完成新一轮融资，由淡马锡领投，瑞士信贷、CDIB（台湾中华开发金融控股公司旗下投资机构）、老股东IDG资本等机构跟投。

google_en: Rokid is a developer of intelligent interactive robots, dedicated to research in the field of robotics. Its products can control smart devices at home, have the function of continuous independent learning and growth, and also have functions such as recognition, understanding, and feedback.
zh: Rokid是一家智能交互机器人研发商,致力于机器人领域研究，产品可操控家中智能设备，具有能持续自主学习和成长功能，还具备识别、听懂、反馈等功能。

google_en: It is reported that the scale of this round of financing is approximately US$100 million, and it is the first time that Credit Suisse and CDIB have appeared in domestic financing transactions in the field of artificial intelligence.
zh: 据悉，本轮融资规模约为1亿美元，瑞信和CDIB首次在国内人工智能领域的融资交易中出现。

google_en: This round of financing will be mainly used for research and development, talent introduction, strategic promotion and investment layout of the industrial chain.
zh: 本轮融资将主要用于研发、人才引进、战略推动及产业链的投资布局。

google_en: At that time, Rokid said that the company’s valuation had reached US$450 million after Series B financing.
zh: 当时Rokid称，B轮融资后公司估值已达到4.5亿美元。

google_en: Previously, Rokid received US$8.3 million in angel round investment from IDG, Linear Capital, Mfund, and Yuanjing Capital in August 2014. ; In October 2015, the company received another tens of millions of dollars in Series A investment led by Walden International and followed by angel investors; on November 1, 2016, Rokid completed Series B financing led by Shangxuan Capital and followed by IDG, Mfund, Yuanjing Capital, Walden International and other institutions.
zh: 此前，Rokid曾于2014年8月，获得IDG、线性资本、Mfund、元璟资本830万美元天使轮投资。;2015年10月，公司又获得华登国际领投、天使投资方跟投的千万美元A轮投资;2016年11月1日，Rokid完成由尚珹资本领投，IDG、Mfund、元璟资本、华登国际等机构跟投的B轮融资。

google_en: In May 2017, Rokid released the consumer-grade intelligent voice robot "Ruoqi Yueshi", which combines artificial intelligence with home scenes and sells for 1,399 yuan.
zh: 2017年5月，Rokid发布了消费级智能语音机器人“若琪·月石”，将人工智能和家庭场景结合起来，售价为1399元。

google_en: It has won two awards at the International Consumer Electronics Show (CES) Tech For A Better World and Home Audio/Video Components And Accessories, as well as the German IF Design Award, known as the Oscars in the design industry.
zh: 曾获得国际消费电子产品展（CES）Tech For A Better World及Home Audio/Video Components And Accessories两项大奖，以及有设计界奥斯卡之称的德国IF设计奖。

google_en: This robot uses speech synthesis, natural language understanding, speech recognition technology and microphone array technology to have chat conversations, music playback, and smart home functions.
zh: 该款机器人使用语音合成、自然语言理解、语音识别技术和麦克风阵列技术，具有聊天对话、播放音乐、智能家居功能。

google_en: At the just-concluded 2018 CES, Rokid released another new product: consumer-grade augmented reality AR glasses RokidGlass.
zh: 在刚刚闭幕的2018CES上，Rokid又发布了一款新产品：消费级增强现实AR眼镜RokidGlass。

google_en: The glasses will be used as a standalone head-mounted display, meaning they do not need to be connected to a smartphone or external computer, and are expected to be commercialized in 2018.
zh: 该款眼镜将作为独立头显使用，即无需连接智能手机或外部电脑,预计将在2018年实现商业化。

google_en: This year coincides with the 135th anniversary of Lu Xun’s birth and the 80th anniversary of his death. In the words of screenwriter Yu Zhiqing: “Because I love Lu Xun, I have the urge to create.”
zh: 今年恰逢鲁迅诞辰135周年、逝世80周年，用编剧俞志清的话讲：“因为热爱鲁迅，所以才有了创作的冲动。”

google_en: Previously, the company has released its first-generation home robot RokidAlien and its second-generation smart speaker RokidPebble.
zh: 此前，公司已发布第一代产品家庭机器人RokidAlien和第二代产品智能音箱RokidPebble。

google_en: According to Apple, starting from February 28 this year, iCloud services in mainland China will be operated by Cloud Guizhou Company.
zh: 据苹果公司透露，从今年2月28日起，中国内地的iCloud服务将转由云上贵州公司负责运营。

google_en: Apple said, "The cooperation with Cloud Guizhou will allow us to continue to improve the speed and reliability of iCloud services, while also complying with China's new regulations that cloud services must be operated by local companies."
zh: 苹果公司表示，“与云上贵州的合作将使我们得以继续提高iCloud服务的速度以及可靠性，同时也符合中国的云服务须由本地企业运营的新规。”

google_en: If users want to use iCloud services after February 28 after deactivation, they need to accept the new terms and conditions first to ensure that the account is reactivated and moved to Guizhou on the cloud.
zh: 如果停用后用户希望在2月28日后使用iCloud服务，则需要先接受新的条款和条件，以确保账户被重新激活并迁至云上贵州。

google_en: During the deactivation period, the user's data previously stored in iCloud will also be saved in iCloud and will not be lost.
zh: 停用期间，用户此前储存在iCloud的数据资料还将保存在iCloud里，不会丢失。

google_en: At the same time, Apple also emphasized in its statement that "Apple has strong data privacy and security protection mechanisms and will not create backdoors in any of our systems."
zh: 同时，苹果公司在声明中也强调，“Apple拥有强大的数据隐私和安全保护机制，并且不会在我们的任何系统中创建后门。”

google_en: The iCloud Gui'an New District main data center will also be Apple's first data center project in China. After the project is completed, it will be used to store the data of Chinese Apple users.
zh: iCloud贵安新区主数据中心也将是是苹果公司在中国设立的第一个数据中心项目，项目落成后，将用于存储中国苹果用户的数据。

google_en: When completed and put into use, Chinese users will no longer need to transmit data back and forth over long distances between China and the United States, improving speed and reducing delays.
zh: 建成和投入使用时候，中国用户在上传和下载数据，就无需在跨越中美之间的长距离来回传输，提高速度，减少延迟。

google_en: Before joining Twitter in 2011, Messinger served as Oracle's vice president of development.
zh: 在2011年加入Twitter之前，梅辛格曾担任甲骨文的开发副总裁。

google_en: Fang Wenshan will direct one or two of these ten music IP works. When Jay Chou was asked whether he would help direct, Jay Chou admitted that being a director is too stressful and hopes to find some young directors to give them room to perform.
zh: 这十部音乐IP作品，方文山会自己执导一到两部，当周董被问到是否会帮忙执导时，周杰伦坦言当导演压力太大，希望找一些年轻的导演，让他们有发挥的空间。

google_en: The company is gearing up to produce the Model 3, its first long-range electric vehicle for the mass market, and plans to launch it by the end of 2017.
zh: 该公司正在加紧生产首款面向大众市场的长距离电动车Model 3，并计划在2017年底推出。

google_en: "The Legend of Dou Fu" is based on the story of Liu An, King of Huainan in the Han Dynasty in Chinese traditional culture. It is derived from the traditional allusion of "Liu An made tofu by mistake". It tells the story of the protagonist "Dou Fu" who transformed from a bean into a human form, overcame many difficulties, and persisted in his dream of cultivating immortality. This animated film about cute animals cultivating immortality has deep roots in Hubei’s local culture.
zh: 《豆福传》取材于中国传统文化中汉代淮南王刘安的故事，脱胎于“刘安做豆腐，因错而成”的传统典故，讲述了主人公“豆福”由一颗豆子幻化成人形，克服重重困难，坚持修仙梦想的故事。这部萌物修仙动画电影与湖北的地方文化渊源颇深。

google_en: The 3D family animated film "The Legend of Good Fortune" held its premiere in Wuhan on the 25th. The director of "The Legend of Good Fortune" Zou Yi, the animation director of "The Legend of Good Fortune" Meng Zhihui, and the film's soundtrack producer and Emmy Award winner Tom Disher all appeared to share the behind-the-scenes stories of the film's creation.
zh: 3D合家欢动画电影《豆福传》25日在武汉举行首映礼，《豆福传》导演邹燚，《豆福传》动画导演蒙智慧，影片配乐制作人、艾美奖得主TomDisher悉数亮相，现场分享电影创作的幕后故事。

google_en: Wudang Mountain in Shiyan City, Hubei Province is one of the world cultural heritage sites announced by the United Nations. It is also the birthplace of Taoist culture and Wudang martial arts. It is known as "an unparalleled scenic spot in ancient times and the best fairy mountain in the world."
zh: 湖北十堰市境内的武当山，是联合国公布的世界文化遗产地之一，也是道家文化和武当武术的发源地，被称为“亘古无双胜境，天下第一仙山”。

google_en: Director Zou Yi revealed that in the early stages of film creation, he and the creative team went to Wudang Mountain to collect stories.
zh: 导演邹燚透露，在影片创作前期，他曾与主创团队前往武当山采风。

google_en: In addition to Wudang Mountain, the birthplace of Taoist culture, Hubei also has a deep connection with chimes, a traditional musical instrument with a long history in China.
zh: 除了作为道家文化发源地的武当山，湖北还与中国历史悠久的传统乐器——编钟有着很深的渊源。

google_en: He said that the story of "The Legend of Dou Fu" took place during the reign of Emperor Wu of the Western Han Dynasty, when Liu An, the king of Huainan, was refining elixirs and cultivating immortality. The protagonist of the film, "Dou Fu", was a bean that accidentally transformed into a human form while Liu An was refining elixirs.
zh: 他表示，《豆福传》的故事便发生在西汉武帝年间，淮南王刘安炼丹修仙的背景下，影片主人公“豆福”便是一颗在刘安炼丹时意外幻化成人形的豆子。

google_en: At a recent international conference, experts predicted that within 25 years, robots equipped with artificial intelligence will enter people's bedrooms and provide various services to humans.
zh: 在近期召开的一次国际会议上，专家预计，在25年内具备人工智能的机器人将走进人们的卧室，为人类提供各种服务。

google_en: "Thunderstorm", created in 1934, is Cao Yu's first work. It is a symbol of the maturity of modern Chinese drama. It is also the Chinese drama that has been translated into the most languages ​​​​in various countries.
zh: 创作于1934年的《雷雨》是曹禺的第一部作品，是中国现代话剧成熟的标志，也是被翻译成各国语言文字最多的中国话剧。

google_en: Through research, scientists have discovered that one of the biggest characteristics of memory is its inaccuracy.
zh: 通过研究，科学家们发现记忆有一个最大的特点，就是其不准确性。

google_en: The reporter learned from recent interviews that the performance of steel, rail transit, shipbuilding, machinery manufacturing and other industries in Northeast China has generally declined, and even suffered losses.
zh: 记者近日采访了解到，东北地区钢铁、轨道交通、船舶、机械制造等行业效益普遍下滑，甚至出现亏损。

google_en: In the past, during economic downturns, low-end and primary products were mainly affected. However, in this economic fluctuation, both high-end and low-end industrial products of Northeast traditional industries have been affected.
zh: 以往在经济下行中，主要是低端、初级产品受冲击大的特点，但此次经济波动中，东北传统工业高端、低端工业产品都受到影响。

google_en: Enterprise efficiency has generally declined, and traditional industries are now experiencing losses. The raw materials industry and heavy machinery and equipment manufacturing industry have experienced serious declines in efficiency or even losses. This is the primary manifestation of the Northeastern industry in this round of economic downturn.
zh: 企业效益普遍下滑传统行业更现亏损原材料工业和重型机械设备制造业效益严重下滑甚至出现亏损，是本轮经济低迷中东北工业的首要表现。

google_en: Ansteel Group (Weibo) started by adjusting its product structure in the past few years, focusing on the development of high-end plates such as container plates, rails, ship plates and household appliance plates. However, the sales of these types have dropped significantly this year, especially the sales of ship plates fell by 50% compared with the same period last year.
zh: 鞍钢集团(微博)前些年从调整产品结构入手，重点发展集装箱板、钢轨、船板和民用家电板等高端板材，然而今年这些品种的销量都出现较大幅度下降，特别是船板销售比去年同期销量下滑了50%。

google_en: Some experts believe that under the current situation, the new round of revitalization of Northeast industry is not only related to the current economic recovery of the country, but will also have an impact on the long-term development and international competitiveness of my country's manufacturing industry. Therefore, adjustment and transformation are urgently needed.
zh: 一些专家认为，当前形势下，东北工业新一轮振兴不仅关系到全国本轮经济复苏，还将对我国制造业长远发展和国际竞争力产生影响，因此亟待调整转型。

google_en: Hao Qingshun, director of the Metallurgical Department of Anshan Iron and Steel Co., Ltd. (Liaoning Provincial Industry and Information Technology Commission) said that metallurgy is the third pillar industry in Liaoning, and its annual steel production capacity of 60 million tons ranks third in the country.
zh: 鞍钢股份(辽宁省工信委冶金处处长郝庆顺介绍说，冶金是辽宁的第三大支柱产业，年产6000万吨的钢铁产能排在全国第三位。

google_en: From January to May this year, Liaoning Province produced 21.54 million tons of crude steel. The production and sales of products required for projects encouraged by national policies and with strong local government construction efforts were good, while products with more fierce market competition experienced a larger decline, which is another characteristic of the Northeast manufacturing industry.
zh: 今年1-5月份，辽宁省粗钢产量2154万吨，国家政策鼓励、地方政府建设力度大的项目所需产品产销形势较好，市场竞争较为激烈的产品下降幅度较大，是东北制造行业呈现的又一特点。

google_en: In sharp contrast to his hard work and responsibility as an adult, Daniel Wu was very naughty and even rebellious in his childhood.
zh: 和成年后的努力、有担当形成鲜明反差的是，童年时期的吴彦祖很调皮，甚至可以说是叛逆。

google_en: Yang Yang said that he needed to mobilize his whole body's emotions to convey the character's hidden sadness to the audience. "This is a new challenge for my performance. During the acting process, I was really holding back my internal injuries."
zh: 杨洋表示需要调动起全身的情绪，来将角色隐忍的悲伤传递给观众，“这对我的表演是一个新的挑战，在演戏过程中我真的是快要憋到内伤”。

google_en: The movie "Three Lives Three Worlds, Ten Miles of Peach Blossom", which will be released on August 4, held a press conference for "I Come for You from All Over the World" in Beijing yesterday. "White Night Couple" Yang Yang and Liu Yifei appeared on the same stage.
zh: 即将于8月4日上映的电影《三生三世十里桃花》昨日在京举行“八荒四海为你而来”发布会，“白夜夫妇”杨洋、刘亦菲同台现身。

google_en: Yang Yang, who had just undergone surgery on his right ear a few days ago, made his first appearance after recovering from his injury. He interpreted his role as "a person who can express his emotions and anger without expressing his emotions". He always pays silently for Bai Qian and hides all his feelings in his heart.
zh: 前几天刚刚进行过右耳手术的杨洋，伤愈后首度现身，他解读自己的角色是“喜怒不形于色”，始终为白浅默默付出，将所有感情都藏在心底。

google_en: The Japanese Olympic Committee recently stated that the Japanese delegation’s goal for the 2020 Tokyo Olympics is to win 30 gold medals and advance to the top three in the gold medal list.
zh: 日本奥委会近日表示，日本代表团在2020年东京奥运会的金牌目标是30枚，并挺进金牌榜前三位。

google_en: Liu Yifei revealed that she "cryed so hard" while acting in this movie that she cried to the point of collapse at one point.
zh: 刘亦菲则透露，在演这部电影时自己简直“哭惨了”，一度哭到崩溃。

google_en: At the 2016 Rio Olympics, the Japanese delegation ranked sixth in the gold medal list with 12 gold medals.
zh: 在2016年里约奥运会上，日本代表团以12金位列金牌榜第六位。

google_en: The representatives formed their own teams, held umbrellas, and entered the venue one after another.
zh: 代表们自己组队，撑着伞，陆续步入会场。

google_en: In October last year, Yasuhiro Yamashita, chairman of the Sports Committee of the Japanese Olympic Committee, said that he expected Japanese athletes to win 2.5 times more gold medals in the Tokyo Olympics than in the Rio Olympics.
zh: 去年10月，日本奥委会运动委员会主席山下泰裕就表示，期待日本健儿在东京奥运会上的金牌总数是里约奥运会的2.5倍。

google_en: The roads around the venue are open to traffic normally. There are no balloons, banners, red carpets, plants or flowers outside the venue.
zh: 会场周围的道路正常通行，会场外没有气球标语，没有红地毯，没有摆放植物和鲜花。

google_en: Yesterday, the second meeting of the Fourth People's Congress of Guang'an City was held simply.
zh: 昨日，广安市四届人大第二次会议简朴召开。

google_en: Walking into the Guang'an Convention and Exhibition Center, there were no slogans, no teacups, and not even a bottle of ordinary mineral water.
zh: 走进广安会展中心，会场没有标语，没有茶杯，甚至连一瓶普通的矿泉水都没有。

google_en: The meeting materials were thinner than before, and the theme and agenda of the meeting were summarized in just a few pieces of paper.
zh: 会议材料相对于以前薄了一些，几张纸就把会议的主题和议程概括完了。

google_en: "Frugality is for the people, and those who are frugal must be frugal. We understand and welcome the return to the current simple and real meeting environment." Wang Cheng, deputy to the Guang'an Municipal People's Congress, said that meetings that are efficient, pragmatic, and non-formalistic are what they are willing to see and participate in.
zh: “节约为民，当节俭的一定要节俭。回归到现在的朴实、实在的开会环境，我们很理解，也很欢迎。”广安市人大代表王成表示，高效务实、不搞形式主义的会议是他们愿意看见和参与的。

google_en: Instead, there is a simple banner, a meeting place, a simple environmentally friendly paper document bag for meeting materials, and an environmentally friendly paper cup for tea.
zh: 取而代之的是一个简单的横幅，一个开会的位置，一个装会议材料的简易环保纸质文件袋，一个环保纸杯盛装的茶水。

google_en: Experts point out that the current inflation and deflationary pressures have slowed down, which is undoubtedly good news for the financial transition period.
zh: 专家指出，当前通胀、通缩压力均有所减缓，这对财经转型期而言无疑是个好消息。

google_en: Major car dealers in California have a total of 22 electric vehicles on sale, but other states have much fewer choices. The second-ranked state only has 14 models, and there are even 6 states without any electric vehicles for sale.
zh: 加州的各大汽车经销商共有22款电动汽车在售，但其他州的选择少得多，位居第二的州只有14款车型，甚至有6个州没有任何电动汽车销售。

google_en: The China Seismological Network officially determined that an earthquake of magnitude 8.0 occurred in New Zealand (42.53 degrees south latitude, 173.05 degrees east longitude) at 19:02 on November 13, with a focal depth of 10 kilometers, and the earthquake was strongly felt in the capital Wellington.
zh: 中国地震台网正式测定，11月13日19时02分在新西兰(南纬42.53度，东经173.05度)发生8.0级地震，震源深度10千米，首都惠灵顿震感强烈。

google_en: News on February 10: The reporter learned from the Changzhou Municipal Agricultural Committee yesterday that based on the successful creation of a national forest city in 2016, this year, Changzhou City will further implement the "Jiangsu Province Changzhou National Forest City Construction Master Plan (2014-2025)" to consolidate and improve the achievements of the national forest city construction and build a high-quality forest city that is green, harmonious, and shared by all.
zh: 2月10日消息：记者昨天从常州市农委获悉，在2016年成功创成国家森林城市的基础上，今年，常州市将深入实施《江苏省常州国家森林城市建设总体规划（2014-2025）》，巩固提升国家森林城市建设成果，建设绿色和谐、全民共享的高品质森林城市。

google_en: The Facebook CEO said about a year ago that he would develop an artificial intelligence system as his annual challenge.
zh: 这位Facebook CEO大约1年前就表示要开发一款人工智能系统，将此作为自己的年度挑战。

google_en: In 2015, Hou Weigui led a team to inspect many car manufacturers for the purpose of technical cooperation or mergers and acquisitions.
zh: 2015年，出于技术合作或并购目的，侯为贵曾带队考察了许多车厂。

google_en: It is reported that the 59th Grammy Awards will be held on February 12, 2017 local time in the United States (early morning of February 13, Beijing time). The host will be British comedian James Corden.
zh: 据悉，第59届格莱美颁奖礼将于美国当地时间2017年2月12日（北京时间2月13日早）举行，主持人由英国喜剧演员詹姆斯·柯登(James Corden)担任。

google_en: Throughout all previous Grammy Awards, Beyoncé and Adele both hold the title of female singers who have won the most Grammy awards in a single session.
zh: 纵观历届格莱美，碧昂斯和阿黛尔都拥有着单届格莱美夺奖最多的女歌手头衔。

google_en: With the upgrading of communication technology, operators need a large number of site resources when building new networks.
zh: 随着通信技术的升级换代，运营商在新建网络时需要大量的站址资源。

google_en: Land and resources and other relevant departments must take the initiative to serve, focus on the overall work of the transformation and comprehensive reform pilot zone, and actively strive for national policy support.
zh: 国土资源等有关部门要主动服务，着眼转型综改试验区工作全局，积极争取国家政策支持。

google_en: News on July 26: On July 22, reporters learned from Hongqiao District that the city’s largest riverside linear park, the greening landscape improvement project on both sides of the South Canal in Hongqiao District, was completed and open to the public free of charge.
zh: 7月26日消息：7月22日，记者从红桥区获悉，本市市区最大的沿河带状公园，红桥区南运河两岸绿化景观提升工程完工并免费向市民开放。

google_en: About 1,500 meters of plastic corridors are also laid in the green spaces on both sides of the river between Jinhua Bridge and Xinsantiao Stone Bridge, with distance signs on the corridors.
zh: 在金华桥至新三条石桥之间的两侧河岸绿地中还铺设了约1500米的塑胶甬道，甬道上注有距离标志。

google_en: The entire landscape belt has taken advantage of the original natural ecology and historical and cultural resources to re-plan and upgrade the two sides of the South Canal, creating five riverside landscapes: Tianzi Jindu Heritage Park, Wellington Plaza, Xintiandi Fengqing Street, West Station Corridor, Shuixi Heritage Green Corridor.
zh: 整个景观带借助原有自然生态和历史文化资源优势，对南运河两岸进行了重新规划和提升改造，打造出天子津渡遗址公园惠灵顿广场新天地风情街西站走廊水西遗韵绿廊五个沿河景观。

google_en: On May 15, Gao Jianmin, member of the Standing Committee of the Provincial Party Committee and Executive Vice Governor, conducted an investigation at the Provincial Guoxin Energy Development Group on accelerating the comprehensive management of gasification Shanxi and coalbed methane resources.
zh: 5月15日，省委常委、常务副省长高建民在省国新能源发展集团就加快推进气化山西及煤层气资源的综合管理工作进行调研。

google_en: In addition to planting a variety of flowers, plants and trees on both sides of the corridor, a children's playground was also built and decorated with multiple groups of sculptures.
zh: 甬道两旁除栽种多种花草树木外，还修建了一处儿童游乐场地，并点缀设置了多组雕塑小品。

google_en: One reason for the poor sales of electric vehicles is that these products are not promoted enough.
zh: 电动汽车销量不佳的原因之一在于这些产品的宣传力度不够。

zh: 据2014年国家最新全民健身状况调查公报数据，相比2007年，运动健身的人群增长近8个百分点。

zh: 行走中可以发现，岸边还修建了座椅、甬道、小桥、亲水平台和供儿童嬉戏的沙池等，使两岸绿化景观和水系融为一体，为市民提供了又一处休闲、健身及娱乐好去处。

zh: 李克强举行仪式，欢迎俄罗斯总理访华。

google_en: How to deal with the "subsidy fraud" incident of my country's new energy vehicles has attracted great attention from the whole society and even the international automobile industry since the incident was exposed in January this year. The State Council attaches great importance to it and requires serious investigation and punishment of fraudulent subsidy behavior.
zh: 对于如何处理我国新能源汽车“骗补”事件，自今年1月事件曝光以来受到全社会乃至国际汽车产业界的高度关注，国务院高度重视，要求严肃查处骗补行为。

zh: 十二届全国人大常委会第三十次会议举行第三次全体会议。

zh: 共同会见记者，并出席中俄媒体交流年闭幕式。

zh: 李克强与俄罗斯总理共同主持中俄总理第二十二次定期会晤

zh: 张德江作关于检查固体废物污染环境防治法实施情况的报告。

zh: 全国政协十二届常委会第二十三次会议闭幕。

google_en: "Walking around the ancient town of Anchang, Shaoxing, you can see traditional handicrafts such as barrel hoops, bamboo weaving, blacksmithing, shoemaking, lace picking, and cotton spinning everywhere, which fully demonstrate the intangible cultural heritage of the ancient town of Anchang. Tourists from all over the world are intoxicated by the atmosphere of watching and experiencing Shaoxing's folk customs and appreciating the historical and cultural accumulation of Shaoxing.
zh: ”漫步绍兴安昌古镇，随处可见箍桶、竹编、打铁、纳鞋、挑花边、纺棉花等传统手工技艺，充分展现了安昌古镇的非物质文化遗产，四方游客陶醉在观赏体验绍兴民俗风情、领略绍兴历史文化积淀的氛围中。

google_en: Nowadays, these small towns have become important destinations for tourists visiting Zhejiang to appreciate Zhejiang’s landscapes, taste Zhejiang culture, and feel Zhejiang nostalgia. google_en: Better than style
