google_en: She believes that our globalization has actually ignored the most important issues, which are the issues of the substance and application of globalization, as well as the stages of globalization.
zh: 她认为我们全球化其实忽略了最重要的问题，就是全球化的体与用的问题，还有全球化的阶段问题。

google_en: Many people think that globalization has stagnated, and many developed and developing countries have different attitudes towards globalization in the new stage, which means they have different models.
zh: 这样子很多人认为全球化停滞了，而且很多发达国家和发展中国家，在新的阶段里面他们对全球化的态度不一样，是对模式的不一样。

google_en: The second concept is the issue of the mid-term stage of globalization. What are the constraints on the mid-term stage of globalization?
zh: 第二个概念就是全球化中期阶段的问题，全球化的中期阶段受什么制约呢？

google_en: Restricted by the economic environment, it is precisely because the economic foundation has changed that globalization has been restricted.
zh: 受经济环境基础的制约，正是因为经济基础发生了变化全球化才发生了制约。

google_en: Zhang Li believes that the global economic adjustment will basically end at the end of 2017 and will enter a new round of growth after 2018. The next round of growth must be driven by production products.
zh: 张莉认为，2017年底全球经济调整基本上结束，2018年之后将进入新一轮增长期，下一轮增长一定是生产品拉动。

google_en: 7FRESH, JD.com’s first fresh food supermarket, officially opened recently and plans to open more than 1,000 stores across the country in the next three to five years.
zh: 京东首家生鲜超市7FRESH近日正式开业，计划未来3到5年在全国铺设超过1000家门店。

google_en: In addition to Alibaba's Hema Fresh, Yonghui's Super Species, Suning's Su Xiansheng, Meituan's Zhangyu Fresh, etc., "new retail stores" began to appear together, and "challenged" each other in terms of innovative models and even prices.
zh: 加上阿里的盒马鲜生、永辉的超级物种、苏宁的苏鲜生、美团的掌鱼生鲜等，“新零售门店”开始扎堆出现，并在创新模式甚至价格上互相“叫板”。

google_en: The competition for fresh food supermarkets has escalated and has become a phenomenon-level topic in the new retail field. What is new in new retail?
zh: 生鲜超市争夺战升级，已经成为新零售领域的现象级话题，新零售到底新在哪？

google_en: Hou Yi, CEO of Hema Fresh, revealed the “new strategy” for 2018 at the second New Retail Summit on the 10th.
zh: 盒马鲜生CEO侯毅10日在第二届新零售峰会上透露了2018年的“新打法”。

google_en: "In 2018, we will quickly enter the country and open a lot of stores in Beijing, Shanghai and Hangzhou before the Spring Festival."
zh: “2018年我们会快速进入全国，春节前在北京、上海、杭州会开出一大堆的店。”

google_en: “Starting from 2018, Hema is not only a fresh food e-commerce company, but also a lifestyle e-commerce company that meets consumers’ immediate needs.
zh: “从2018年开始，盒马不单单是一家生鲜电商，而是满足消费者即时服务的生活品类电商。

google_en: The core model is offline to attract traffic and experience, while online is real sales. "
zh: 核心模式线下是引流、体验，线上是真正的销售。”

google_en: Online e-commerce platforms and offline retailers each have their own advantages and disadvantages, but consumers appear in multiple channels, so both parties are trying an omni-channel model.
zh: 线上电商平台和线下零售商各有优缺点，消费者却是在多种渠道出现，所以双方都在尝试全渠道模式。

google_en: Different from traditional hypermarkets and supermarkets, Hema Xiansheng is a fun and delicious "Internet celebrity store" in the eyes of many consumers. Some intermediaries have even developed the concept of "box area housing".
zh: 区别于传统的大卖场、超市，盒马鲜生在很多消费者眼里是一家好玩好吃的“网红店”，甚至有中介机构打出了“盒区房”的概念。

google_en: The industry believes that under the background of consumption upgrading, there will be more and more "Hema-like" stores in 2018.
zh: 业内认为，在消费升级的大背景下，2018年“类盒马”的门店会越来越多。

google_en: Hema has continued to explore more consumer fields from its original fresh food business, which indicates that there will be more innovations in the retail market in the new year.
zh: 而盒马从最初的生鲜不断探索到更多消费领域，预示了在新的一年里，零售市场将出现更多创新。

google_en: "For example, the business model that combines online and offline services has attracted the attention of consumers, and the fresh food supermarkets opened in various places have become popular and popular."
zh: “比如线上线下结合的业务模式，吸引了消费者的眼球，各地开出的生鲜超市叫座又叫好。”

google_en: The rush of capital to enter the market has made the current new retail market, represented by fresh food supermarkets, full of excitement.
zh: 资本的争相入局，让目前以生鲜超市为代表的新零售火药味十足。

google_en: According to Yuan Bin, co-CEO of RT-Mart Feiniu.com, in the new retail environment, consumer habits have changed and purchasing needs have also changed.
zh: 在大润发飞牛网联席CEO袁彬看来，新零售环境下，消费者习惯改变了，购买需求也改变了。

google_en: "But no matter how much you talk about these relationships, it's useless no matter how showy they are. In the end, it comes down to whether you bring a wonderful experience to consumers. Only after I experience it will I be willing to pay."
zh: “但这些关系说得再多，再炫都没用，最后落实到你是不是给消费者带来了美好的体验，我体验好了才愿意买单。”

google_en: It used to be that purely online and offline were separated. Offline had to defeat online, and online had to counterattack offline. Now they are holding hands together, because consumers no longer distinguish between online and offline.
zh: 原来纯线上、线下是割裂的，线下要打败线上，线上要反攻线下，现在是一起牵手，因为消费者已经没有线上线下的区分了。

google_en: Analysts believe that the current competition of new retail in first-tier cities is far from reaching the red ocean pattern, and there are still a large number of second-tier cities that have yet to be explored, and the market still has great opportunities and space.
zh: 分析认为，目前新零售在一线城市的竞争还远未到红海的格局，而且还有大片的二线城市尚待挖掘，市场仍有很大机会和空间。

google_en: CCTV Financial Channel, together with the Institute of Financial Strategy of the Chinese Academy of Social Sciences, has sorted out a piece of useful information for everyone, which is this heavy annual development report of China’s e-commerce.
zh: 央视财经频道联合中国社科院财经战略研究院，给大家梳理了一份干货，就是这份沉甸甸的中国电商年度发展报告。

google_en: The layout of new retail in different types of industries will bring the development of new retail into a diversified development state.
zh: 不同类型的行业对于新零售的布局，会将新零售的发展带入一个多元化的发展状态。

google_en: What kind of report card has China's e-commerce produced over the past year?
zh: 这一年来，中国电商出了一份怎样的成绩单？

google_en: Let’s reveal it to you one by one.
zh: 我们来一一为大家揭晓。

google_en: Total sales volume breaks record again, growth returns to accelerating track
zh: 销售总量再破记录增速重回加速轨道

google_en: What are the development trends of global e-commerce?
zh: 全球电商又都有哪些发展趋势？

google_en: But starting in 2013, the growth rate of online retail began to drop below 50%. In 2015, the growth rate was lower than 40% for the first time. In 2016, the growth rate actually became 26.2%.
zh: 但从2013年开始，网上零售增速开始降至50%以下，2015年，增速首次低于40%，2016年增速居然变成了26.2%。

google_en: But this year the situation is different. Online retail sales have accelerated again. From January to September this year, the growth rate rebounded to 34.2%.
zh: 但是今年情况就不一样了，网上零售额重新加速，今年1-9月份，增速回升至34.2 %。

google_en: Since 2006, my country’s online retail sales have been growing at a very high speed. It is probably because at that time, online shopping was very new and it was so cool to be able to buy things without going out!
zh: 从2006年开始，我国网上零售额可以说一直呈现超高速增长，估计是那会儿觉得网购很新鲜，不出门也能买东西，太酷了！

google_en: Much higher than the growth rate in 2015 and 2016.
zh: 大大高于2015年、2016年的增长率。

google_en: Among them, online retail sales of physical goods were nearly 5.08 trillion yuan, and online retail sales of services were nearly 1.49 trillion yuan.
zh: 其中，实物商品网上零售额近5.08万亿元，服务网上零售额近1.49万亿元。

google_en: Maybe after you go shopping for a while, you may find that shopping makes you more physically and mentally happy.
zh: 可能大家在外兜兜转转一圈，发现还是买买买更让人身心愉悦。

google_en: Students, don’t doze off. Focus on the key points. Serving online retail sales is definitely a big contributor!
zh: 同学们，别打瞌睡，划重点了，服务网上零售额绝对是一大功臣啊！

google_en: Secondly, French netizens who love shopping have an average online shopping volume of US$1,925 per capita, and the most popular product they buy online is clothing. It is indeed a country that loves fashion.
zh: 其次爱剁手的法国网民，人均网购额为1925美元，而他们网购最多的商品，是服装，不愧是爱时尚的国度。

google_en: It accounted for 13.6% of the total retail sales of social commodities, an increase of nearly 3 percentage points year-on-year.
zh: 在社会商品总零售额中占比达到13.6 %，同比提高近3个百分点。

google_en: This year's Swimming World Cup event returns to the 25-meter short pool and consists of nine sub-stations, one more European station than in 2015.
zh: 今年游泳世界杯的赛事回归25米短池，由9个分站比赛组成，比2015年多一个欧洲站。

google_en: As a world-class player who defeated Ding Junhui in the snooker event at the 2010 Guangzhou Asian Championships and won the gold medal in the event, Marco Fu should be the most well-known snooker player among active athletes in Hong Kong.
zh: 作为曾在2010年广州亚军会斯诺克项目中击败丁俊晖，获得该项目金牌的世界级选手，傅家俊应该是香港现役运动员中知名度最高的斯诺克球手。

google_en: Are young people necessarily the ones who love online shopping the most?
zh: 最爱网购的，一定是年轻人吗？

google_en: The unveiling ceremony of the "Chinese Language Inventory 2016" sponsored by the National Language Resources Monitoring and Research Center, the Commercial Press, and People's Daily Online was held in Beijing today.
zh: 由国家语言资源监测与研究中心、商务印书馆、人民网主办的“汉语盘点2016”揭晓仪式今天在京举行。

google_en: Sterling's controversial goal to beat Arsenal was a timely shot in the arm for Manchester City, which had lost two of the previous three rounds.
zh: 斯特林争议进球绝杀阿森纳，之于此前3轮2场败北的曼城，着实是一针太及时的强心剂。

google_en: In the men's 50-meter backstroke, Chinese player Xu Jiayu ranked eighth with a time of 23.54 seconds, and Japanese player Yu Hejun also won the championship with a time of 22.85 seconds.
zh: 男子50米仰泳，中国选手徐嘉余以23秒54的成绩排名第八，日本选手谷赫纯也以22秒85夺冠。

google_en: This drama director, who was born in the 1940s, is a highly respected veteran in the industry, winner of the Golden Lion Award for drama, and enjoys special allowances from the State Council.
zh: 这位出生于上世纪40年代的话剧导演，是业界德高望重的老前辈，话剧金狮奖得主，享受国务院特殊津贴。

google_en: Report from our newspaper (Reporter Lu Bo) On May 12, Vice Mayor Chen Luping went to Yongchuan to investigate and hold a symposium on the district’s implementation of rectification feedback from the central environmental protection inspectorate and the comprehensive management of the Linjiang River Basin. It is understood that in order to effectively implement the rectification work of the central environmental protection inspection feedback, Yongchuan District established a working leading group and divided the rectification tasks into 21 district-level leading departments and 23 leading towns. The relevant rectification work has been fully launched.
zh: 本报讯（记者卢波）5月12日，副市长陈绿平赴永川，就该区落实整改中央环保督察反馈意见和临江河流域综合治理进行调研，并举行座谈会。 据了解，为扎实抓好中央环保督察反馈意见整改工作，永川区成立了工作领导小组，将整改任务分解到21个区级牵头部门和23个牵头镇街，相关整改工作已全面启动。

google_en: The urban emotional business drama "Chicken Feathers Flying to the Sky" is currently being broadcast on Jiangsu Satellite TV. The drama tells the story of the arduous, twists and turns and passionate entrepreneurial and emotional history of three generations.
zh: 都市情感商业大剧《鸡毛飞上天》正在江苏卫视热播，该剧讲述了三代人既艰辛曲折又充满激情的创业史和情感史故事。

google_en: Australian Bureau of Statistics (ABS) data shows that in the second quarter of this year, house values ​​across Australia rose by an average of 1.5% to 2%, an annual increase of 3.5%, the lowest annual growth rate since March 2013.
zh: 澳洲统计局(ABS)数据显示，今年第二季度，全澳房屋价值平均上涨1.5%至2%，年增3.5%，创自2013年3月以来最低年增率。

google_en: Just as real estate agents look to sell more properties during the festive season, Australia's house price growth has hit its lowest level since 2013.
zh: 就在房产中介期待在节日季出售更多房产之际，澳洲房价增幅却创2013年以来最低水平。

google_en: IT House reported in the morning that the Wall Street Journal reported that AT&T has canceled its plan to sell Huawei's new flagship smartphone in the United States.
zh: IT之家上午报道，华尔街日报消息称AT&T已经取消计划在美国销售华为新旗舰智能手机的计划。

google_en: Huawei originally planned to announce the partnership at CES this week, but AT&T canceled it at the last minute.
zh: 华为原计划本周在CES上宣布该合作关系，AT&T在最后一刻取消了这一合作。

google_en: In response to this situation, Huawei responded to reporters from The Paper on January 9, saying that on January 9, local time in the United States, Huawei will release new products and specific launch information to the US market.
zh: 针对这一情况，华为方面1月9日回应澎湃新闻记者表示，美国当地时间1月9日，华为将向美国市场发布新产品以及具体上市信息。

google_en: Huawei said that in the past five years, Huawei has proven its strength by launching high-end products in the global and US markets.
zh: 华为表示，过去5年，华为已通过在全球和美国市场推出高端产品，证明自己的实力。

google_en: According to previous reports from IT House, Huawei will release "the best mobile phone you have never heard of" at the CES show in Las Vegas on the afternoon of January 9, and the battery life of this mobile phone can support two days of use.
zh: 据IT之家此前的报道，华为将于1月9日下午在拉斯维加斯CES大展上发布一款“你从未听说过的最好手机”，并且这款手机的续航能力能够支撑两天的使用。

google_en: The industry generally believes that Huawei’s upcoming flagship phone will be the Huawei Mate 10 Pro equipped with Android Oreo system.
zh: 业界普遍认为，华为即将发布的这款旗舰手机，即是搭载Android Oreo系统的华为Mate 10 Pro。

google_en: Yangcheng Evening News reporter Wang Li's movie "I'm Not Pan Jinlian", led by Fan Bingbing and starring Guo Tao, Dapeng, Zhang Jiayi, etc., will be released nationwide on September 30.
zh: 羊城晚报记者王莉由范冰冰领衔，郭涛、大鹏、张嘉译等主演的电影《我不是潘金莲》将于9月30日全国上映。

google_en: Yesterday, the film held a seminar on the theme of "The Sadness of Comedy" in Beijing. Three guests, Feng Xiaogang, Ning Hao, and Dapeng, attended the event.
zh: 昨天，该片在北京举行“喜剧的忧伤”主题研讨会，冯小刚、宁浩、大鹏三位嘉宾出席活动。

google_en: Feng Xiaogang explained: "This subject matter is very similar to "Qiu Ju's Lawsuit" directed by Zhang Yimou. It's easy for everyone to associate it with each other. I just wanted to shoot it in a way that no one has ever used. Actually, I don't have any special ideas. I just think it's fun and want to do something out of the ordinary."
zh: 冯小刚解释：“这个题材跟张艺谋导演的《秋菊打官司》很像，大家很容易联想到一块儿，我就想怎么用大家没用过的方式去拍。其实没有什么特别的想法，就是觉得好玩，想干点出格的事。”

google_en: The composition alternates between squares and circles, and the director is willful. The special feature of "I'm Not Pan Jinlian" is the alternation between squares and circles in the composition, especially the circular images shot with masked lenses, which are very fresh.
zh: 构图方圆交替，导演就是任性《我不是潘金莲》的特别之处，是构图方圆交替，特别是以遮罩镜头拍出的圆形画面很有新鲜感。

google_en: According to reporters from The Paper, ZTE’s smart car team is headquartered in Zhuhai and is managed by Tian Wenguo, executive vice president of ZTE.
zh: 据澎湃新闻记者了解，中兴智能汽车团队总部设在珠海，操盘人为中兴通讯执行副总裁田文果。

google_en: All large energy companies are "as rich as the country." So among the many energy companies in the world, who is taking advantage of the most money?
zh: 大型能源公司个个都“富可敌国”，那么全球众多能源公司中谁最趁钱呢？

google_en: Feng Xiaogang said that he regarded the work as his debut and learned from the photographer how to shoot circular images. He even spent millions of yuan to let the photographer shoot a ten-minute test film.
zh: 冯小刚称自己把作品当成处女作，跟摄影师学习怎么拍圆形画面，甚至花了几百万元让摄影师拍了一个十分钟的试片。

google_en: Yesterday, the famous PFC Energy Company announced the ranking of the top 50 listed energy companies in 2011. ExxonMobil, an American oil and gas producer, retained the title with a market value of US$406.3 billion, followed closely by PetroChina and Royal Dutch Shell.
zh: 昨日，著名的PFC能源公司公布了2011年上市能源公司50强排名，美国石油天然气生产商埃克森美孚以4063亿美元的市值蝉联冠军，中国石油和荷兰皇家壳牌紧随之后。

google_en: In the 2011 top 50 list, a total of three companies from mainland China were shortlisted. In addition to PetroChina, which ranked second, there were also Sinopec, which ranked ninth, and China National Offshore Oil Corporation, which ranked fifteenth.
zh: 在2011年的50强榜单中，共有3家来自中国内地的公司入围，除了排名第2的中石油，还有第9位的中国石化和第15位的中国海洋石油。

google_en: In PFC's list, PetroChina claimed the top spot twice in 2007 and 2009, and the top spot in other years was all occupied by Exxon Mobil.
zh: 在PFC的这份榜单中，中石油曾于2007年和2009年两度问鼎，其他年份榜首位置全部由埃克森美孚占据。

google_en: According to Xinhua News Agency, the heavily polluted weather in the Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei and surrounding areas that started on the 16th further intensified on the 19th, with AQI in the three cities of Shijiazhuang, Xinji, and Handan in Hebei Province "exploding".
zh: 据新华社报道，京津冀及周边地区从16日开始的重污染天气到了19日进一步加剧，河北石家庄、辛集、邯郸3市AQI出现“爆表”。

google_en: According to PFC statistics, although the current oil price is much higher than four years ago, the CEO of PFC Energy pointed out that there are many reasons for the low total market value, including the decline in natural gas prices in North America and low activity in the global stock market.
zh: 根据PFC的统计，不过，尽管目前的油价远比4年前要高，对此，PFC能源公司CEO指出，导致总市值低的原因有很多，主要包括北美天然气价格的下降，以及全球股票市场的活跃度低。

google_en: On May 29, the first China Fireworks and Firecrackers Safety and Environmental Protection Expo will be held in Liuyang.
zh: 5月29日，首届中国烟花爆竹安全环保博览会将在浏阳举行。

google_en: This expo will invite a large number of experts and entrepreneurs to conduct academic exchanges in the fireworks and firecrackers industry and share the latest technological achievements in the safety and environmental protection of fireworks and firecrackers.
zh: 本次博览会将邀请大批专家、企业家，进行烟花爆竹行业学术交流，共享烟花爆竹安全环保最新技术成果。

google_en: The event centered on the theme of "technology, safety, and environmental protection" and lasted for 2 days. By then, the most advanced fireworks machinery, the safest and most environmentally friendly fireworks raw and auxiliary materials and new products in the national fireworks and firecrackers industry will gather in Liuyang.
zh: 活动围绕“科技、安全、环保”主题展开，为期2天。届时，全国烟花爆竹行业中最先进的花炮机械、最安全环保的花炮原辅材料和新产品将齐聚浏阳。

google_en: Among them, the mechanized production equipment of fireworks and firecrackers and the display of safe and environmentally friendly products will be held in Dayao Town. The main exhibition items include pharmaceutical-related machinery and equipment for the production of fireworks and firecrackers that have mature technology and have passed relevant scientific and technological appraisals and safety demonstrations, safe pyrotechnic powders such as low sensitivity and low explosive energy, and safe and environmentally friendly personal discharge products such as sulfur-free and low-smoke.
zh: 其中，烟花爆竹机械化生产设备和安全环保产品展示将在大瑶镇进行，主要参展项目包括技术成熟、经过相关科技鉴定和安全论证的烟花爆竹生产涉药机械设备，低感度、低爆能等安全型烟火药，无硫、微烟等安全环保型个人燃放产品。

google_en: At the same time, the display of safe and environmentally friendly fireworks and firecrackers products organized by 16 fireworks companies in Liuyang is divided into two stages: product selection and product display. The outstanding new products that have passed the preliminary selection will be displayed at the Liuyang fireworks viewing platform and Jintan display field on the evening of May 29.
zh: 同时，由浏阳16家花炮企业集体承办的烟花爆竹安全环保产品燃放展示则分为产品遴选和产品燃放展示两个阶段进行，通过前期评选的优秀新产品将于5月29日晚在浏阳市花炮观礼台和金滩燃放场进行燃放展示。

Then, Lockheed Martin of the United States recently announced the latest plan for the U.S. FFG frigate plan. So where should China's new frigates go?
zh: 随着近期世界各大海军强国先后公布了新型护卫舰的建造计划，仿佛一夜之间护卫舰有成了各大强国海军关注的焦点，先是日本在2018年度防卫预算中确定采购两艘新型护卫舰，使得日本DEX护卫舰计划终于有了实质性的突破，后是美国洛克希德马丁于近期公布了美国FFG护卫舰计划的最新方案，那么中国的新型护卫舰该何去何从呢？

google_en: The reason why so many 054As are built is also very simple, that is, they are affordable, easy to use, and can supplement the navy's debts over the years.
zh: 而为何要建造这么多054A的原因也很简单，那就是实惠、好用、外加补充多年来的海军欠账。

google_en: But after all, this is a ship designed in the early 21st century. Weapon configuration aside, its power system and electronic radar equipment are far behind compared with the current mainstream frigates in the world. As the same type of frigates in Europe are already equipped with all-electric propulsion, small multi-functional phased array radars, and large-sized helicopter decks, it is time to develop new models.
zh: 但是这毕竟是一型21世纪初设计的舰艇，武器配置放在一边，其动力系统和电子雷达设备与目前世界主流护卫舰相比已经存在很大差距，像欧洲的同类型护卫舰已经配备全电力推进、小型多功能相控阵雷达、大尺寸直升机甲板的情况下，也到了发展新型号的时候了。

google_en: The 054A frigate has been favored by the Chinese Navy for many years due to its high cost performance and good combat effectiveness. Its displacement of about 4,000 tons is equipped with a 76mm main gun, 32-unit Haihongqi-16 and Yu-8 anti-submarine missiles co-launched It has a vertical launch system, 8 YJ-83s and a Z-9 helicopter. Although it was built in 2006 and was designed very early, its combat effectiveness is not too bad even today. It can reach the upper-middle level among frigates around the world.
zh: 054A护卫舰凭借较高的性价比和不错的战斗力多年以来一直得到中国海军的青睐，其4000吨左右的排水量，搭载有一门76毫米主炮，32单元海红旗-16和鱼-8反潜导弹共架发射的垂发系统，8枚鹰击83和一架直-9直升机，虽然是2006年开始建造，设计时间更是很早的一种舰艇，但是其战斗力即使放到当今也不算太差，放眼全世界的护卫舰当中也能达到中上的水平。

google_en: With the launch of the latest Type 054A frigate at the end of 2017, it means that as many as 29 Type 054A frigates have been built, approaching the total number of 053H series frigates. Since the first Type 054A was launched in 2006, 0 The construction process of 54A has been 12 years. Even if the world has built such a large number of high-performance general-purpose frigates, except for China, only the "Perry" class frigates built by the United States in the 1970s and 1980s can be compared.
zh: 随着2017年末一艘最新的054A型护卫舰的下水，标志着054A护卫舰已经建造了高达29艘之多，已经逼近了053H系列护卫舰的总和，而从2006年第一艘054A下水至今，054A的建造历程已经有了12年之久，即使在全世界范围内，建造如此数量之多的高性能通用护卫舰，除了中国，也只有美国在上个世纪7、80年代建造的“佩里”级护卫舰可以相提并论了。

google_en: The future development of the Chinese Navy will definitely become a blue-water navy, and it will also go to the ocean in the future, with the ability to quickly deploy in areas closely related to China's vital interests, demonstrate the presence of force, and have strong combat power when necessary to ensure that China's vital interests in the region are not damaged. So it seems that the new Hu Weijiang will develop towards large-scale and ocean-going.
zh: 中国海军未来的发展必将是彻底成为蓝水海军的，而未来也必将是走向大洋，具备在于中国切身利益息息相关的地区进行快速部署，展示武力存在，必要时能够拥有强大的战斗力来保证中国在该地区的切身利益不被损坏，那么如此看来新型胡伟江必将朝着大型化、远洋化发展。

google_en: So how should China's new frigates be developed? This is directly related to its future positioning and the strategic policy of our Chinese navy.
zh: 那么说中国的新型护卫舰应该如何发展，这与其将来的定位和我们中国海军的战略方针有着直接关系。

google_en: The role of the new frigate in the future aircraft carrier battle group should be to serve as the main anti-submarine force and medium-to-near area air clearance positioning, and in the amphibious assault ship strike group, it should serve as a frigate class. According to such needs, the new frigate must have strong anti-submarine capabilities and good medium-range area air clearance capabilities.
zh: 而新型护卫舰的角色在未来航母战斗群里应该会充当反潜主力和中近区域放空的定位，在两栖攻击舰打击群里应该会充当护卫舰艇类，那么根据这样的需求就要求新型护卫舰必须具备强大的反潜能力和不错的中程区域放空能力。

google_en: Let’s look at the positioning of new frigates in the future Chinese Navy sequence. The future Chinese Navy should be similar to the U.S. Navy. In addition to the necessary offshore defense ships, other main ships will form aircraft carrier battle groups or amphibious assault ship strike groups according to the needs of the situation.
zh: 再看看新型护卫舰在未来中国海军序列里的定位问题，未来的中国海军应该会和美国海军类似，除去必备的近海防御舰艇以外，其他主力舰艇将会根据情况需要组成航母战斗群或者两栖攻击舰打击群。

google_en: Based on the above positioning, we can boldly imagine what the future domestic frigates will look like.
zh: 基于上述的定位，可以大胆的设想出未来国产护卫舰的大概模样。

google_en: In this way, the overall level of the new frigate will reach the current first-class level in the world, even when compared with the American FFG.
zh: 这样一来新型护卫舰的总体水平将会达到目前世界上的一流水准，即使是同美国的FFG相比也不逞多让。

google_en: First of all, the displacement will be significantly increased compared to the current Type 054A frigate. It is estimated that the displacement of the new frigate will reach about 5,000-6,000 tons; the power system will use a QC280 improved gas turbine and two diesel engines. The comprehensive electric propulsion system composed of oil engines is expected to have a maximum speed of about 30 knots, and the endurance will be greatly increased; as for the weapon configuration, the 76mm main gun and 1130 close-in defense gun should be retained, but a Hongqi 10 launch system will be added, and the main gun should be behind the There will be a 32-48 unit vertical launch system that the improved Hongqi 16 and Yu-8 share. A large 8-16 unit vertical launch system should be installed in the middle and rear of the ship for launching YJ-18 and new cruise missiles; the hangar and parking platform will also be enlarged, reaching Parking and storage of two 10-ton helicopters; as for the electronic radar system, if it is a high-end version, it should be equipped with a small four-sided fixed phased array radar based on the development of 346A. If it is a low-end version, it can use a multi-functional rotating phased array radar similar to that on a European frigate.
zh: 首先来说排水量相对于现在的054A型护卫舰将有一个大幅度的增加，估计新型护卫舰的排水量会达到5000-6000吨左右;动力系统将会采用有一台QC280改进型燃气轮机和两台柴油机组成的综合电力推进系统，最高航速有望达到30节左右，续航力也会大幅度增加;至于武器配置76毫米主炮和1130近防炮应该会保留，但是会增加一座红旗10发射系统，主炮后面应该会有一个32-48单元红旗16改进型和鱼-8共架的垂发系统，在舰体中后方应该会加装一个8-16单元的大型垂发系统用于发射鹰击18和新型巡航导弹;机库和停机平台也会增大，达到两架10吨级直升机的停放和存放;至于电子雷达系统方面，高配的话应该会装备基于346A发展的小型四面固定相控阵雷达，低配的话可以使用类似于欧洲护卫舰上的多功能旋转相控阵雷达。

google_en: Of course, the above concepts are just the author's conjectures about the new domestically produced frigates. We can only find out the details when the new frigates are launched. Let us look forward to it together.
zh: 当然上述的概念只是笔者对于国产新型护卫舰的猜想，具体如何我们只能等到新型护卫舰下水的时候才能一探究竟，让我们共同期待吧。

google_en: In recent years, our city has encouraged enterprises to actively participate in the construction of national, industry standards and regional group standards. Enterprises that lead or participate in the formulation of Zhejiang manufacturing group standards will be awarded 300,000 yuan, and enterprises that have passed Zhejiang manufacturing brand certification will be awarded 500,000 yuan. This is the highest amount of this award in the province, stimulating the enthusiasm of enterprises to participate in benchmarking.
zh: 近年来，我市鼓励企业积极参与国家、行业标准和区域团体标准的建设，对为主或者参与制定浙江制造团体标准的企业给予30万元奖励，对通过浙江制造品牌认证的企业奖励50万元，是全省该项奖励的最高额度，激发了企业参与对标的热情。

google_en: (Makarov)
zh: （马卡洛夫）

google_en: (Compiled/Feng Xue)
zh: （编译/冯雪）

google_en: Gao Jian said that a professional team composed of industry technical experts and quality certification organizations praised the group's achievements in core aspects such as excellent quality and independent innovation, and unanimously believed that it fully complied with the standards. As long as the products pass the inspection, Wang Li will become one of the first companies to pass the standards.
zh: 高健表示，由行业技术专家和质量认证组织组成的专业团队对该集团在品质卓越、自主创新等核心方面的成绩表示赞誉，一致认为完全合标，接下来只要产品通过检验，王力将成为首批通过该标准的企业之一。

google_en: A few days ago, in the production workshop of Wangli Group, the group's system leader Gao Jian and his employees were sealing and packaging an anti-theft safety door as a sample for participating in the Zhejiang manufacturing group's standard benchmarking work, preparing to be sent to the Shaoxing Quality Inspection Center.
zh: 日前，王力集团生产车间，该集团体系负责人高健与员工一起正将一樘防盗安全门封箱打包，作为参与浙江制造团体标准对标达标工作样品，准备送往绍兴质量检测中心。

google_en: Other companies in our city that simultaneously carry out benchmarking and compliance work for Zhejiang manufacturing group standards are Buyang and Qunsheng Group.
zh: 我市与其同步开展浙江制造团体标准对标和达标工作的还有步阳、群升集团。

google_en: Wangli Group is just a microcosm of how standards can drive industrial transformation and upgrading.
zh: 王力集团只是标准撬动产业转型升级的一个缩影。

google_en: Just two days ago, Wang Li passed the on-site audit by the "Made in Zhejiang" certification expert group.
zh: 就在前两天，王力已通过了“浙江制造”认证专家组的现场审核。

google_en: In recent years, a large amount of capital has poured into the film and television market, and the popularity and remuneration of star actors have increased. Producer He Jing once broke the news that two actors in a popular drama were paid nearly 100 million yuan, but in the end they only acted together for two days, and basically all other scenes were done by stand-ins.
zh: 近些年大量资本涌入影视市场，明星演员的知名度与片酬水涨船高。制片人何静曾爆料称，某部热拍剧中的两位演员拿着近亿元的片酬，最后竟然只一起搭了两天的戏，其他戏份基本全由替身代劳。

google_en: Nowadays, it is common for actors to travel around to play. The male and female protagonists are in different crews at the same time. As a result, they cannot appear on the set at the same time. The crew is forced to use stand-ins to ensure the cycle.
zh: 在演员四处串戏成风的当下，同一时间女男主演在不同剧组，造成同一时间不能同时出现在片场，剧组被迫用替身来保证周期。

google_en: Since the formulation of Zhejiang manufacturing team standards last year by the city’s anti-theft safety door industry, companies such as Xingyue and Xinduo have also been actively applying for docking and benchmarking work.
zh: 自去年由我市防盗安全门行业制定的浙江制造团队标准制定以来，星月、新多等企业也在积极申请对接对标工作。

google_en: Samsung said in a statement earlier this week that 93% of its Note 7 smartphones sold in the U.S. have been recalled.
zh: 三星在本周早些时候发布的一份声明中说，在美国市场，93%的已售Note7智能手机已被召回。

google_en: It is understood that after returning to Beijing from the away game in Chengdu, Morris continued to go to the hospital for acupuncture treatment to ensure that the injury would not continue to worsen.
zh: 据了解，在从成都客场回到北京后，莫里斯继续前往医院进行了针灸治疗，以保证伤情不会继续恶化。

google_en: China's household debt rate is close to that of the United States. What's more terrifying than not being able to buy a house is not being able to repay debt?
zh: 中国家庭债务率接近美国 比买不起房更可怕的是还不起债？

google_en: Recently, everyone has been discussing the recent changes in real estate policy. Is the real estate policy going to be loosened again? Will the diversification of land policy supply entities lead to a decline in housing prices?
zh: 最近一段时间，大家都在讨论房地产政策最近有什么变化，是不是房地产政策又要松绑了？土地政策供给主体多元化，会不会让房价出现下降呢？

google_en: Finally, Robin Li also said that China does not lack good stories, but there is no "IP that can cross cultures and have ecological effects" like Harry Potter, and this "ecological thinking" is what we should learn from Hollywood.
zh: 最后，李彦宏还称，中国不缺好故事，但没有像哈利波特那样“能跨越文化，具备生态效应的IP”，而这种“生态思维”正是我们该向好莱坞学习的地方。

google_en: However, when we are worried about real estate prices, macroeconomic regulation, and the future trend of the real estate market, the "People's Daily" has written an article again. Last time we specifically discussed the "People's Daily" commentary on setting the tone for real estate regulation, but now the "People's Daily" article discusses a more serious topic than whether you can afford a house. This is, even if you can afford a house, can you still afford the debt?
zh: 但是，在我们担心房地产价格，担心宏观经济调控，担心房地产市场未来走势的时候，《人民日报》再次撰文了，上次我们专门论述了《人民日报》评论对于房地产调控的定调，而现在《人民日报》撰文论述的却是一个比买不买得起房更为严重的话题，这就是即使你买得起房，还得起债吗？

google_en: Today, let’s talk about a more serious problem than buying a house: loan repayment.
zh: 今天，我们就来聊聊比买房更为严峻的问题：还贷。

google_en: 1. China’s increasingly serious housing debt crisis
zh: 一、中国日益严重的房债危机

google_en: The proportion of debt of the residential sector in the entire real economy has increased, and the leverage ratio has increased rapidly.
zh: 居民部门在全部实体经济中的债务占比加大，杠杆率上升速度较快。

google_en: Relevant research shows that the liabilities of Chinese households in financial institutions are mainly consumer loans, accounting for about two-thirds of residents' liabilities, which is about twice that of operating loans.
zh: 有关研究表明，中国家庭在金融机构的负债以消费性贷款为主，约占居民负债的2/3，大约是经营性贷款的2倍。

google_en: The overseas edition of "People's Daily" published a commentary article "Awards and Loans: Joys and Worries of Struggling Youth" on January 17. According to the data in the article, in November 2017, the National Finance and Development Laboratory of the Chinese Academy of Social Sciences and the National Balance Sheet Research Center released the "Three Quarters" "Report on China's Deleveraging Process" pointed out that the household sector's leverage ratio continued its upward trend, rising from 47.4% in the second quarter of 2017 to 48.6% in the third quarter, an increase of 1.3 percentage points, and an increase of 3.8 percentage points in the first three quarters of 2017.
zh: 《人民日报》海外版于1月17日发表了评论文章《奖与贷︰奋斗青年的乐与忧》，根据文中的数据显示，2017年11月，中国社科院国家金融与发展实验室、国家资产负债表研究中心发布的《三季度中国去杠杆进程报告》指出，居民部门杠杆率依然延续上升趋势，从2017年二季度的47.4%上升到三季度的48.6%，上升了1.3个百分点，2017年前三个季度上升了3.8个百分点。

google_en: Among them, medium- and long-term loans, mainly housing loans, account for about 80% of consumer loans. However, in terms of incremental growth, short-term consumer loans are growing faster than medium- and long-term loans.
zh: 其中，在消费性贷款中，以住房贷款为主的中长期贷款占八成左右，但从增量看，短期消费贷款增长速度较快，高于中长期贷款。

google_en: In addition, China's household debt rate only counts the total amount of credit obtained by the household sector from financial institutions. However, Chinese households also have many private loans, including borrowing money from relatives and friends, and there is a large amount of hidden debt.
zh: 除此之外，中国家庭债务率只是统计了家庭部门从金融机构获取的信贷总额，而中国家庭还有不少包括向亲戚朋友借钱在内的民间借贷，存在大规模隐性债务。

google_en: This report interviewed "millennial" young people (born between 1980 and 2000) in nine countries.
zh: 这项报告的访问对象为9个国家的“千禧一代”年轻人（出生在1980年至2000年间）。

google_en: Let’s compare another data. In May last year, HSBC released a survey report spanning nine countries with nearly tens of thousands of respondents.
zh: 我们再对比一个数据，去年五月份，汇丰银行发布了一项横跨9国、受访者接近上万人的调查报告。

google_en: People can't help but be stunned when seeing such data. According to statistics from Suning Financial Research Institute, China's residents' leverage ratio was only 3% in 1996 and only 18% in 2008. However, since 2008, the residents' leverage ratio has begun to show rapid growth, doubling in just six years to 36.4%. By the third quarter of 2017, the household leverage ratio had reached 48.6%.
zh: 看到这样的数据，让人不禁有些瞠目结舌，根据苏宁金融研究院的统计数据显示，1996年中国居民杠杆率只有3%，2008年也仅为18%，但是自2008年以来居民杠杆率开始呈现迅速增长态势，短短六年间翻了一倍，达到36.4%。到了2017年三季度居民杠杆率已经高达48.6%。

google_en: These data tell us a very likely problem, that is, compared with being unable to afford a house, the biggest potential "grey rhinoceros" for Chinese residents at this stage is probably the inability to repay their debts.
zh: 这些数据告诉我们一个极有可能出现的问题，那就是相比于买不起房而言，中国居民现阶段最大的潜在“灰犀牛”估计会是还不起债了。

google_en: 2. Why is the housing debt crisis the most serious problem?
zh: 二、房债危机为什么才是最为严重的问题？

google_en: The report pointed out that the home ownership rate of young people born in the 1980s and 1990s in China is as high as 70%, far ahead of the second-placed Mexico (46%), and twice the level of the United States (35%).
zh: 报告指出，中国的80、90后年轻人住房拥有率高达70%，遥遥领先第二名墨西哥（46%），也是美国该项指标（35%）的2倍水平。

google_en: The cause of the U.S. real estate crisis is blamed on Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac.
zh: 而美国房地产危机出现的原因则被归咎于两房：房利美和房地美。

google_en: As in our previous analysis, although we have been saying that China's housing prices are high, compared to other countries in the world, China's home ownership rate is actually quite high. So instead of saying that housing prices are high and you cannot afford to buy a house, I am afraid that the question that many friends have to ask now is can you afford to repay the loan?
zh: 正如我们之前的分析，虽然我们一直在说中国房价较高，但是相比于世界上其他的国家而言，中国的住房拥有率其实是相当高的，那么与其说房价高买不起房，恐怕现在要问很多朋友的问题是你还得起贷款吗？

google_en: When we look at the real estate market around the world, China's real estate market started late. Except for Hainan, which we mentioned before, there has not yet been a major real estate crisis. However, just ten years ago in 2008, the origin of the global financial tsunami was the real estate crisis in the United States.
zh: 我们纵观全世界的房地产市场，中国的房地产市场由于起步较晚，除了我们之前说的海南之外，尚未出现过大的房地产危机，但是就在十年前的2008年全世界金融海啸的起源就是美国的房地产危机。

google_en: At that time, in the golden age of the United States, real estate companies sold houses to low-income people in the United States with extremely low down payments in order to expand sales. When the U.S. economy was doing well, the real estate market was also booming. However, the good times did not last long. As the growth of the U.S. economy stagnated, the income of home buyers dropped, and a large number of household consumption expenditures began to decline.
zh: 当时在美国的黄金时代，房地产公司为了扩大销售将房子以极低的首付卖给了当时美国的低收入人群，在美国经济向好的时候，房地产市场也是一片欣欣向荣，然而好景不长，随着美国经济出现了增长的停滞，引起了购房者的收入下降，于是大量的家庭消费支出开始下降。

google_en: However, the current situation in the United States at that time was that American household assets were composed of financial assets and real estate assets. Almost all household assets of low-income groups in the United States were real estate, while most of the assets of the top 20% of high-income groups were financial assets. This resulted in the higher the real estate debt ratio of poorer households in the United States.
zh: 但是，当时美国的现状是美国家庭资产的组成部分金融资产和房地产资产，美国的低收入群体几乎所有的家庭资产全部是房地产，而前20%的高收入群体中大部分资产却是金融资产，于是就造成了在美国越是贫穷的人家房地产的负债率就越高。

google_en: A serious fact is that these people bought their houses when the economy was better, so the money to pay the mortgage was calculated based on their better income. When the income declined, the pressure on the mortgage not only did not decrease, but even increased because of some subprime mortgage plans. As a result, the real estate problems of these American families gradually evolved into a real estate crisis.
zh: 一个严重的事实是这些人都是在经济较好的时候买的房子，所以支付房贷的钱也是以他们较好的收入来计算的，当收入出现了下滑的时候，房贷的压力不仅没有减少甚至因为一些次贷计划变得浮动增加，于是此消彼长之下这些美国家庭的房地产问题就这么逐步演变成为了房地产的危机。

google_en: As a result, some people could not afford to pay their mortgages because their incomes were too low, so banks began to repossess their properties. When banks repossessed their properties from home buyers who defaulted on their loans, they sold them at very low prices, which led to a step-by-step decline in housing prices in the area. This process in turn triggered a rise in housing prices. Further decline has formed a vicious cycle. When house prices fall to a certain level, more and more home buyers find that the value of their houses is even lower than their loans, so more people stop repaying their mortgages, resulting in more bad debts.
zh: 从而有人因为收入过低支付不起房贷，于是银行就开始收回房产，当银行从拖欠贷款的购房者手中收回房产之后，他们会以极低的价格售出，从而导致了该地区的房价一步步下滑，这个过程又引发了房价进一步的下滑，形成了一个恶性循环，当房价下跌到一定的程度之后，越来越多的购房者发现自己的房子价值甚至已经比自己的贷款还低了，于是就有了更多的人停止继续还房贷，又造成了更多的坏账。

google_en: As a result, a huge vicious circle was formed:
zh: 于是，一个巨大的恶性循环就此形成：

google_en: As a result, under such vicious cycles one after another, the U.S. economy gradually collapsed, eventually triggering the 2008 financial crisis in the United States.
zh: 于是，就在这样一个接一个的恶性循环下，美国的经济逐渐陷于崩溃，最终引发了美国2008年的金融危机。

google_en: "The economy is in recession - incomes are falling - some people can't repay their mortgages - banks are selling the houses of people with debts at low prices - house prices are falling - more people are stopping repaying mortgages - banks are selling again - house prices are falling again..."
zh: “经济不景气——收入下滑——一部分人还不起房贷——银行低价出售欠账人的房子——房价下跌——更多的人停止还房贷——银行又出售——房价又下跌……”

google_en: And the problem doesn’t end there. Because housing prices continue to fall, after people stop repaying the house and give the house to the bank, it doesn’t mean that you have no debt. If the money obtained by the bank from auctioning the house is not enough to repay the loan you owe the bank, then you still need to continue to pay back the money. To put it simply, suppose you use a down payment of 600,000 to get the loan. You bought a house worth 3 million for 2.4 million. When the house price dropped to the point where the house was only worth 2 million, you stopped repaying the loan and gave the house to the bank. After the bank auctioned the house, you not only lost your down payment of 600,000, but also owed a debt of 400,000 to the bank. You still have to pay back the money.
zh: 而问题不止如此，因为房价的持续下跌，大家停止还贷把房子给银行之后并不是你就没有债务了，如果银行拍卖房子得到的钱还还不上你欠银行的贷款的话，那么你还是需要接着还钱，简单点说假设你用首付60万，贷款240万买了一套当时价值300万的房子，当房价下跌到这个房子只值200万的时候，你不再还贷把房子给了银行，银行拍卖房子之后，你不仅损失了自己的首付60万，还倒欠银行40万的债务，你还是要接着还钱。

google_en: For our individual families, we must abandon real estate speculation and act according to our ability when buying a house to prevent our family from falling into a huge burden. Only a reasonable assessment of our own income and debt levels is a healthy path to family wealth development.
zh: 对于我们个人家庭来说，一定要放弃房地产投机思维，买房的时候量力而行，避免自己家庭陷入巨大的负担之中，只有合理的评估自己的收入和负债水平才是一个健康的家庭财富发展道路。

google_en: Therefore, with the positioning that houses are for living in and not for speculation, the country has quickly established multiple measures such as multi-subject supply, multi-channel guarantee, and simultaneous rental and purchase to further resolve potential risks.
zh: 于是有了之后房子是用来住的、不是用来炒的定位，国家更加快建立多主体供给、多渠道保障、租购并举等多重措施，进一步化解潜在风险。

This is a very prescient judgment. If the household debt ratio is allowed to continue to rise, it will inevitably lead to huge risks, so we must strictly guard against the emergence of financial risks.

google_en: The Yuexiu District Archives is organizing and collecting hundreds of old photos of the historic Winter Winter Festival Flower Market (all taken fifty or sixty years ago), which are scheduled to be publicly exhibited at the Yuexiu District Culture and Art Center on January 8, 2008. When the flower market begins to be constructed at the end of January, these old photos will be moved to Guangbai Square on Beijing Road for exhibition.
zh: 越秀区档案馆正在组织和收集数百张历史性的迎春花市的老照片(拍摄年代都距今五六十年之久)，定于2008年1月8日在越秀区文化艺术中心进行公开的展览，在1月底花市开始进行搭建时，这批老照片将移至北京路广百小广场进行展览。

google_en: At that time, the Flower Market Forum will contact online media for live broadcast online and simultaneously interact with citizens.
zh: 届时，花市论坛将联系网络媒体进行网上直播，同步与市民进行互动。

google_en: In addition, the Yuexiu District Cultural Bureau will also hold a flower market forum, inviting old leaders of Guangzhou City, social and folklore experts, celebrities, old neighbors on Beijing Road, etc. to talk about the history and future development of the Beijing Road West Lake Road Flower Market.
zh: 另外，越秀区文化局还将举办一期花市论坛，邀请广州市的老领导、社会民俗专家、社会名流、北京路的老街坊等一起畅谈北京路西湖路花市的历史及未来的发展。

google_en: In 2015, the year when organs from death row prisoners were banned, 2,776 Chinese citizens donated organs after death and completed 10,057 organ transplant operations, setting a new historical record.
zh: 2015年禁用死囚器官当年，中国公民逝世后捐献器官2776例，完成10057例器官移植手术，刷新了历史纪录。

google_en: In the past, "Four Dreams of Linchuan" was basically presented on the opera stage in the form of Kunqu Opera, but this is the first time it has been adapted into a drama.
zh: 以往《临川四梦》，基本都是以昆曲的形式呈现在戏曲舞台上的，而被改编成话剧演出，这还是第一次。

google_en: Facing Marco Marco in the final, Higgins broke 100 in three consecutive shots and took a 4-1 lead.
zh: 决赛面对傅家俊，希金斯上来就连续三杆破百，取得4-1的领先。

google_en: In addition, an online flower market has also been launched, using the community information network to send introductory text messages about the flower market to citizens who enter the Beijing Road business district and Xihu Road flower market for shopping. They can also browse the "online flower market" by using their mobile phones to access the Internet.
zh: 此外，还开通网上花市，利用小区信息网络，为进入北京路商圈和西湖路花市游览购物的市民发送有关花市的介绍短信，并可以利用手机上网来流览“网上花市”。

google_en: "Made in Sichuan" new energy vehicles are bucking the trend. Financial subsidies have weakened, the popularity of charging facilities is not high, and the use of ternary lithium batteries in new energy buses has been suspended. Facing the current upward pressure on the domestic new energy vehicle market
zh: “四川造”新能源汽车逆势上行财政补贴力度减弱、充电设施普及率不高、三元锂电池暂停在新能源客车上使用，面对国内新能源汽车市场当前的上行压力

google_en: From November 3rd to 6th, in the first phase of the 16th Western China International Expo (hereinafter referred to as the "Western Expo"), six cities and states including Chengdu, Nanchong, and Ya'an displayed their development results in advanced manufacturing. Among them, new energy vehicles emerged and new products emerged one after another, attracting widespread attention in the industry.
zh: 11月3日—6日，在第十六届中国西部国际博览会（以下简称“西博会”）第一阶段展览中，成都、南充、雅安等6个市州纷纷展示在先进制造业方面的发展成果，其中新能源汽车崭露锋芒，新品迭出，引起业界的广泛关注。

google_en: Currently, with the weakening of financial subsidies for new energy vehicles, the low penetration rate of charging facilities, and the suspension of the use of ternary lithium batteries in new energy buses, the domestic new energy vehicle market is experiencing temporary upward pressure.
zh: 当前，随着新能源汽车财政补贴力度减弱、充电设施普及率不高、三元锂电池暂停在新能源客车上使用，国内新能源汽车市场出现暂时的上行压力。

google_en: However, "Made in Sichuan" new energy vehicles have bucked the trend and are aggressively entering the passenger car and commercial vehicle market segments. Where is the confidence?
zh: 然而，“四川造”新能源汽车却逆势上行，大举进军乘用车和商用车细分市场，底气何在？

google_en: Current situation of our reporter Zhao Zeyu: Focus on cultivating "top students". Recently, there has been constant news about the "Made in Sichuan" new energy automobile industry.
zh: 本报记者赵泽宇现状：集中力量培育“尖子生”近期，“四川造”新能源汽车产业新闻不断。

google_en: Less than eight months after completing the acquisition of Dongfeng Nanchong Automobile Co., Ltd., on October 26, the new commercial vehicle brand "Yuan" under Geely Holding Group (hereinafter referred to as "Geely Group") made its debut in Chengdu. Its first pure electric light truck Yuan E200 equipped with a smart car networking platform made its debut at the Western Expo.
zh: 在完成收购东风南充汽车有限公司后不到8个月时间，10月26日，吉利控股集团（以下简称“吉利集团”）旗下的全新商用车品牌“远程”在成都首发，旗下首款搭载智能车联网平台的纯电动轻卡远程E200首次亮相西博会。

google_en: It is worth mentioning that while most of this year's corporate salary guidance lines have been flat or declining, the bottom lines in Beijing and Guizhou have increased.
zh: 值得一提的是，在今年的企业工资指导线涨幅多为持平或下降的情况下，北京和贵州的下线有所提高。

google_en: The British Sport Council is responsible for allocating funds to various Olympic events, and of course is also responsible for setting medal-winning targets for each event.
zh: 英国体育理事会负责各个奥运会项目资金的划拨，当然也负责给各个项目下达夺牌目标。

google_en: Xinhua News Agency, London, January 9th (Reporter Wang Zijiang) The British Sports Council announced on the 9th its goal to participate in the Pyeongchang Winter Olympics in South Korea next month: to win at least 5 medals, which is the "most ambitious" goal in the history of the British delegation to participate in the Winter Olympics.
zh: 新华社伦敦1月9日电（记者王子江）英国体育理事会9日公布了下个月参加韩国平昌冬奥会的目标：赢得至少5块奖牌，这是英国代表团参加冬奥会历史上“最宏伟的”目标。

google_en: It is estimated that the sports in which British athletes hope to compete for medals come from snowboarding, curling, skeleton and short track speed skating.
zh: 据推算，英国运动员有希望冲击奖牌的项目来自单板滑雪、冰壶、钢架雪车和短道速滑等。

google_en: Most of the money comes from the National Lottery, with the remainder coming from state coffers.
zh: 这些钱大部分来自国家彩票，剩下的来自国家财政。

google_en: In the past Winter Olympics cycle, the British Sports Council allocated a total of 32 million pounds (approximately 280 million yuan) in training funds for Winter Olympics projects, which was double that of the Sochi Winter Olympics cycle.
zh: 在过去一个冬奥会周期内，英国体育理事会为冬奥会项目划拨了总共3200万英镑（约合2.8亿元人民币）的训练经费，比索契冬奥会周期翻了一倍。

google_en: Britain's hopes of winning gold mainly rest on two people. One is Alice Christie, the triple gold medalist at last year's World Short Track Speed ​​Skating Championships, and the other is the last women's bobsleigh champion Liz Arnold.
zh: 英国夺金的希望主要寄托在两人身上，一个是去年世界短道速滑锦标赛三金得主爱丽丝·克里斯蒂，另外一个是上届的女子钢架雪车冠军利兹·亚诺德。

google_en: At the 2014 Sochi Winter Olympics, the British delegation achieved a record of 1 gold, 1 silver and 2 bronze medals, which was their best record since the first Winter Olympics in 1924.
zh: 2014年索契冬奥会，英国代表团取得了1金1银2铜的战绩，这是自1924年首届冬奥会之后，他们取得的最好战绩。
